| Peter – I’ll keep this short:

Our Senate race in Georgia is officially going to a runoff election. **With less than 30 days to defend my seat, Republicans are doing everything in their power to defeat me.**

That's why Donald Trump has visited our state multiple times to rally the GOP base for my opponent, Herschel Walker – and why Mitch McConnell's super PAC has spent millions smearing me with attack ads.

**I don't take a cent from corporate PACs, so I'm fully counting on your grassroots support to power our movement to victory. We’ve done this once before, and I know we can do it again.**

Peter,

**The most important Governor race of the 2022 cycle is coming down to the wire.**
The Arizona Governor's race is up in the air, and hundreds of thousands of votes are left out there to be counted. Our War Room of lawyers and data crunchers are working around the clock to make sure Kari Lake wins this election - **but we need your help to keep it running until we win.**

subject: good and bad news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
| | |

Friend, I'll be quick:
**With the runoff officially underway, national Republicans are blanketing the airwaves with attack ads to defeat me, elect Herschel Walker, and flip this Senate seat red.**
The good news is that we're fighting back with TV ads of our own. But at this critical moment, we're falling short of what we need to keep them on the air, reach critical voters, and win this race.
We simply cannot afford to start the runoff at a disadvantage, so I'm counting on you to help keep our TV ads live and power our campaign to victory:
**[Will you chip in $5 or more right now – every dollar makes a crucial difference – so we can keep our ads on the air, win this race, and keep Georgia blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54611225/379064433/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk4584-fr-nd&recurring=0&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWI3ZTMyZC03OTY0LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=32fIGccdSRAsXjWlESQAEGAv7kV37Jg_WCXibAOoB-o=)**

name: Kirsten Engel
subject: Everything hinges on this race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]
Friend — we've been warning for months that control of the House may depend on this seat. Now, with over 80% of the votes counted, it's looking like that's become a reality.
I'm in a virtual tie with my opponent, and we're headed toward a recount.
I don't need to tell you how important this recount is. Every vote matters with margins this small.
Republicans poured hundreds of thousands of dollars into this race, and they will put even more into the recount. That's why I'm reaching out now.
We need to be prepared to a long, expensive fight. Will you help us prevent Republican voter suppression and make sure the right candidate wins this seat by chipping in now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel-for-arizona-recount?refcode=X_111422_Recount]

I'm in a virtual tie with my opponent, and we're headed toward a recount. I don't need to tell you how important this recount is. Every vote matters with margins this small. Republicans poured hundreds of thousands of dollars into this race, and they will put even more into the recount. That's why I'm reaching out now. We need to be prepared to a long, expensive fight. Will you help us prevent Republican voter suppression and make sure the right candidate wins this seat by chipping in now? [] [] [] [] [] [] Thank you so much! — Kirsten [] Kirsten is a mom, an environmental attorney, and a State Legislator who has spent the past 5 years fighting to restore funding to public schools, protect Arizona's natural resources, and make our communities safer. She’s ready to take that fight to Washington to find common-sense solutions to the challenges we’re facing here in Arizona's Sixth Congressional District. Will you help her fight for Arizona by chipping in now? [] [] [] [] [] Paid for by Engel for Arizona Engel for Arizona PO Box 40721 Tucson, AZ 85717 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: We're going to a runoff in Georgia -
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | This can't wait: **We're officially going to a runoff in Georgia's must-win Senate race, and I urgently need your help to win.**

**[If you’re in this fight with me, will you split a donation between me and the DSCC so we can defeat Herschel Walker and fight for a Democratic Senate?](https://go.dscc.org/go/5319?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20221114-RaphaelWarnock-NoTurningBack-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20221114-RaphaelWarnock-NoTurningBack-Pros-sl1&akid=8674%2E9716520%2ERwgHBl)**

Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire GOP establishment have already spent more than $52 million to defeat me – and you can bet they're lining up their shady megadonors to spend _even more_ in this next critical phase of the election.

**We need to fight back ASAP, or else we could put this seat in serious danger. But with time running out before our midnight deadline, we're facing a MAJOR budget gap. We simply cannot power our campaign forward without an immediate surge of grassroots support.**

I know that we have what it takes to win this race and make history once again here in Georgia – but not if we fall short on important days like this. So please, I'm personally asking you to come through:

**[Will you split $5 between me and the DSCC right now so we can close our gap, win this runoff, and keep Georgia blue?](https://go.dscc.org/go/5319?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20221114-RaphaelWarnock-NoTurningBack-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20221114-RaphaelWarnock-NoTurningBack-Pros-sl1&akid=8674%2E9716520%2ERwgHBl)**

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Here's Why Democrats Won BIG
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=this_cost_us_complete_democrat&n=1)
---
Peter \-- **The control of the ENTIRE Minnesota Government came down to 161 votes.** This is going to be a long, detailed email but I need you to know what's going on and what happened. Establishment Republicans constantly say they are "conservatives" and want freedom, but when push comes to shove, their actions don't match. Let me lay it out for you. One of the tightest races and where most of the money was spent was in Senate District 41 (Lake Elmo, Cottage Grove, Hastings). There was a solid, Constitutional Conservative that pledged to be a liberty champion for things like the Never Again bill. His name was Tom Dippel and he was the Republican candidate in Senate District 41. Tom ran a great campaign, door knocked everyday and built a beautiful grassroots ground game. **But the Republican Establishment put up roadblocks to stop the liberty movement that you and I are fighting for and tried to trip Tom up at every turn.** After he won the Republican endorsement back in April by a massive 50-point margin over RINO Rep Tony Jurgens, the Establishment tried getting him to walk the plank to drop out of the race so they could get their "yes man" Jurgens through. They reached into their bag of dirty tricks to push him around like a school yard bully. Tom didn't budge! He kept his campaign going, and so the Establishment recruited Tony Jurgens to run against him in the primary, despite Jurgens losing the endorsement. Senator Karin Housely went so far as to endorse Tony Jurgens AGAINST the Party candidate, Tom Dippel. The Establishment lies and claims it wants unity but in reality they just want control. **Even Republican Senate staff actively campaigned for Jurgens in the primary to defeat Tom Dippel.** But good for us, Republican voters weren't buying what the RINOs were selling so Tom defeated Jurgens by 20 points, thus ending RINO Tony Jurgens' political career in St Paul. **Bitter and depressed from losing, Jurgens did the unthinkable - he started campaigning for the Democrat in the race: Judy Seeberger.** It started with him attending events with her. Then a yard signed popped up at his Cottage Grove home that we received pictures of and wrote about [**HERE**](https://www.action4liberty.com/republican_jurges_puts_democrat_s_sign_in_yard?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=this_cost_us_complete_democrat&n=2). And when that wasn't enough, Jurgens made a public endorsement the week before the election, cutting this video with Democrat Seeberger: [](https://www.action4liberty.com/jurgens_endorsed_democrat_seeberger_in_pivotal_race?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=this_cost_us_complete_democrat&n=3) On election night, **Jurgens was able to get at least 161 people to flip their vote** from Republican to Democrat and gave the Democrats COMPLETE CONTROL of our government with a Seeberger win! The radicals who want COVID mandates, vaccines, California energy policies, abortion up to birth, gun control and much, much bigger government, just took over Minnesota's government because of RINO Tony Jurgens and the Republican Establishment. We've long called out Jurgens (and many others) for being RINOs, which means "Republican In Name Only." Which is 100% what they showed. **The Establishment Republicans would rather give control of the entire government to the Democrats than have a Constitutional Conservative.** In the case of RINO Tony Jurgens, he played with fire and just burned it all down. But the problem doesn't stop with him. Jurgens got political cover for years in the Minnesota House which had the same Republican "leader" for a decade: Lobbyist Legislator Kurt Daudt. The voting record of Republican legislators have been abysmal over the years and Jurgens was one of the worst. You'd never know that, because the entrenched Establishment told you he was a "conservative." When the Republicans in the House were in the Majority, you never saw bold, conservative proposals. They never gave back surpluses, shrunk government, passed Stand-your-Ground or Constitutional Carry or pushed the conservative agenda because they are not conservatives, they are RINOs. Remember the fight to End Walz' Emergency Powers? **Only 15 Republicans voted to End Walz' Emergency Powers on the first recorded vote and the Senate Republicans buried it during the first Walz Lockdown.** Instead of focusing on the radical Democrats 24/7, you and I were forced to get Republicans on board first before we could start going after Democrats on Ending Walz' Emergency Powers. And that fight continued on giving back the surplus and stopping vaccine mandates. **It's a small consolation, but it appears that House Republicans are learning finally because they just FIRED LOBBYIST LEGISLATOR KURT DAUDT on Friday as Minority Leader.** House Republicans got rid of the guy who pushed masking and promoted the COVID vaccine in this commercial: [](https://www.action4liberty.com/lobbyist_legislator_daudt_featured_in_get_your_vaccine_commercial?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=this_cost_us_complete_democrat&n=4) In the Senate, Majority Leader Jeremy Miller resigned, which in my opinion, shows at least one of these Republican legislators understands leadership. He failed the mission and did the right thing by stepping down. **Stepping down is a lost concept though for Crony MNGOP Chair David Hann.** After losing all statewide offices, the Minnesota House, the Minnesota Senate and getting out fundraised by the Democrats 20 to 1, Hann is seeking a second term in December. UNBELIEVABLE! Crony David Hann has political blood on his hands from these electoral losses like the rest of the Republican Establishment - maybe more. We reported that back in late July, Crony [David Hann cut off data access to GOP endorsed, conservative candidates](https://www.action4liberty.com/hann_harms_endorsed_candidates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=this_cost_us_complete_democrat&n=5) at a pivotal moment before the Republican primary.
## One of those candidates was Tom Dippel!
The toxicity of Hann's leadership spread around the state, even impacting races like Nathan Wesenberg's. Fortunately, Wesenberg was victorious and will be one of the best senators in St Paul. Many of you went to caucus for the first time this year and became delegates. Unfortunately, many of you also experienced resistance because the Hann led Republican Party didn't want new, true grassroots conservatives in their ranks. Because they don't want to have to deliver on their conservative promises - those are just for show during election season. Do you remember the erroneous Campaign Finance Complaint against us? That lawyer is connected to Republicans like Crony David Hann. And when the CFB Board started their witch hunt against us, Hann was cheering them on with RINO Kurt Daudt. They sent out a mass email to Republicans across the state. **Meanwhile, Action 4 Liberty was busy holding Governor Walz and his cohorts accountable. Something that Crony David Hann should've put all his focus on before the election.** It's crystal clear that Republicans have a brand problem. It's time to go a different direction. The people in charge need to step down and get out of the way. They just blew the best chance in a decade to ensure we had a RED WAVE! There will be political pundits that will point the finger at you and me. They'll call us "extremists" and accuse us of being the reason for losses. And their solution will be to moderate more - to become even more Democrat-lite. I know, that's ludicrous! After all, we are the ones who believe in freedom. We are the ones who believe in the Constitution. And we are the ones who LOVE this country and want to unite everyone around that love - not separate each other by race or gender identity. **Instead, we must grow this grassroots, conservative movement even more. With Radical Democrats in complete control, the damage that will be done now will be much worse.** We have a real fight on our hands and that will begin immediately as Democrats are likely to make the experimental COVID vaccine a requirement for our children to attend schools. I'll leave you with this... In 2013, Democrats had complete control of our government. We were just a tiny group in politics back then. The Radical Democrats came for our guns. They started moving anti-gun legislation that would've made people like me instant felons. But patriots from across the state rose up, came to the Capitol, contacted their legislators, showed up at town halls, and PRESSURED politicians in St Paul to back down. It worked!!! **And that's what we're going to have to do for the next two years. If you want to STOP the Radical Left agenda in this state, it's time to get prepared to dial up the heat on these politicians.** You'll hear from us soon about what needs to be done. **In Liberty,** **** **Jake Duesenberg** **President, Action 4 Liberty** | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=this_cost_us_complete_democrat&n=6 "Support us") [Support us](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=this_cost_us_complete_democrat&n=6)
---
Action 4 Liberty
1920 Oakcrest Ave #5
Roseville, MN 55113
Action 4 Liberty · 1920 Oakcrest Ave, 5, Roseville, MN 55042, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=this_cost_us_complete_democrat&n=7).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=this_cost_us_complete_democrat&n=8).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=this_cost_us_complete_democrat&n=9), software for leaders.

name: Trump Rally Alert (via DLCC.org)
subject: We'll make this quick:
body:
Trump is set to take the stage in less than 24 hours – so we’ll make this quick: | | |
---
| | Trump is set to make his announcement in less than 24 hours – so we’ll make this quick:
* **Trump is gearing up for his official 2024 campaign launch,** telling his supporters to prepare for a “big announcement” at his rally tomorrow at Mar-a-Lago.
* **His announcement is sure to rile up his extremist base** and energize his high-dollar donors, so we need to be ready.
* We can’t let Trump’s announcement give his Republican cronies any edge, especially with ultra-competitive special elections just around the corner – **we need to mobilize _now_ to fight back.**

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Are you still on my team?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
The Democrats are all in against me so that I don’t flip this Senate seat. |
---
Peter,

If there's one thing I learned throughout my sports career, _it's that hard work and dedication are often the difference between winning and losing._

Now, I'm in a runoff, and I believe that our hard work and dedication will help us win on December 6th.

**I'm not a career politician. I don't look like one, dress like one, or sound like one. And that's a good thing because smooth-talking career politicians have gotten our country into a mess.**

Instead, I'm dedicated to winning this race so that I can make a real difference for Georgians and the American people in the U.S. Senate.

The Democrats are coming after me with everything they've got, so Peter, I'm going to need all the help I can get from patriots like you. **[Can you spare a few dollars to help me win this seat?](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=b7cfe044d7fb4480967bad83bd78692b&_e=VNs1ShTEK61PhYY2nSxH6-DlV1QlVqzlWd9hmPog_VaIP6xWgXj-InMOsPadO1D3kuvLiQy05QKQ5oui_y66T60ARt4GDzzPJfE4vk8e-VBMOcI_NOU3-qvM_RFnbZrPeVYn4LfMaix7nN-TCBH8vx0hs-ihHziX4FARJ15vZWtUbRFAe3qXlsiE6g-WnXpIzcbZ7H8p8Pp-tJVuHgSegAh3ESmUGOI6-b6P8b9No74_PBbV6089YJom4myLI_ZpBT_Cxx3ZXVwuOO94-vrwesIf4nh3vINKplCqrjCA8DfDql3XACqfxOc4BQUuY4qopz359MgjSRvcdqMY15tiXLSlzHuvu9KMgR9bOIK4rvqagYZboCy9UYDZmNO1RtmGVjEMdQGXwRFSmpJhvb36Wi86NrFVdwezoo5wjNeifCl_bcLrLEz10vAe0NXpCmzU_9J8hq4minWDO8lVCivlhQ%3D%3D)**

I'm not afraid of hard work and long hours, so I'm ready to get over the goal line and finish this OVERTIME battle. But I need to rally every conservative in America behind me, and I'm not going to be able to do it without your help.

Now, I'm in a runoff, and I believe that our hard work and dedication will help us win on December 6th. I'm not a career politician. I don't look like one, dress like one, or sound like one. And that's a good thing because smooth-talking career politicians have gotten our country into a mess. Instead, I'm dedicated to winning this race so that I can make a real difference for Georgians and the American people in the U.S. Senate. The Democrats are coming after me with everything they've got, so Peter, I'm going to need all the help I can get from patriots like you. I'm not afraid of hard work and long hours, so I'm ready to get over the goal line and finish this OVERTIME battle. But I need to rally every conservative in America behind me, and I'm not going to be able to do it without your help. Together, we can win this race! Thank you, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

clean_body: | | | Thank you for your support | | | Team, Did you see the news? We’ve flipped the governor’s office here in Arizona, electing Katie Hobbs as our next governor! Adding Governor-elect Hobbs to our already announced wins with Senator Mark Kelly and Secretary of State-elect Adrian Fontes is proof your support helps us turn Arizona more and more blue. And with a few more races really close, we’ve got a shot to make Arizona really, really blue. Of course, with close margins in some of these races, Republicans are starting to get aggressive. We know the last time they lost, they launched months of fake "audits." Who knows what they may come up with this time? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: We flipped AZ blue! Now help us protect it. clean_body: The fate of America rests on what we do! The fate of America rests on what we do! | Friend, I know I've asked for more money from you than a crooked tax collector the past couple of weeks for my campaign, but I'm reaching out this time with a different ask. Could you help my friend Herschel Walker? | Right now, he's fighting for his life down in Georgia to stop his radical Socialist opponent, Raphael Warnock, from turning Georgia as blue as New York City. Without Herschel, our country comes one step closer to a Socialist takeover. We've got to do everything in our power to send someone from Georgia to the U.S. Senate that cares about our conservative values and not whatever Socialist Agenda Nancy Pelosi's pushing at the moment. So, I'll stop wasting time and get to the point. Thank you for helping us protect America by supporting my friend Herschel Walker. Senator John Kennedy Folks, our country was founded by geniuses but it's being run by idiots. And if you trust the government, well then you obviously failed history class. Peter,

Raphael Warnock's runoff win last year is why Democrats control the Senate today.

Senator Warnock has voted for Joe Biden's disastrous agenda 96% of the time, so he is to blame for our country going in the wrong direction. We can hold him accountable, win this race and get our country back on track, _**[but we can only win if we have your help.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61870785:JOlwlrGNH:m:1:3331703221:7E1977FED94C3458F64043D63B65C46A:r)**_

_If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[**CHIP IN $25 ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61870786:JOlwlrGNH:m:1:3331703221:7E1977FED94C3458F64043D63B65C46A:r)
All eyes are on Georgia. If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51-seat majority where the most radical proposals will succeed. We cannot let that happen, Peter.

Senator Warnock and Democrat Super PACs have launched an advertising blitz that is flooding the airwaves. We already had over $70 million in false attack ads run against us in the general election, and now they're running even more in the runoff!

**[That's why I am asking for your help.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61870785:JOlwlrGNH:m:1:3331703221:7E1977FED94C3458F64043D63B65C46A:r)**

_If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

The Georgia runoff will be the last fight of 2022, so WE MUST WIN IT! We can flip a Democrat seat in the Senate, but I need your help. I know money is tight in this Biden-Warnock economy, **[but if you can chip in even $25 right now- it will help us reach out to undecided voters, implement our 'get-out-the-vote' program, and win on December 6th!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61870785:JOlwlrGNH:m:1:3331703221:7E1977FED94C3458F64043D63B65C46A:r)**

Every single dollar impacts how many more doors we can knock on, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach. **[Please pitch in anything you're able ASAP, even if it's just $25.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61870785:JOlwlrGNH:m:1:3331703221:7E1977FED94C3458F64043D63B65C46A:r)**

Herschel Walker

body:
The Democrats are all in against me so that I don’t flip this Senate seat. |
---
Fellow American,

If there's one thing I learned throughout my sports career, _it's that hard work and dedication are often the difference between winning and losing._

Now, I'm in a runoff, and I believe that our hard work and dedication will help us win on December 6th.

**I'm not a career politician. I don't look like one, dress like one, or sound like one. And that's a good thing because smooth-talking career politicians have gotten our country into a mess.**

Instead, I'm dedicated to winning this race so that I can make a real difference for Georgians and the American people in the U.S. Senate.

The Democrats are coming after me with everything they've got, so Fellow American, I'm going to need all the help I can get from patriots like you. **[Can you spare a few dollars to help me win this seat?](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=1b95d9a4bf0d4825a5370067ec975661&_e=8LN_JffhPSift-GVrdS-Fyzn2IaKycKt2t3vS8I8FOtLZADVaadAhsmpVFcBMTcofvAP27FNk_AVAUKohk0ek18aGiKu1hsawROmNeu83k7VEjhX5YTb_pTUgbIqQXgGZo_l78r-us-aj0KhrriE3nftbLqDE5RVD-HEu6IKzDpN37IAoDLVPJtCE641iKAzKGAeop7qMbWexp6EevgPje5mcCG9BSM9BbW7PxsvLsi4EcwaZvOrvfOplvQUGSOzs3obQ36C_XW1OAokbEkQiboIlLahLS_erjOT8NNPM6p4cEwg-eEM4I6n4QKGkUlN85f_4W_9ueooPsbE9ArwLOKm0yLXOCDb-BVMEUF0u7qntVLUQ21HPvOno2NTuu5qlqFCh4hIHQPFyQ428nxo23PpuOGGtMvUc0IqpukyUt7i5tCNSF-2_WVpsScaZSPz)**

I'm not afraid of hard work and long hours, so I'm ready to get over the goal line and finish this OVERTIME battle. But I need to rally every conservative in America behind me, and I'm not going to be able to do it without your help.

**[So Fellow American, would you please stand with me today by donating as little as $3.40 or even $34?](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=1b95d9a4bf0d4825a5370067ec975661&_e=8LN_JffhPSift-GVrdS-Fyzn2IaKycKt2t3vS8I8FOtLZADVaadAhsmpVFcBMTcofvAP27FNk_AVAUKohk0ek18aGiKu1hsawROmNeu83k7VEjhX5YTb_pTUgbIqQXgGZo_l78r-us-aj0KhrriE3nftbLqDE5RVD-HEu6IKzDpN37IAoDLVPJtCE641iKAzKGAeop7qMbWexp6EevgPje5mcCG9BSM9BbW7PxsvLsi4EcwaZvOrvfOplvQUGSOzs3obQ36C_XW1OAokbEkQiboIlLahLS_erjOT8NNPM6o_QSBuWwkz0Qp7huEoytZcoLsMlQ4IM_I4-oK4--7QWzE9jwErbF0K_B3x_TfMtZAa0THWUaXxv-zRsZPnJzeaLbEOgkzRUSRDO1ifjiGDUhyQmQyKnqVhBhgz7ZNLhFG5pSrDeqT7r7pVI9Yi6UKb) **

clean_body: The Democrats are all in against me so that I don’t flip this Senate seat. | Fellow American, If there's one thing I learned throughout my sports career, it's that hard work and dedication are often the difference between winning and losing. Now, I'm in a runoff, and I believe that our hard work and dedication will help us win on December 6th. I'm not a career politician. I don't look like one, dress like one, or sound like one. And that's a good thing because smooth-talking career politicians have gotten our country into a mess. Instead, I'm dedicated to winning this race so that I can make a real difference for Georgians and the American people in the U.S. Senate. The Democrats are coming after me with everything they've got, so Fellow American, I'm going to need all the help I can get from patriots like you. I'm not afraid of hard work and long hours, so I'm ready to get over the goal line and finish this OVERTIME battle. But I need to rally every conservative in America behind me, and I'm not going to be able to do it without your help. Together, we can win this race! Thank you, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

name: Freedom Caucus
subject: Lauren Boebert Recount
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
Every vote should be counted, and every vote should count. In Colorado’s 3rd congressional district, conservative superstar
| | |
---
|
---
Fellow Conservative: Every vote should be counted, and every vote should count.
In Colorado’s 3rd congressional district, conservative superstar **Lauren Boebert** is locked in a tight race against liberal Democrat Adam Frisch. With 99% of the votes in, Boebert led by just over 1,000 votes — 0.4% of all votes cast.
Races this close in Colorado always go to a recount, and we all know what can happen when bureaucrats go behind closed doors with the ballots. In this race, it’s all about election integrity now.
**[Please support the Lauren Boebert Recount Fund!](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2znd8rk4bnbtl6mao8brpjs44vc0toofe09bjthi8_rp22sh2s8i66or0sli60o36c5h2bs)**
Rep. Boebert will need money to pay the costs of monitoring the process and enforcing the law, so every legally-cast vote is counted.
Boebert’s opponent will have the bottomless resources of the woke elite to draw on. Conservatives must help her answer, dollar for dollar.
**[You can help by supporting her recount fund today.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zpuhinejt89lc9io7e9kq80mes19bveo6s31sct8_rp22sh2s8i66or0sli60o36c5h2bs)**
_Individuals are allowed to contribute any amount up to $2,900 to this fund, and just like before, HFF will pay all processing fees and transfer 100% of your donation to her campaign._
If we want real election integrity, we must ensure every ballot gets the honest process it deserves.
Lauren Boebert won this race. A true recount will find that. But whether she gets a TRUE recount partly depends on us.
**[Please support Lauren Boebert and election integrity now.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zc3d7scehav82h4cp0o0kajn5vdvflcqr9bem668_rp22sh2s8i66or0sli60o36c5h2bs)**
Your support will pay for the lawyers, monitors, and other resources she will need to finish this fight.
If we work together, we can make the difference between a full, fair review of votes and a shadowy process behind closed doors.
Time is short. Lauren Boebert stands for freedom. Now we have to stand with her. The fight for election integrity is now the fight for a fair recount for Lauren Boebert in Colorado!
Thank you for helping us push so many of our Freedom Caucus candidates on to victory. We are grateful for your generous support. Sincerely,
---
---
Ray Yonkura Executive Director House Freedom Fund
---
|
---
|
---
**LAUREN BOEBERT RECOUNT**
---
---
Please help Lauren Boebert fight for a fair recount. Don't let the Democrats hijack the process and disenfranchise voters who want to send this fighter back to Washington.
---
[**DONATE NOW**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z6n10of3hm7hb8qkctu8hucfk71l3csv0cb502eo_rp22sh2s8i66or0sli60o36c5h2bs)
---
|
---
_**"The House Freedom Fund helps grassroots candidates get the financial support they need to compete with establishment candidates." – Congressman Jim Jordan (R-OH)**_
---
|
---
---
House Freedom Fund
300 Independence Ave SE
Washington, DC 20003 House Freedom Fund (HFF) is a multi-candidate political action committee that helps elect conservative candidates to the U.S. House of Representatives. HFF only supports candidates who are dedicated to open, accountable, and limited government, and who support policies that promote liberty, safety, and prosperity for all Americans.

Paid for by House Freedom Fund. Not paid for at taxpayer expense. Contributions to House Freedom Fund are not deductible as charitable contributions. Contributions from corporations or foreign nationals lacking permanent resident status are not permitted. Federal law requires House Freedom Fund to report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a calendar year.
---
PAID FOR BY HOUSE FREEDOM FUND AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. HOUSEFREEDOMFUND.COM
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zr7roa0q4khrdm3c3924j0eifpmnf9urucn8dqpo_rp22sh2s8i66or0sli60o36c5h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Pro Life Update
subject: How To Entirely Empty Your Bowels Every Morning - Top Surgeon Explains How
body:
To the Subscribers of Freedom Nation Today,

Many of our readers have expressed interest in the services offered by Gundry MD. We hope you benefit from the following message:
---
We’ve been told our whole lives to eat certain fruits, vegetables, and whole grains to stay in good health. We've been told our whole lives to eat certain fruits, vegetables, and whole grains to stay in good health. However, according to Dr. Steven Gundry — a world-renowned heart surgeon — many so called **" health foods" in the American diet contain a dangerous toxin, that could be expanding your waistline.** **" This toxin causes micro-tears to form in your fragile intestinal-wall — allowing bacteria and waste products to seep into your body."** Says Dr. Gundry. This harmful condition is best known as "leaky gut," and it's affecting millions of people nationwide. **Warning signs include weight gain, fatigue, digestive discomfort, stiff, achy joints, and even skin problems.** Dr. Gundry explains, "**These side effects are often mistaken for normal signs of aging, because leaky gut usually develops over a matter of years, and sometimes even decades. But I can assure you, the damage caused by these so called "health foods" is far from normal."** The good news is, this problem can be **easily fixed from your own home.** "It's very simple, you just have to know which foods are actually healthy, and which contain this hidden toxin," he goes on to explain. By simply eliminating this harmful toxin, Dr. Gundry has seen thousands of his own patients make swift recoveries. (In fact, he even lost 70lbs himself!) Now, after years of research, Dr. Gundry has decided to release an informative video to the public — free and uninterrupted — showcasing exactly which foods you need to avoid. "Good health is one of life's toughest obstacles," he explains. "So, if this video can help people achieve that, I'll be thrilled to hear I was of help." The video has since gone viral, first being shared by users on Facebook, then being featured on news sites like ABC and CBS. So far, the comments and feedback have been outstanding, with thousands of Americans feeling better than they have in decades. [**Click here to watch the presentation:**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zkdp6btv0g05lbuhqrps9l8uj5itt399feuh34v0_rp22sh2s8i66or0sli60p75c9h2bs) [
](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z0q7f1n1c5m6p37rb12nfqp57e2pc8q625mq9j1o_rp22sh2s8i66or0sli60p75c9h2bs) [**Watch The Video**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zjmbvqjdsug07pk9is7ni1ocks7a9o0tbiv6tot0_rp22sh2s8i66or0sli60p75c9h2bs) Dr. Gundry also serves as the personal physician to many A-list celebrities. Most notable of which include legendary self-help guru Tony Robbins, Oscar award winning actor Alan Arkin, Grammy award winning singer Usher, and countless fortune 500 executives. Now, there is one thing Dr. Gundry asks from his viewers: "If watching this helps you take control of your weight back, fight unwanted cravings, increase your energy, ease gas and bloating, or find relief from stiff, achy joints," Dr. Gundry says... "Then please share this video with your friends and loved ones. Together, we can help as many people avoid these health issues as possible." [**Click here to watch the presentation**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zra9t7331961s9unu6javas5tnalmfbolenvm3rg_rp22sh2s8i66or0sli60p75c9h2bs)
---

name: Tom Brejcha
subject: Eleven years for defending life
body:
I need your immediate support to help the Thomas More Society defend a father-of-seven pro-life advocate against false criminal charges. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c6310%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=%2blbJzLQOF4kmzDJH9%2fSr9Q&sysid=1)
And we're defending him in court!

| | | Fellow American, I need your immediate support to help the Thomas More Society defend a father-of-seven pro-life advocate against false criminal charges. Please let me explain. In the early morning of September 23, roughly twenty-five FBI agents wearing tactical gear threatened to break down the door of Mark Houck's home if he didn't let them in immediately. **With guns pointed at Mark, they hauled him off to jail while his wife and kids looked on, screaming.** Now he's facing multiple criminal charges and eleven years in federal prison due to an incident involving an aggressively abusive Planned Parenthood escort - which is why our team is representing him in court. [**Can I count on your best gift of $40 or more to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND to help us give him the legal defense he deserves?**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c82146%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=I9g5h7FECQVGrhi8i3zOGw&sysid=1) Mark is a dedicated pro-life author, speaker, and sidewalk counselor. He would drive two hours every week to stand outside of abortion clinics for six to eight hours at a time, praying the Rosary and offering support to women who are so desperate they think they have no alternative than to abort their babies, often bringing his twelve-year-old son. But one day, **a Planned Parenthood escort got in his young son's face, ridiculing him and his father in very vulgar and aggressive ways**. Mark defended his son by shoving the escort away after having repeatedly asked him to stop the abuse. The escort wanted him prosecuted for assault and battery for shoving him away from Mark's young son, but the District Court of Philadelphia threw out the case. So, Biden's Department of Justice charged Mark with violating the federal FACE Act...** _and now this courageous pro-life hero faces up to eleven years in federal prison for advocating for life and for defending his family._** We're pulling out all the stops to make sure the DOJ and the abortion clinic escort who are trying to destroy Mark and his family don't get away with this. But this is going to be a long, costly affair, and I need your help. [**That's where your emergency donation to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND comes in - by giving today you can stand with Mark in his hour of need.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c82147%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1ruC0k81rtV3G9N08WspOw&sysid=1) Make no mistake, friend, Mark's arrest was a targeted attack specifically intended to intimidate pro-lifers and people of faith. The incident at the abortion clinic was so minor that the authorities refused to press charges and when the escort filed charges himself, his case was thrown out. Fortunately for Mark and his family, if anyone has experience defending pro-life heroes against Biden's DOJ and Planned Parenthood, it's us. My name is Tom Brejcha and I'm the president and chief counsel of the Thomas More Society - the not-for-profit law firm defending Mark Houck. We're proud to have defended many renowned leaders in America's pro-life movement such as Joe Scheidler and the Pro-Life Action League, David Bereit, David Daleiden, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, Abby Johnson, the Susan B. Anthony List, Lila Rose and Live Action, the March for Life, and many more. But without the help of generous donors, none of our crucial work would be possible. Because the reality is, while you can't be the one personally defending Mark in the courtroom, by donating you can help us vindicate this brave father and pro-life hero who is being ground through the system in an unjust prosecution. **[Can I count on your gift of $40, $60, $100, or more to stand with Mark Houck today and fight back against the dark forces of Planned Parenthood?](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c82148%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0NB581RqlVxhLrjrLZ6Mpw&sysid=1) **[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c82149%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Y67OLAmhE31afox1CAuxxQ&sysid=1) I will be grateful for whatever you're able to send today. Whether it's $10, $40, $60, $250 or more... ...because time is of the essence. We're expecting Mark's defense to cost us hundreds of thousands of dollars. To put it as bluntly as possible, **_Mark could be facing years behind bars for a crime he didn't commit, while his seven children grow up without him and his wife Ryan-Marie is forced to raise their family alone._** Not only that, but pro-life sidewalk counselors across the country may be deterred from going to the clinics out of concern that they, too, could end up in costly legal battles and even face federal charges simply for defending the unborn. So, I do ask that you make your gift as soon as you can. [**Please don't delay in donating to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND immediately.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c82140%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=pRtRlx92VxyWCvK5KuanJg&sysid=1)
I've asked my staff to let me know as soon as we get your generous gift so I can let Mark know that you're standing with him. I know Mark and his family will be deeply touched by your generous support. May God bless you,
---
[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c82141%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XoFkgvUJ60HIDwtgWb6tgQ&sysid=1)
---
Tom Brejcha
President & Chief Counsel
---
P.S. Biden's DOJ and Planned Parenthood want to destroy pro-life, father-of-seven Mark Houck and intimidate people of faith everywhere. They'd love to see Mark rotting away in federal prison for his selfless devotion to the unborn, using his defense of his young son as the excuse. You and I cannot let that happen. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c82142%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=MO%2boYHPlTiQtEPsXofVhxA&sysid=1)[**Can I count on you to support the official criminal defense of Mark Houck with a tax-deductible donation today?**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c82143%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=x3LrmUWHqxXJwZU4lmyu8Q&sysid=1)

clean_body: I need your immediate support to help the Thomas More Society defend a father-of-seven pro-life advocate against false criminal charges. And we're defending him in court! | | | Fellow American, I need your immediate support to help the Thomas More Society defend a father-of-seven pro-life advocate against false criminal charges. Please let me explain. In the early morning of September 23, roughly twenty-five FBI agents wearing tactical gear threatened to break down the door of Mark Houck's home if he didn't let them in immediately. With guns pointed at Mark, they hauled him off to jail while his wife and kids looked on, screaming. Now he's facing multiple criminal charges and eleven years in federal prison due to an incident involving an aggressively abusive Planned Parenthood escort - which is why our team is representing him in court. Mark is a dedicated pro-life author, speaker, and sidewalk counselor. He would drive two hours every week to stand outside of abortion clinics for six to eight hours at a time, praying the Rosary and offering support to women who are so desperate they think they have no alternative than to abort their babies, often bringing his twelve-year-old son. But one day, a Planned Parenthood escort got in his young son's face, ridiculing him and his father in very vulgar and aggressive ways. Mark defended his son by shoving the escort away after having repeatedly asked him to stop the abuse. The escort wanted him prosecuted for assault and battery for shoving him away from Mark's young son, but the District Court of Philadelphia threw out the case. So, Biden's Department of Justice charged Mark with violating the federal FACE Act... and now this courageous pro-life hero faces up to eleven years in federal prison for advocating for life and for defending his family. We're pulling out all the stops to make sure the DOJ and the abortion clinic escort who are trying to destroy Mark and his family don't get away with this. But this is going to be a long, costly affair, and I need your help. Make no mistake, friend, Mark's arrest was a targeted attack specifically intended to intimidate pro-lifers and people of faith. The incident at the abortion clinic was so minor that the authorities refused to press charges and when the escort filed charges himself, his case was thrown out. Fortunately for Mark and his family, if anyone has experience defending pro-life heroes against Biden's DOJ and Planned Parenthood, it's us. My name is Tom Brejcha and I'm the president and chief counsel of the Thomas More Society - the not-for-profit law firm defending Mark Houck. We're proud to have defended many renowned leaders in America's pro-life movement such as Joe Scheidler and the Pro-Life Action League, David Bereit, David Daleiden, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, Abby Johnson, the Susan B. Anthony List, Lila Rose and Live Action, the March for Life, and many more. But without the help of generous donors, none of our crucial work would be possible. Because the reality is, while you can't be the one personally defending Mark in the courtroom, by donating you can help us vindicate this brave father and pro-life hero who is being ground through the system in an unjust prosecution. I will be grateful for whatever you're able to send today. Whether it's $10, $40, $60, $250 or more... ...because time is of the essence. We're expecting Mark's defense to cost us hundreds of thousands of dollars. To put it as bluntly as possible, Mark could be facing years behind bars for a crime he didn't commit, while his seven children grow up without him and his wife Ryan-Marie is forced to raise their family alone. Not only that, but pro-life sidewalk counselors across the country may be deterred from going to the clinics out of concern that they, too, could end up in costly legal battles and even face federal charges simply for defending the unborn. So, I do ask that you make your gift as soon as you can. I've asked my staff to let me know as soon as we get your generous gift so I can let Mark know that you're standing with him. I know Mark and his family will be deeply touched by your generous support. May God bless you, Tom Brejcha President & Chief Counsel P.S. Biden's DOJ and Planned Parenthood want to destroy pro-life, father-of-seven Mark Houck and intimidate people of faith everywhere. They'd love to see Mark rotting away in federal prison for his selfless devotion to the unborn, using his defense of his young son as the excuse. You and I cannot let that happen. | | | (C) Thomas More Society | 309 W. Washington Street Suite 1250, Chicago, IL 60606 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: Have you seen what they’re doing to our kids?!
body:
We have the key to stop our children from being corrupted by the radical Left in our schools -- and I need your immediate help t
[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zmr6i7tadfq83ob1043giului6m3s6du2bvrsako_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk4qj4ttkumqn4s9nmorb79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onj6jgn4cbm69gb1odkmjjm4d3kcdrm1cljc1om4crkcgr72dhnm8om5dljmurm1puie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdjr4s36e6qb6o77mtgmcsbgm9j61o5lcdge1d9h66qj3dbi46h22sh2s8i66or0sli68o74sth2bs)
| | | Dear Fellow Conservative, We have the key to stop our children from being corrupted by the radical Left in our schools -- and I need your immediate help to win... [**That’s why I’m asking you to make an emergency donation of $35 or more today.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z092kahqjcj895pfbr7ksvn78qo34v6202mdjo0o_rp22sh2s8i66or0sli68o74sth2bs) We recently filed suit against a school AND the activists pretending to be teachers to make them pay for what they’re doing to our young and vulnerable children. Because the ONLY way we’re going to stop them -- is to make these extremists pay for their crimes... And that’s exactly what our landmark lawsuit does! Let me quickly give you the details in case you missed us while we were on **Laura Ingraham** ’s great **Fox News **show talking about our case: Jessica Konen, the mother of an innocent 12-year-old girl, was called into her daughter’s school and told that her daughter was now a “boy”. She found out that her young daughter had been groomed into believing she was “transgender” and “bisexual”... Her impressionable daughter didn’t even know these words until they were forced on her by these radicals. The school then pushed Jessica’s innocent daughter to create a whole new identity -- complete with a new boy’s name, new pronouns and had her use a different bathroom... They also created a “Gender Support Plan” and ordered the faculty to use her new name and pronouns -- all without her mother’s knowledge! **And Jessica had no idea because her young daughter was told NOT to tell her mother since she couldn’t be “trusted”****.**
* These people are not real teachers.
* They’re not concerned with teaching our children to read...
* They’re not concerned with teaching our children math and arithmetic...
* They’re not concerned with teaching history...

They want to indoctrinate an entire generation of children to reject their parent’s values and embrace their radical Left-Wing propaganda -- and we have to stop them. [**That’s why I’m asking you to rush in your donation of $35 or more to help us stop these child groomers now.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zl1dhecp4hsaf2l4iq02a4p1asp1djfhjf7u9d0o_rp22sh2s8i66or0sli68o74sth2bs) After all this, Jessica did what any good mother would do and questioned the principal about what was happening to her young daughter at school... ... And what happened next? Child Protective Services was called to her house and “interviewed” her children! This grooming is happening behind closed doors in classrooms across the country... And it’s happening in secret so parents, grandparents andthe community don’t know what’s going on. Jessica’s innocent daughter is just one of the countless victims -- and if we don’t act, there will be more and more every day... Since we announced our lawsuit **The Ingraham Angle** , tons of concerned parents, grandparents and teachers have reached out to us. It’s horrible and sickening that this is happening, but we have to stop it... And our lawsuit is the key. Political pressure and new laws will not work -- we must drag these radical activists and schools into court and make them pay. That’s why our lawsuit names the individual “teachers” -- we must hold **them** accountable... Only when these extremists are scared of being dragged into court and are forced to pay will they stop. Make no mistake -- if we win this landmark case every single one of these so-called teachers will take notice. They will think of the consequences before pushing their radical agenda on our vulnerable children... [**So please, join me today with a donation of $35 or more to fund our lawsuit to protect our kids from out of control leftist teachers.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zhmkavlg5j6fc3vr4svm0kc45ms03corr30sdeu8_rp22sh2s8i66or0sli68o74sth2bs) But to stop them, we need to win this case... And if you can give more today – $50, $100, $250 or more – I will use it to protect our children and our constitutional rights from these radical Left extremists. But, whatever amount you can send, I ask that you rush it in right away. And please know that here at the Center for American Liberty we don’t just file lawsuits – we **WIN** them!! We recently won three major victories for religious liberty before the U.S. Supreme Court and we’re fighting Big Tech and the politicians who are conspiring to silence and destroy conservatives... But this case to stop these extremists from corrupting and damaging our innocent children is too important to lose. And the only way to stop them is to make them know we’re going to make them pay for their actions... [**So please, join the fight today****with your emergency tax-deductible donation of $20, $35, $50, $100 or more today.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zr9drcmn4eqf1avoem86dm0b53hv53bge9pcs11o_rp22sh2s8i66or0sli68o74sth2bs) We’re ready to go to the mat to win this case, but we can’t do it without you. subject: Have you seen what they’re doing to our kids?!
body:
We have the key to stop our children from being corrupted by the radical Left in our schools -- and I need your immediate help t
| | | Dear Fellow Conservative, We have the key to stop our children from being corrupted by the radical Left in our schools -- and I need your immediate help to win... [**That’s why I’m asking you to make an emergency donation of $35 or more today.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztgpfg11t37otns3fhadi8e4b37uehc95rgfa2f0_rp22sh2s8i66or0sli60o33chh2bs) We recently filed suit against a school AND the activists pretending to be teachers to make them pay for what they’re doing to our young and vulnerable children. Because the ONLY way we’re going to stop them -- is to make these extremists pay for their crimes... And that’s exactly what our landmark lawsuit does! Let me quickly give you the details in case you missed us while we were on **Laura Ingraham** ’s great **Fox News **show talking about our case: Jessica Konen, the mother of an innocent 12-year-old girl, was called into her daughter’s school and told that her daughter was now a “boy”. She found out that her young daughter had been groomed into believing she was “transgender” and “bisexual”... Her impressionable daughter didn’t even know these words until they were forced on her by these radicals. The school then pushed Jessica’s innocent daughter to create a whole new identity -- complete with a new boy’s name, new pronouns and had her use a different bathroom... They also created a “Gender Support Plan” and ordered the faculty to use her new name and pronouns -- all without her mother’s knowledge! **And Jessica had no idea because her young daughter was told NOT to tell her mother since she couldn’t be “trusted”****.**
* These people are not real teachers.
* They’re not concerned with teaching our children to read...
* They’re not concerned with teaching our children math and arithmetic...
* They’re not concerned with teaching history...

They want to indoctrinate an entire generation of children to reject their parent’s values and embrace their radical Left-Wing propaganda -- and we have to stop them. [**That’s why I’m asking you to rush in your donation of $35 or more to help us stop these child groomers now.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgqphdm0b5mnv4k6nurvlujit3jnsmq53a2icnb0_rp22sh2s8i66or0sli60o33chh2bs) After all this, Jessica did what any good mother would do and questioned the principal about what was happening to her young daughter at school... ... And what happened next? Child Protective Services was called to her house and “interviewed” her children! This grooming is happening behind closed doors in classrooms across the country... And it’s happening in secret so parents, grandparents andthe community don’t know what’s going on. Jessica’s innocent daughter is just one of the countless victims -- and if we don’t act, there will be more and more every day... Since we announced our lawsuit **The Ingraham Angle** , tons of concerned parents, grandparents and teachers have reached out to us. It’s horrible and sickening that this is happening, but we have to stop it... And our lawsuit is the key. Political pressure and new laws will not work -- we must drag these radical activists and schools into court and make them pay. That’s why our lawsuit names the individual “teachers” -- we must hold **them** accountable... Only when these extremists are scared of being dragged into court and are forced to pay will they stop. Make no mistake -- if we win this landmark case every single one of these so-called teachers will take notice. They will think of the consequences before pushing their radical agenda on our vulnerable children... [**So please, join me today with a donation of $35 or more to fund our lawsuit to protect our kids from out of control leftist teachers.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3d60cm09fbsiuibe1ptgjgkbmoj7ceq28gmi3k8_rp22sh2s8i66or0sli60o33chh2bs) But to stop them, we need to win this case... And if you can give more today – $50, $100, $250 or more – I will use it to protect our children and our constitutional rights from these radical Left extremists. But, whatever amount you can send, I ask that you rush it in right away. And please know that here at the Center for American Liberty we don’t just file lawsuits – we **WIN** them!! We recently won three major victories for religious liberty before the U.S. Supreme Court and we’re fighting Big Tech and the politicians who are conspiring to silence and destroy conservatives... But this case to stop these extremists from corrupting and damaging our innocent children is too important to lose. And the only way to stop them is to make them know we’re going to make them pay for their actions... [**So please, join the fight today****with your emergency tax-deductible donation of $20, $35, $50, $100 or more today.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjbv9lvr6mt0dht6hr26kglnm5irbl9jn7qta5u8_rp22sh2s8i66or0sli60o33chh2bs) We’re ready to go to the mat to win this case, but we can’t do it without you. Thank you in advance for your support. Sincerely,
---
| |
---
Harmeet K. Dhillon

And thankfully, the government can't print precious metals out of thin air. **The Great Awakening is Here...** We just need to _trust the plan._ Because it turns out that Grandpa had more wisdom than we realized. To the Subscribers of Trump Train News,

Many of our readers have expressed interest in the services offered by Gundry MD. We hope you benefit from the following message:
---
We’ve been told our whole lives to eat certain fruits, vegetables, and whole grains to stay in good health.[View this message in your browser](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfskdv05vq931tla0no8h1oojlc2n8c362pqbnqg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t56egn4tblm1on4t1kmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf1djiesrmcorn6dincsj4e1rm1or763hr6dtjm5p70tjietj7ecdmeqr34s3ic3jt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coojed9k61r62phmcapm2ptgmlin48d245p25oh4cdhm1pb4chgecoj24no) We've been told our whole lives to eat certain fruits, vegetables, and whole grains to stay in good health. However, according to Dr. Steven Gundry — a world-renowned heart surgeon — many so called **" health foods" in the American diet contain a dangerous toxin, that could be expanding your waistline.** **" This toxin causes micro-tears to form in your fragile intestinal-wall — allowing bacteria and waste products to seep into your body."** Says Dr. Gundry. This harmful condition is best known as "leaky gut," and it's affecting millions of people nationwide. **Warning signs include weight gain, fatigue, digestive discomfort, stiff, achy joints, and even skin problems.** Dr. Gundry explains, "**These side effects are often mistaken for normal signs of aging, because leaky gut usually develops over a matter of years, and sometimes even decades. But I can assure you, the damage caused by these so called "health foods" is far from normal."** The good news is, this problem can be **easily fixed from your own home.** "It's very simple, you just have to know which foods are actually healthy, and which contain this hidden toxin," he goes on to explain. By simply eliminating this harmful toxin, Dr. Gundry has seen thousands of his own patients make swift recoveries. (In fact, he even lost 70lbs himself!) Now, after years of research, Dr. Gundry has decided to release an informative video to the public — free and uninterrupted — showcasing exactly which foods you need to avoid. "Good health is one of life's toughest obstacles," he explains. "So, if this video can help people achieve that, I'll be thrilled to hear I was of help." The video has since gone viral, first being shared by users on Facebook, then being featured on news sites like ABC and CBS. So far, the comments and feedback have been outstanding, with thousands of Americans feeling better than they have in decades. [**Click here to watch the presentation:**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zr0dm3m386jggnqkvdiqcu6i1lhi07n07s6iukn8_rp22sh2s8i66or0sli68o76c9h2bs) [

Most notable of which include legendary self-help guru Tony Robbins, Oscar award winning actor Alan Arkin, Grammy award winning singer Usher, and countless fortune 500 executives. Now, there is one thing Dr. Gundry asks from his viewers: "If watching this helps you take control of your weight back, fight unwanted cravings, increase your energy, ease gas and bloating, or find relief from stiff, achy joints," Dr. Gundry says... "Then please share this video with your friends and loved ones. Together, we can help as many people avoid these health issues as possible." name: American Briefing
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our presi
This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zen44k9h0f76bid2eoqfkjcmnel0baul9pok70jo_rp22sh2s8i66or0sli6aob2c5h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zjqskc377507qp8om8h8i6hnt31s1ef8mi8882p8_rp22sh2s8i66or0sli6aob2c5h2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zaiabeh0cuu7ai5t40dhf3gipjmn4p817vdr90jg_rp22sh2s8i66or0sli6aob2c5h2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Briefing, [please use this preferences page](http://e.americanbriefing.com/prefs/9z2zsbb0mn6bn5tmidkse31siv2e780u0urmerjv1n8).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zf9ncvu6ths1l99dshhj7qqhd2ar3gsr61p96qf8_rp22sh2s8i66or0sli6aob2c5h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Your America
subject: How To Entirely Empty Your Bowels Every Morning - Top Surgeon Explains How
body:
To the Subscribers of Your America News,

Many of our readers have expressed interest in the services offered by Gundry MD. We hope you benefit from the following message:
---
We’ve been told our whole lives to eat certain fruits, vegetables, and whole grains to stay in good health. However, according to Dr. Steven Gundry -- a world-renowned heart surgeon -- many so called **“health foods” in the American diet contain a dangerous toxin, that could be expanding your waistline.** **“This toxin causes micro-tears to form in your fragile intestinal-wall -- allowing bacteria and waste products to seep into your body.”** Says Dr. Gundry. This harmful condition is best known as “leaky gut,” and it’s affecting millions of people nationwide. **Warning signs include weight gain, fatigue, digestive discomfort, stiff, achy joints, and even skin problems.** Dr. Gundry explains, “**These side effects are often mistaken for normal signs of aging, because leaky gut usually develops over a matter of years, and sometimes even decades. But I can assure you, the damage caused by these so called “health foods” is far from normal.”** The good news is, this problem can be **easily fixed from your own home.** “It’s very simple, you just have to know which foods are actually healthy, and which contain this hidden toxin,” he goes on to explain. By simply eliminating this harmful toxin, Dr. Gundry has seen thousands of his own patients make swift recoveries. (In fact, he even lost 70lbs himself!) Now, after years of research, Dr. Gundry has decided to release an informative video to the public -- free and uninterrupted -- showcasing exactly which foods you need to avoid. “Good health is one of life’s toughest obstacles,” he explains. “So, if this video can help people achieve that, I’ll be thrilled to hear I was of help.” The video has since gone viral, first being shared by users on Facebook, then being featured on news sites like ABC and CBS. So far, the comments and feedback have been outstanding, with thousands of Americans feeling better than they have in decades. [ **Click here to watch the presentation:** ](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c82259%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yz6sq8cDev2itmCyi7KlJA&sysid=1) [
](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c82250%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=whSlLee%2bboBmd6TH2qP5Cw&sysid=1)[**Watch The Video** ](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c82251%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UrFvCVuO9DoVcBwQUhz1Sg&sysid=1) Dr. Gundry also serves as the personal physician to many A-list celebrities. Most notable of which include legendary self-help guru Tony Robbins, Oscar award winning actor Alan Arkin, Grammy award winning singer Usher, and countless fortune 500 executives. Now, there is one thing Dr. Gundry asks from his viewers: “If watching this helps you take control of your weight back, fight unwanted cravings, increase your energy, ease gas and bloating, or find relief from stiff, achy joints,” Dr. Gundry says... “Then please share this video with your friends and loved ones. Together, we can help as many people avoid these health issues as possible.” [**Click here to watch the presentation**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c82252%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=y%2biyM2tqFJ4E2aUurLXHlA&sysid=1)

name: American Update
subject: How To Entirely Empty Your Bowels Every Morning - Top Surgeon Explains How
body:
To the Subscribers of American Update,

Many of our readers have expressed interest in the services offered by Gundry MD. We hope you benefit from the following message:
---
We’ve been told our whole lives to eat certain fruits, vegetables, and whole grains to stay in good health. However, according to Dr. Steven Gundry -- a world-renowned heart surgeon -- many so called **“health foods” in the American diet contain a dangerous toxin, that could be expanding your waistline.** **“This toxin causes micro-tears to form in your fragile intestinal-wall -- allowing bacteria and waste products to seep into your body.”** Says Dr. Gundry. This harmful condition is best known as “leaky gut,” and it’s affecting millions of people nationwide. **Warning signs include weight gain, fatigue, digestive discomfort, stiff, achy joints, and even skin problems.** Dr. Gundry explains, “**These side effects are often mistaken for normal signs of aging, because leaky gut usually develops over a matter of years, and sometimes even decades. But I can assure you, the damage caused by these so called “health foods” is far from normal.”** The good news is, this problem can be **easily fixed from your own home.** “It’s very simple, you just have to know which foods are actually healthy, and which contain this hidden toxin,” he goes on to explain. By simply eliminating this harmful toxin, Dr. Gundry has seen thousands of his own patients make swift recoveries. (In fact, he even lost 70lbs himself!) Now, after years of research, Dr. Gundry has decided to release an informative video to the public -- free and uninterrupted -- showcasing exactly which foods you need to avoid. “Good health is one of life’s toughest obstacles,” he explains. “So, if this video can help people achieve that, I’ll be thrilled to hear I was of help.” The video has since gone viral, first being shared by users on Facebook, then being featured on news sites like ABC and CBS. So far, the comments and feedback have been outstanding, with thousands of Americans feeling better than they have in decades. [ **Click here to watch the presentation:** ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40641%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QMc05pZiKdcH9mq3we9z0g&sysid=1) [
](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40642%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TkbspPtKJwE2PmrQh0WA9w&sysid=1)[**Watch The Video** ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40643%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QEYmyQixGz0lT6l%2bec4V6A&sysid=1) Dr. Gundry also serves as the personal physician to many A-list celebrities. Most notable of which include legendary self-help guru Tony Robbins, Oscar award winning actor Alan Arkin, Grammy award winning singer Usher, and countless fortune 500 executives. Now, there is one thing Dr. Gundry asks from his viewers: “If watching this helps you take control of your weight back, fight unwanted cravings, increase your energy, ease gas and bloating, or find relief from stiff, achy joints,” Dr. Gundry says... “Then please share this video with your friends and loved ones. Together, we can help as many people avoid these health issues as possible.” [**Click here to watch the presentation**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40644%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kJ7kBrhP%2b3a6tzuvWvkj3w&sysid=1)
---

_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_ _[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0014%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=Lh0sVGMA84bwOb4Q8xNBQg&sysid=1)_

---
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0014%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=Lh0sVGMA84bwOb4Q8xNBQg&sysid=1)

Yes, it's happening again, Peter.

We have another runoff election in Georgia on our hands, and AFP Action has boots on the ground to mobilize voters one more time for this critical Senate race!

Let me be clear: Georgians have two VERY different options...

❌ Re-elect Raphael Warnock - He promised to support working families, but instead went to Washington and voted to for reckless spending and bills that led to record-high inflation, tax increases, and government overreach.

OR

✅ Elect Herschel Walker - He's a political outsider who will defend the Constitution, protect our fundamental freedoms, and tackle inflation head-on by reining in government spending.
**[**HELP ELECT HERSCHEL WALKER >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61872803:JqWlorGN7:m:1:3331421248:67297D556C5FC961292A081949E2D3B6:r)**
Peter, I won't lie to you, it's going to be a tough battle. Runoffs are all about turnout, and Walker and Warnock are neck and neck. Every vote and every dollar will make a difference, and we only have 20 days to reach our goal of knocking 600,000 doors for Herschel Walker. So I'm urgently asking:
[**Will you stand with us and help get Herschel Walker elected?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61872803:JqWlorGN7:m:1:3331421248:67297D556C5FC961292A081949E2D3B6:r)

name: ICYMI News
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our presi
This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zb380rc9r00djavhqjst0lf9jlrlhdfcddibu74g_rp22sh2s8i66or0sli6eoj6c9h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zm8ek65nhpgc6r186pqn6ns1l9ulgclm0ooi7j90_rp22sh2s8i66or0sli6eoj6c9h2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zkpgb9m50350kt38osmnuiid0fe45caglq40gdk0_rp22sh2s8i66or0sli6eoj6c9h2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
