name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: The REAL history of America
body:
Are you worried about what kids are learning in school today? I know I am.
[View this message in your browser](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zq0ftsaqr61mp8ntq8e0q323toglntv2rnrtj22g_rp22sh2s8i66or0sli69o36chh238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuij78bielqr0sbiegqb7ctl6tr779hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onieppb2crj63h3cojkelg6ao9kc6rm2t9mm5h31d71mdrr2pjlmgrb4c32e8oneduie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdjr4s36e6qb6p77mphmcc5gm9j61o5lcdge1d9h66qj3dbi4no)
|
---
| | Hello, Are you worried about what kids are learning in school today? I know I am.

That's why I wanted to do something about it by creating the Little Patriots Program.

The Little Patriots Program provides a curriculum for grades K-5 that teaches the REAL history of America.

We provide this curriculum **free of charge** for parents, grandparents, guardians, homeschoolers, and teachers.

We are also working with conservative Hollywood producers to create a tremendous cartoon series called "Star Spangled Adventures" that helps explain each lesson in a fun and entertaining way.

We have big plans for more lessons and more cartoons, but we need your help to keep them free for those who need them.

That's why I am emailing you today.

I have written a brand-new children's book, [_**Red, White, and Blue: Our Flag Matters to Me and You**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1k1r5g9omdnr2rl2n992iji0sgeqicm9j1nmi4o_rp22sh2s8i66or0sli69o36chh2bs), to teach kids why we stand for our American flag and the freedoms it represents. [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zk0pjodvcge1pn6jde43rikbiqr39hs9r1c7ehq8_rp22sh2s8i66or0sli69o36chh2bs)
__
I wanted to send it to you for a gift of $25 or more.

All the proceeds from the book will go directly back to supporting our Little Patriots Program so we can keep making curricula and cartoons that show the history of America.

This is the easiest way to help us make sure we are giving our children the best possible resources.

Your gift of $25 or more today will help us reach more children and you'll also receive a copy of [_**Red, White, and Blue: Our Flag Matters to Me and You**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z28dv66uu9i75p699u8odtfid1esq6dqbmm91gig_rp22sh2s8i66or0sli69o36chh2bs) with my compliments.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman, American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---

clean_body: Are you worried about what kids are learning in school today? I know I am. | | | Hello, Are you worried about what kids are learning in school today? I know I am. That's why I wanted to do something about it by creating the Little Patriots Program. The Little Patriots Program provides a curriculum for grades K-5 that teaches the REAL history of America. We provide this curriculum free of charge for parents, grandparents, guardians, homeschoolers, and teachers. We are also working with conservative Hollywood producers to create a tremendous cartoon series called "Star Spangled Adventures" that helps explain each lesson in a fun and entertaining way. We have big plans for more lessons and more cartoons, but we need your help to keep them free for those who need them. That's why I am emailing you today. I have written a brand-new children's book, , to teach kids why we stand for our American flag and the freedoms it represents. I wanted to send it to you for a gift of $25 or more. All the proceeds from the book will go directly back to supporting our Little Patriots Program so we can keep making curricula and cartoons that show the history of America. This is the easiest way to help us make sure we are giving our children the best possible resources. Your gift of $25 or more today will help us reach more children and you'll also receive a copy of with my compliments. Sincerely, Dr. Ben Carson Founder and Chairman, American Cornerstone Institute | | Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens. | | Copyright © 2022 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved. ---
Peter,

**The Federal Election Commission has one final financial deadline before the runoff: 11:59 p.m. on Wednesday. We have LESS THAN 48 HOURS to raise every dollar we can.**

**[Please don't let me come up short, Peter.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874343:6B_dGrGcN:m:1:3374627611:7615DC642D777110FD7274A38605FC3D:r)**

This is the financial report that Democrats will be following closely to see if we've been able to build momentum since the runoff was declared.

I am counting on you to help show the Left that conservatives will not give up the fight against the Democrats' policies that are destroying our country. **[Please, chip in whatever you can today to help me CLOSE THE GAP before the filing deadline tomorrow at midnight.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874343:6B_dGrGcN:m:1:3374627611:7615DC642D777110FD7274A38605FC3D:r)**

[** RUSH $25 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874344:6B_dGrGcN:m:1:3374627611:7615DC642D777110FD7274A38605FC3D:r)
[** RUSH $50 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874345:6B_dGrGcN:m:1:3374627611:7615DC642D777110FD7274A38605FC3D:r)

[** RUSH $100 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874347:6B_dGrGcN:m:1:3374627611:7615DC642D777110FD7274A38605FC3D:r)
I know how to win, and I'm ready to win this battle for conservatives all over the country. However, I can't hold Senator Raphael Warnock accountable for his disastrous voting record without the help of patriots far and wide.

Senator Warnock has outraised us every single filing deadline, but with your help, we can put up some of our biggest numbers since the race began.

The deadline is TOMORROW. **[So, if you can chip in $25, $50, or maybe even $75 or $100, you'd be doing a great service to our nation and putting us one step closer to introducing Joe Biden and the Radical Left to the concept of checks and balances.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874343:6B_dGrGcN:m:1:3374627611:7615DC642D777110FD7274A38605FC3D:r)**

Thank you for continuing this fight with me. Your support is greatly appreciated.

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874343:6B_dGrGcN:m:1:3374627611:7615DC642D777110FD7274A38605FC3D:r)

Herschel Walker

P.S. Federal law prohibits us from extending this runoff fundraising deadline, **[so please help us hit our goal before midnight tomorrow!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874343:6B_dGrGcN:m:1:3374627611:7615DC642D777110FD7274A38605FC3D:r)**

name: Tom Brejcha
subject: Eleven felonies for defending life
body:
Will you rush me your emergency donation to the HOUCK FAMILY LEGAL DEFENSE FUND immediately? [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0025%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=X6Flx%2b9FxlCfmBO0oZk6iA&sysid=1)
| | | Dear Pro-Life Friend, [**Will you rush me your emergency donation to the HOUCK FAMILY LEGAL DEFENSE FUND immediately?**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40756%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=F0Crkd%2bRDe2pk%2bJ6CLuiGA&sysid=1) On September 23, two dozen heavily-armed FBI agents...in tactical gear...guns drawn...raided the home of pro-life author, speaker, and sidewalk counselor Mark Houck...and, in front of his wife and seven children, handcuffed him and hauled him off to jail. Over what? Over a case so flimsy the District Court of Philadelphia already **_had thrown it out_.** Over an incident in which Mark was defending his 12-year-old son when an abortion clinic “escort” verbally abused and repeatedly violated his personal space. _And despite the fact that Mark offered to appear voluntarily (an important detail which I’ll come back to in a minute)._ Make no mistake, _this is_ the political weaponization of the FBI. Make no mistake, _this is_ retaliation for the overturning of Roe v. Wade (sidewalk counselors, crisis pregnancy centers, and even churches are now targets of the radical pro-abortion movement). And make no mistake, _this is_ an assault on all pro-life Americans. [**So, I hope I can count on your donation of $35 or more to the HOUCK FAMILY LEGAL DEFENSE FUND to help us give Mark the best defense possible.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40757%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SYZG1VTJ7JS%2f6J8A%2ffFqaw&sysid=1) Now, I’ll cut right to the chase. Mark is being charged under the Freedom of Access to Clinic Entrances (FACE) Act - a law that dates back to Bill Clinton’s pro-abortion presidency. If convicted, he faces **11 years** in prison and up to **$350,000 in fines**. Immediately upon hearing of the early morning raid and arrest, the Thomas More Society swung into action. Peter Breen (our vice president and general counsel) flew to Philadelphia for Mark’s arraignment. Needless to say, Mark pled “NOT GUILTY!” to these sham charges. But the reality is this will be a long and expensive fight. **That’s why I’m asking for your best gift of $35 or more to the HOUCK FAMILY** **LEGAL DEFENSE FUND.** Mark is beloved by his family, friends, neighbors, and in the Philadelphia pro-life community. And I know your support means the world to Mark and his wife (Ryan-Marie). Now, imagine the terror and shock in the innocent faces of his young children as 25 armed federal agents descended on their home, threatened to break down the door, and then swarmed in with guns drawn and barrels pointed throughout the home. That’s why I told you I would come back to the important detail that Mark offered to appear voluntarily to the FBI. His offer was rejected. Why? **Precisely because Joe Biden and his radically pro-abortion administration are intent on inflicting as much suffering on Mark and his family (and intimidating pro-lifers in Philadelphia and across the nation) as they possibly can.** “ _We can get to you. We can get to your family._ ” That’s their message. That’s the “street justice” they’re looking to inflict. And it’s that threat that we have to fight with our defense of Mark. It won’t be easy. And it won’t be cheap. [**But nothing could be more important. So your $35 or more tax-deductible gift to the HOUCK FAMILY LEGAL DEFENSE FUND is vitally important.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40758%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SdsuRQHN3YVwR%2f%2fZDY2qfw&sysid=1) The Thomas More Society knows what it takes to fight and win this kind of fight against the abortion industry and against its allies in government. From the moment Kamala Harris weaponized the California attorney general’s office against David Daleiden (when he exposed the harvesting and sale of aborted baby body parts), the Thomas More Society spearheaded his defense. And we are proud to have defended many renowned pro-life and religious leaders like Joe, Ann, and Eric Scheidler, the Pro-Life Action League, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, David Bereit, Lila Rose and Live Action, Students for Life, Sidewalk Advocates for Life, Created Equal, the March for Life, Abby Johnson and many more. Because when dark forces of the abortion movement unleash their full might to legally, financially, and personally destroy our clients --- **_we fight back_**. So, if you are able to give more - say as much as $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000 or more - it would go a long way in helping us clear Mark of these charges. I know I don’t have to tell you that if the long tentacles of the abortion industry can reach into the halls of the FBI and the Department of Justice and if pro-abortion politicians can rip the blindfold of impartiality from “Lady Justice” then the weaponization and the attacks won’t stop, _they’ll multiply._ So please hurry. [**Stand with Mark**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40759%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Qb3%2b7elgUX%2bFwMmmYDiutA&sysid=1), before it’s too late. For Life,
---
---
Tom Brejcha President & Chief Counsel
---
[**DONATE**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40750%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jdaM71lz26qd8BnpUQRj9w&sysid=1)
---
P.S. There’s one more thing you should know about Mark Houck. He drove two hours every week to stand outside of abortion clinics for _six to eight hours at a time_ , praying the Rosary and offering support to women who are so desperate they think they have no alternative than to abort their babies, often bringing his twelve-year-old son. Make no mistake, that’s why he was targeted. He doesn’t just share our pro-life convictions... he fearlessly lives them out. That’s why you and I must stand with him today and win this legal battle (the implications of which will be felt nationwide). [**Can I count on your emergency, tax-deductible donation to the HOUCK FAMILY LEGAL DEFENSE FUND so we can stand with Mark together?**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40751%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NdETu8ye8i%2b6%2byJux9WdZQ&sysid=1)
---
| | |
---
[Please consider supporting our efforts with a generous, tax-deductible donation.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40752%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Lj5IehxED5shJu6K8LxliQ&sysid=1) (C) Thomas More Society | [www.thomasmoresociety.org](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40753%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kTiDCvwhXIbMkBhEOeCxKQ&sysid=1)
309 W. Washington Street Suite 1250, Chicago, IL 60606 [privacy policy](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40754%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JZkvKTJTmmUtejp98%2bRQNw&sysid=1)
---
---

_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0025%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=X6Flx%2b9FxlCfmBO0oZk6iA&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0025%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=X6Flx%2b9FxlCfmBO0oZk6iA&sysid=1)

| _**RUNOFF ELECTION TRIGGERED**_
**Election Day: Dec 6th**

**Herschel Walker needs your support to win the final race of 2022!**
---

I know I've asked a lot from you, Peter. But the 2022 election just went into overtime, and a repeat defeat simply isn't an option.

We wanted to win this race outright. But we battled back from a double-digit deficit this summer and forced a runoff in Georgia. That's all thanks to you.

This has been a long and grueling campaign. I can't thank you enough for sticking it out to the end. But I'm asking you to dig deep one last time and help Herschel Walker stay in this fight.

Herschel's cash reserves are depleted, and liberal mega-donors are preparing to funnel **MILLIONS** into Raphael Warnock's campaign fund.

**_[The only way to fight back and win this race is with your help. clean_body: Win the last race of 2022 | | | | | | | RUNOFF ELECTION TRIGGERED Election Day: Dec 6th Herschel Walker needs your support to win the final race of 2022! I know I've asked a lot from you, Peter. But the 2022 election just went into overtime, and a repeat defeat simply isn't an option. We wanted to win this race outright. But we battled back from a double-digit deficit this summer and forced a runoff in Georgia. That's all thanks to you. | | | This has been a long and grueling campaign. I can't thank you enough for sticking it out to the end. But I'm asking you to dig deep one last time and help Herschel Walker stay in this fight. Herschel's cash reserves are depleted, and liberal mega-donors are preparing to funnel MILLIONS into Raphael Warnock's campaign fund. "The only way to fight back and win this race is with your help. subject: Just five bucks
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61871647:6Ea5GrGN5:m:1:3350876382:35D3AD0A0B65039CD894FAC663DD107F:r)

Peter,

Raphael Warnock's runoff win last year is why Democrats control the Senate today.

Senator Warnock has voted for Joe Biden's disastrous agenda 96% of the time, so he is to blame for our country going in the wrong direction. We can hold him accountable, win this race and get our country back on track, _**[but we can only win if we have your help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61871647:6Ea5GrGN5:m:1:3350876382:35D3AD0A0B65039CD894FAC663DD107F:r)**_

_If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[**CHIP IN $25 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61871648:6Ea5GrGN5:m:1:3350876382:35D3AD0A0B65039CD894FAC663DD107F:r)
All eyes are on Georgia. If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51-seat majority where the most radical proposals will succeed. We cannot let that happen, Peter.

Senator Warnock and Democrat Super PACs have launched an advertising blitz that is flooding the airwaves. We already had over $70 million in false attack ads run against us in the general election, and now they're running even more in the runoff!

**[That's why I am asking for your help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61871647:6Ea5GrGN5:m:1:3350876382:35D3AD0A0B65039CD894FAC663DD107F:r)**

_If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[**CHIP IN $25 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61871648:6Ea5GrGN5:m:1:3350876382:35D3AD0A0B65039CD894FAC663DD107F:r)
The Georgia runoff will be the last fight of 2022, so WE MUST WIN IT! We can flip a Democrat seat in the Senate, but I need your help. I know money is tight in this Biden-Warnock economy, **[but if you can chip in even $25 right now- it will help us reach out to undecided voters, implement our 'get-out-the-vote' program, and win on December 6th!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61871647:6Ea5GrGN5:m:1:3350876382:35D3AD0A0B65039CD894FAC663DD107F:r)**

Every single dollar impacts how many more doors we can knock on, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach. **[Please pitch in anything you're able ASAP, even if it's just $25.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61871647:6Ea5GrGN5:m:1:3350876382:35D3AD0A0B65039CD894FAC663DD107F:r)**

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61871647:6Ea5GrGN5:m:1:3350876382:35D3AD0A0B65039CD894FAC663DD107F:r)
Herschel Walker

[** DONATE TODAY ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61871647:6Ea5GrGN5:m:1:3350876382:35D3AD0A0B65039CD894FAC663DD107F:r)

Senator Warnock has outraised us every single filing deadline, but with your help, we can put up some of our biggest numbers since the race began.

The deadline is TOMORROW. **[So, if you can chip in $25, $50, or maybe even $75 or $100, you'd be doing a great service to our nation and putting us one step closer to introducing Joe Biden and the Radical Left to the concept of checks and balances.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874380:6a_W-rGNe:m:1:3374012347:1B8499F27720CC829732DFC614FD08B6:r)**

| _**RUNOFF ELECTION TRIGGERED**_
**Election Day: Dec 6th**

**Herschel Walker needs your support to win the final race of 2022!**
---

I know I've asked a lot from you, Peter. But the 2022 election just went into overtime, and a repeat defeat simply isn't an option.

We wanted to win this race outright. But we battled back from a double-digit deficit this summer and forced a runoff in Georgia. That's all thanks to you.
---

---
This has been a long and grueling campaign. I can't thank you enough for sticking it out to the end. But I'm asking you to dig deep one last time and help Herschel Walker stay in this fight.

Herschel's cash reserves are depleted, and liberal mega-donors are preparing to funnel **MILLIONS** into Raphael Warnock's campaign fund.

**_[The only way to fight back and win this race is with your help. ---
Democrats are gearing up for the fight of their lives in a desperate attempt to keep Georgia blue.

**_[Can we count on you to make an emergency contribution to the runoff action fund and help us win the final race of 2022?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61872799:JasjKrG5N:m:1:3350876382:2AE41F5490039463104279784518FD00:r "Can we count on you

Nikki Haley

---
Peter,

**The Federal Election Commission has one final financial deadline before the runoff: 11:59 p.m. on Wednesday. We have LESS THAN 48 HOURS to raise every dollar we can.**

**[Please don't let me come up short, Peter.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874655:6rTfKrGXN:m:1:3368395361:3BD34C1503B63CC131EBC3E5D8C20408:r)**

This is the financial report that Democrats will be following closely to see if we've been able to build momentum since the runoff was declared.

I am counting on you to help show the Left that conservatives will not give up the fight against the Democrats' policies that are destroying our country. **[Please, chip in whatever you can today to help me CLOSE THE GAP before the filing deadline tomorrow at midnight.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874655:6rTfKrGXN:m:1:3368395361:3BD34C1503B63CC131EBC3E5D8C20408:r)**

[** RUSH $25 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874656:6rTfKrGXN:m:1:3368395361:3BD34C1503B63CC131EBC3E5D8C20408:r)
[** RUSH $50 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874657:6rTfKrGXN:m:1:3368395361:3BD34C1503B63CC131EBC3E5D8C20408:r)
[** RUSH $75 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874658:6rTfKrGXN:m:1:3368395361:3BD34C1503B63CC131EBC3E5D8C20408:r)
[** RUSH $100 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874659:6rTfKrGXN:m:1:3368395361:3BD34C1503B63CC131EBC3E5D8C20408:r)
I know how to win, and I'm ready to win this battle for conservatives all over the country. However, I can't hold Senator Raphael Warnock accountable for his disastrous voting record without the help of patriots far and wide.

Senator Warnock has outraised us every single filing deadline, but with your help, we can put up some of our biggest numbers since the race began.

The deadline is TOMORROW. **[So, if you can chip in $25, $50, or maybe even $75 or $100, you'd be doing a great service to our nation and putting us one step closer to introducing Joe Biden and the Radical Left to the concept of checks and balances.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874655:6rTfKrGXN:m:1:3368395361:3BD34C1503B63CC131EBC3E5D8C20408:r)**

Thank you for continuing this fight with me. Your support is greatly appreciated.

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874655:6rTfKrGXN:m:1:3368395361:3BD34C1503B63CC131EBC3E5D8C20408:r)

Herschel Walker

P.S. Federal law prohibits us from extending this runoff fundraising deadline, **[so please help us hit our goal before midnight tomorrow!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874655:6rTfKrGXN:m:1:3368395361:3BD34C1503B63CC131EBC3E5D8C20408:r)**

[** Donate Today -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874655:6rTfKrGXN:m:1:3368395361:3BD34C1503B63CC131EBC3E5D8C20408:r)

Peter,

Raphael Warnock's runoff win last year is why Democrats control the Senate today.

Senator Warnock has voted for Joe Biden's disastrous agenda 96% of the time, so he is to blame for our country going in the wrong direction. We can hold him accountable, win this race and get our country back on track, _**[but we can only win if we have your help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61871847:6HGtKrGNY:m:1:3370555685:789096469585E7D7466546DC060FB1EC:r)**_

All eyes are on Georgia. If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51-seat majority where the most radical proposals will succeed. We cannot let that happen, Peter.

Senator Warnock and Democrat Super PACs have launched an advertising blitz that is flooding the airwaves. We already had over $70 million in false attack ads run against us in the general election, and now they're running even more in the runoff!

The Georgia runoff will be the last fight of 2022, so WE MUST WIN IT! We can flip a Democrat seat in the Senate, but I need your help. I know money is tight in this Biden-Warnock economy, **[but if you can chip in even $25 right now- it will help us reach out to undecided voters, implement our 'get-out-the-vote' program, and win on December 6th!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61871847:6HGtKrGNY:m:1:3370555685:789096469585E7D7466546DC060FB1EC:r)**

Every single dollar impacts how many more doors we can knock on, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach. **[Please pitch in anything you're able ASAP, even if it's just $25.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61871847:6HGtKrGNY:m:1:3370555685:789096469585E7D7466546DC060FB1EC:r)**

Thanks,

Herschel Walker

If you wish to no longer receive emails from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=5375%2E878179%2EBtF7eU).
---
**BREAKING: Jan. 6 committee votes to subpoena Trump**

**FIRST:** The January 6th Committee held their first public hearing to expose Donald Trump’s treasonous crimes on Jan. 6th, 2021.

**THEN:** The committee JUST voted to SUBPOENA Donald Trump for his crimes.. _AMAZING!!_

**NOW:** We need to send the Jan. 6th Committee a HUGE thank you note for their brave work.

[**We're sending a HUGE Thank You card to the January 6th Committee and we need your signature! We have 460 more spots open for Democrats in your state to sign – don’t wait, sign right now! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/34354?t=8&akid=5375%2E878179%2EBtF7eU) | [DONATE $5 RIGHT NOW AND SIGN THE THANK YOU LETTER »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/34354?t=9&akid=5375%2E878179%2EBtF7eU)
---
To: The January 6th Committee
From: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/34354?t=10&akid=5375%2E878179%2EBtF7eU) Dear January 6th Committee,

**Thank you** for exposing Donald Trump’s involvement in the January 6th attempted insurrection.

**Thank you** for doing what's right and voting unanimously to subpoena Donald Trump.

**Thank you** for spending countless hours combing over evidence to find the truth out that horrific day.

_**Today, you made me proud to be an American.**_

I’m so proud that we have leaders like YOU who are working to give the American people the truth about the attack on our Democracy.

**The bravery you’ve shown in standing up for what’s right will go down in history.**

Despite the attacks you’ve endured and the censorship you’ve received, you’ve never wavered.

**So thank you. Our country is better because of your leadership.** [**Today, I’m signing this letter and making a donation to VPP to keep electing leaders like you all.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/34354?t=11&akid=5375%2E878179%2EBtF7eU) | [DONATE $5 RIGHT NOW AND SIGN THE THANK YOU LETTER »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/34354?t=12&akid=5375%2E878179%2EBtF7eU)

Sincerely,

A Proud Democrat
| | Paid for by Voter Protection Project
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To ending partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=3&akid=5375%2E878179%2EBtF7eU). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=4&akid=5375%2E878179%2EBtF7eU).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=5&akid=5375%2E878179%2EBtF7eU) to request fewer emails. Every single dollar impacts how many more doors we can knock on, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach. **[Please pitch in anything you're able ASAP, even if it's just $25.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61871865:6PhodrGFN:m:1:3371220873:498DDD5013EA6CB659322A2B2457D51F:r)**

subject: A critical message
body:
There is an anti-life wave sweeping across the country that you need to know about.

| [ ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9345aa90261b4c2c9522a98eaa1c6e79&_e=HzFH_E92d0HMKJVqs8tQXp82h7JcRQtC9k1ycFMYy6P_P-g2oDXjcJ3Kist07rmQO2f1btal0BWgpQNm5cXzPXRM56HZZIPcfCxw_ZcHaVIAv_BEvLzxJGKcIoEGrEWxfhyYYgYWO6i4MjJM2bXwpIdlcl7XXKs4CC3_xaW0NeY6l-LYGY2fqczxDxRy-wd81272V26-rzUNPKdNdpdACIURPrju9LCVavGNvFFWlDrWk8m_wnUY59fP6U9TiOXjEARRDVANCmkl0yy5IWZaDf9TjkKXVYWwu0OvMpOpb1oxf2usd6qDsVqnHI6hQyz4gXr7_XednF60_bphAsTE3rvJHm39gVBIseBBd0N3JdyYBAxr5UErfNLN2ieldEd6) [ ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9345aa90261b4c2c9522a98eaa1c6e79&_e=HzFH_E92d0HMKJVqs8tQXp82h7JcRQtC9k1ycFMYy6P_P-g2oDXjcJ3Kist07rmQO2f1btal0BWgpQNm5cXzPXRM56HZZIPcfCxw_ZcHaVIAv_BEvLzxJGKcIoEGrEWxfhyYYgYWO6i4MjJM2bXwpIdlcl7XXKs4CC3_xaW0NeY6l-LYGY2fqczxDxRy-wd81272V26-rzUNPKdNdpdACIURPrju9LCVavGNvFFWlDrdPvOR1yOlQPfGJkxvZJ-kWy2bKqdFMX6FiM__dZqjp2o6PQ6LriTxuDvMTUtZrfAZLGXLEdwP0wsY2lUoTSFoLTw_LyFFG1r51xxNj3FZeRAOSA6ZgN0EADhKnkzGcRxlkR4EmN1Yk1ovIzw7fT1Z) [ ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9345aa90261b4c2c9522a98eaa1c6e79&_e=HzFH_E92d0HMKJVqs8tQXp82h7JcRQtC9k1ycFMYy6P_P-g2oDXjcJ3Kist07rmQO2f1btal0BWgpQNm5cXzPXRM56HZZIPcfCxw_ZcHaVIAv_BEvLzxJGKcIoEGrEWxfhyYYgYWO6i4MjJM2bXwpIdlcl7XXKs4CC3_xaW0NeY6l-LYGY2fqczxDxRy-wd81272V26-rzUNPKdNdpdACIURPrju9LCVavGNvFFWlDru-zncAJwCLBHkaPiQ65zC0TnzzptVFxDCLooHnsJTQvs5bzLOU_e241sPifi8XTDK6ocyPe2KFWK0LwZpH-GdwhrrWTYdaG5tcbVFcd6ibgb8NTQMcXBkA-sswyNSn9xxLySR51uO1PXyKXfpNx84)

#
Friend of life,

There is an anti-life wave sweeping across the country that you need to know about.

Recently, California and Vermont voters approved a constitutional amendment to make abortion legal through birth, guaranteeing the ability to kill preborn children at any time during pregnancy and potentially even after birth, for any reason.

In Michigan, voters passed Proposal 3, which repealed the state’s long-standing protection for human life that banned abortion.

In the pro-life and deeply Republican state of Kentucky, voters rejected a pro-life constitutional amendment that clarified that there was no right to abortion in the state Constitution, paving the way for activist judges in the state to reject their recent pro-life laws as “unconstitutional.”

This is sickening and tragic. We need your help: **[https://give.liveaction.org/fight-just-begun/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9345aa90261b4c2c9522a98eaa1c6e79&_e=HzFH_E92d0HMKJVqs8tQXp82h7JcRQtC9k1ycFMYy6P_P-g2oDXjcJ3Kist07rmQO2f1btal0BWgpQNm5cXzPXRM56HZZIPcfCxw_ZcHaVIAv_BEvLzxJGKcIoEGrEWxfhyYYgYWO6i4MjJM2bXwpIdlcl7XXKs4CC3_xaW0NeY6l-LYGY2fqczxDxRy-wd81272V26-rzUNPKdNdpdACIURPrju9LCVavGNvFFWlDrVQ4cdTwGVSHUf-zCchiiLHTIc3RnPnBRr9d_3D8-R85fSswn2jcDYV5VOP2pnCMrQR1OBvM-udOLKrnBTyGJMj5wjmHD1jysCuxUzUIgpLlTqIcYQwB_PWdfK6FOqGVOF6UTvzEDap9ajawQvs-Wt)**

Even pro-life states are now worse in a post-Roe v. Wade America than a pre-Roe v. Wade America.

We are seeing that many pro-life citizens are buying the lies of Big Abortion, unsure if they can stand 100% for life in the aftermath of Roe v. Wade. We must reach them before it’s too late.

Your chance to stop this pro-death agenda is quickly disappearing. If we don’t get the truth out to every American, we could lose all the progress we’ve made in this fight. Would you please pitch in right now? Every penny helps: **[https://give.liveaction.org/fight-just-begun/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9345aa90261b4c2c9522a98eaa1c6e79&_e=HzFH_E92d0HMKJVqs8tQXp82h7JcRQtC9k1ycFMYy6P_P-g2oDXjcJ3Kist07rmQO2f1btal0BWgpQNm5cXzPXRM56HZZIPcfCxw_ZcHaVIAv_BEvLzxJGKcIoEGrEWxfhyYYgYWO6i4MjJM2bXwpIdlcl7XXKs4CC3_xaW0NeY6l-LYGY2fqczxDxRy-wd81272V26-rzUNPKdNdpdACIURPrju9LCVavGNvFFWlDoMyVsX_HdXs1iq0jL5ht9rZ1OlkqUT7wUWHGBJh2d4eXKtWassLyd4EtIfw7RuYX1GLlf8jbnc6ZSLJWSg_JYXh9pbDEwpDu_191wB_gPh9U5PiUJ-ngaJZ2TLFmTBSWKOdZ8PA65ksutGGtD84GZK)**

Contrary to popular belief, the overturn of Roe v. Wade did not end abortion. In pro-abortion states and now even in pro-life states, it has had the effect of expanding abortion.

We must fight back.

Now is the time to increase our efforts and push back against the pro-death agenda of the abortion lobby. No one reaches more people online with the truth about abortion than Live Action. We are the organization with the proven track record to confront this head-on and win. But only if we have your support right now: **[https://give.liveaction.org/fight-just-begun/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9345aa90261b4c2c9522a98eaa1c6e79&_e=HzFH_E92d0HMKJVqs8tQXp82h7JcRQtC9k1ycFMYy6P_P-g2oDXjcJ3Kist07rmQO2f1btal0BWgpQNm5cXzPXRM56HZZIPcfCxw_ZcHaVIAv_BEvLzxJGKcIoEGrEWxfhyYYgYWO6i4MjJM2bXwpIdlcl7XXKs4CC3_xaW0NeY6l-LYGY2fqczxDxRy-wd81272V26-rzUNPKdNdpdACIURPrju9LCVavGNvFFWlDozQ4AMKt9nWt6N76lZrdZrfDaIK9yLdBbxuEOIn8NS3lPVTDK8UHkPdwqkMle__RMcKuXzQnG7zLxHSWQhxdaFNNcScDDm_nzJxTRqq6SGa2K9nvm4sZ_d3NRHPNIkLbqpVxMM5RRoGAHx0--p-653)**

We are up against a billion-dollar industry with the financial backing and support of the elites, the media, Hollywood, and higher education.

The recent elections saw unprecedented spending by Planned Parenthood and its allies to expand abortion and make sure human life is not protected by law at the state level. And this funding worked.

But Live Action's content is proven to change hearts and minds and save lives. We have the tools to end abortion in America and build a culture of life, but we need your help to reach more young people online before they fall for big abortion’s propaganda.

It’s critical that life must prevail in every state and overcome the horrific injustice of abortion as we spread the truth, one heart and one life at a time.

Help protect these innocent children from abortion by making a donation to Live Action today.

For life,

**Lila Rose**
Founder and President

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9345aa90261b4c2c9522a98eaa1c6e79&_e=HzFH_E92d0HMKJVqs8tQXp82h7JcRQtC9k1ycFMYy6P_P-g2oDXjcJ3Kist07rmQO2f1btal0BWgpQNm5cXzPXRM56HZZIPcfCxw_ZcHaVIAv_BEvLzxJGKcIoEGrEWxfhyYYgYWO6i4MjJM2bXwpIdlcl7XXKs4CC3_xaW0NeY6l-LYGY2fqczxDxRy-wd81272V26-rzUNPKdNdpdACIURPrju9LCVavGNvFFWlDp9rlVgaPzIo3tLzLY_AZrbFmC8Hf0u-iHSKJfto6C4spyZ1UpciEsxTTDWnxFuEhQz2TmNBVtfoakOnmRBKKesaKxyPnFAktA8iYJojshTSFhCyw0r9oCJOJgrcjW7oJ9c3FgZhtgfbpOImCCVLvYs)

2200 Wilson Blvd, Suite 102, PMB 111 Arlington, VA 22201

Sent to Reclaiming American Freedom subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Team United We Dream (via Blue Amp Action)
subject: DACA is at risk from a recent federal court ruling. You can help by asking President Biden and Congress to deliver a pathway to citizenship before the end of the year.
body:
Petition: President Biden and Congress must take action
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcfb43f88-4d9b-43c2-94e1-728115c68354/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | _Peter_ _ - _ Anti-immigrant Republicans aren’t shy about their goals. They’re trying to divide us by vilifying and demonizing immigrant communities. Their dangerous anti-immigrant rhetoric leads to bad policies and even worse outcomes for our communities.

A conservative court recently ruled against DACA after a years-long court battle after Trump attacked DACA in 2017. DACA is now headed back to a lower court where right-wing Judge Hanen, who has already ruled that DACA was unlawful, will now decide its fate. Because Donald Trump stacked the courts with right-wing extremist justices, we must prepare for the worst possible outcome.
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DEMAND CONGRESS PROTECT DACA →](https://default.salsalabs.org/T104b8381-a095-4c01-a179-f90ae18a524c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| **Therefore, it's crucial that Democrats deliver a pathway to citizenship before the end of the year. ** Democrats and President Biden have campaigned on the promise to protect immigrant communities and we must hold them accountable to it! _They cannot wait for the courts to kill DACA for good before they act. Biden and Congress must act NOW to permanently protect all immigrant youth, our families and communities._ They have the power to deliver permanent protections; not just for DACA recipients but for all immigrant communities! name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: How To Entirely Empty Your Bowels Every Morning - Top Surgeon Explains How
body:
To the Subscribers of Freedom Nation Today,

Many of our readers have expressed interest in the services offered by Gundry MD. We hope you benefit from the following message:
---
We've been told our whole lives to eat certain fruits, vegetables, and whole grains to stay in good health. However, according to Dr. Steven Gundry -- a world-renowned heart surgeon -- many so called **" health foods" in the American diet contain a dangerous toxin, that could be expanding your waistline.** **" This toxin causes micro-tears to form in your fragile intestinal-wall -- allowing bacteria and waste products to seep into your body."** Says Dr. Gundry. This harmful condition is best known as "leaky gut," and it's affecting millions of people nationwide. **Warning signs include weight gain, fatigue, digestive discomfort, stiff, achy joints, and even skin problems.** Dr. Gundry explains, "**These side effects are often mistaken for normal signs of aging, because leaky gut usually develops over a matter of years, and sometimes even decades. But I can assure you, the damage caused by these so called "health foods" is far from normal."** The good news is, this problem can be **easily fixed from your own home.** "It's very simple, you just have to know which foods are actually healthy, and which contain this hidden toxin," he goes on to explain. By simply eliminating this harmful toxin, Dr. Gundry has seen thousands of his own patients make swift recoveries. (In fact, he even lost 70lbs himself!) Now, after years of research, Dr. Gundry has decided to release an informative video to the public -- free and uninterrupted -- showcasing exactly which foods you need to avoid. "Good health is one of life's toughest obstacles," he explains. "So, if this video can help people achieve that, I'll be thrilled to hear I was of help." The video has since gone viral, first being shared by users on Facebook, then being featured on news sites like ABC and CBS. So far, the comments and feedback have been outstanding, with thousands of Americans feeling better than they have in decades. [**Click here to watch the presentation:**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7ca1a21503c34d9b91637c1658726aee&_e=r8Jh-PBzZq1qHLwSTI6hU5omI0gMHp9Fz5o7kx-dSEHsygfQ66aDRO4_qN15LfHZqOX1X0f8HP9Dbd5fE8Ndc6zsE-q3gW17hBkz-ACEKb1SfKb3Cl2wxfOLPY2MTI_Z5y7vW-l-X4VRwCUQjwSbCtuDT5qXPhKvV_UG-b0qHozr4PJbr0RscPFDsmJaP5T7lVmZs4YY3BjvY0dFlyl4-2VZdGL-EWtiHKUAScZv4uOCwiGym2yQdBlZiXfsBQKt) [ ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7ca1a21503c34d9b91637c1658726aee&_e=r8Jh-PBzZq1qHLwSTI6hU5omI0gMHp9Fz5o7kx-dSEHsygfQ66aDRO4_qN15LfHZqOX1X0f8HP9Dbd5fE8Ndc6zsE-q3gW17hBkz-ACEKb0N2ckzPmjOZIYFv7fyr70WJ8QBg900h4HMNMvsisNU0NNLKe7mQ461P78nFpjcAWOJBJPAeuoWKv9e7v_6qrzBGzwel_dPg7L1pYAsN5QwBaQ9wmR-F5o55n9S3lG8-gOgxhXnnwk-pfEnxUns8Acg) [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7ca1a21503c34d9b91637c1658726aee&_e=r8Jh-PBzZq1qHLwSTI6hU5omI0gMHp9Fz5o7kx-dSEHsygfQ66aDRO4_qN15LfHZqOX1X0f8HP9Dbd5fE8Ndc6zsE-q3gW17hBkz-ACEKb2OZO8_IaKkzXAww2PYLvhCfznMptmBahunL_roS0KdUZP0mbnlFheYj2mgWnpA2EMb855y17J3DTG3D9_WZtqwS4Md2q9hdJoEiGuB_JYZ6o9f2Htgwk3M5yNOooRd3Zascy5FM5h3gPquqHGxLKEq)[
](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7ca1a21503c34d9b91637c1658726aee&_e=r8Jh-PBzZq1qHLwSTI6hU5omI0gMHp9Fz5o7kx-dSEHsygfQ66aDRO4_qN15LfHZqOX1X0f8HP9Dbd5fE8Ndc6zsE-q3gW17hBkz-ACEKb3Fo_PWVgPxOYBcEebR5PBYvGxRGqkqCrBwl5-q0t-bA_Z7UPUlcM3VE8TZp3f6SC6C7-9cYru1X8X-m3V2b8avQnvyNlz8U7SdJ5t80Nz8Ge1ZHAL4dDqFs6A9xQEulQen0BPX4X8kTxZnzALapnzd)[**Watch The Video** ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7ca1a21503c34d9b91637c1658726aee&_e=r8Jh-PBzZq1qHLwSTI6hU5omI0gMHp9Fz5o7kx-dSEHsygfQ66aDRO4_qN15LfHZqOX1X0f8HP9Dbd5fE8Ndc6zsE-q3gW17hBkz-ACEKb2jovm3hbWxZx4VyNbhpVzu9Ow_ejehDzI6gLK-JNRvjQtG_yIx7eoL2qPvxQqc5ttGIa_uU5qr312b5Txmv2AhYrEC9rpOtws1JhzBqIP7XnUvubARvyn2wW7LpKbZ8P5Al8KVl2cjcwaddpTJPqty) Dr. Gundry also serves as the personal physician to many A-list celebrities. Most notable of which include legendary self-help guru Tony Robbins, Oscar award winning actor Alan Arkin, Grammy award winning singer Usher, and countless fortune 500 executives. Now, there is one thing Dr. Gundry asks from his viewers: "If watching this helps you take control of your weight back, fight unwanted cravings, increase your energy, ease gas and bloating, or find relief from stiff, achy joints," Dr. Gundry says... "Then please share this video with your friends and loved ones. Together, we can help as many people avoid these health issues as possible." [**Click here to watch the presentation**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7ca1a21503c34d9b91637c1658726aee&_e=r8Jh-PBzZq1qHLwSTI6hU5omI0gMHp9Fz5o7kx-dSEHsygfQ66aDRO4_qN15LfHZqOX1X0f8HP9Dbd5fE8Ndc6zsE-q3gW17hBkz-ACEKb33-zhQfMx8cAWe_2FUw-7SSmK58DtHfzNjGjvxZfwBPyytgmLXMuOvAy7GWS5TXI7pi93Bu16cE9TMD6ZzSSEsMuryJKgqr5Bv5lT6WHpj6_3roPl8MEH8-w-f2P1IrB8d0lcwltBxbtAOx0jvANXi)

body:
We'll be hosting a party as thank our volunteers for all of their tremendous work during the campaign. | |
---
I wanted to say thank you once again. On Saturday, November 19, from 11 AM – 1 PM, we'll be hosting a party as thank our volunteers for all of their tremendous work during the campaign.

Northwest Ohio is home to the hardworking folks who make, build, and grow America, and I am honored to continue serving you in Congress. It couldn't have been done without help from people like you.

**You can RSVP to the event by using this link here:[https://www.mobilize.us/marcykapturforcongress/event/543241](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54628884/379153420/-1901084343?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTBjY2UxOS0wMjY1LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K-N9Nuoosz_VelTJdPX5T6wy2FjwCpKOtdgmtiCd-30=&emci=fcd91834-3760-ed11-ade6-14cb6534a651&emdi=210cce19-0265-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=2814549)**

I hope to see you there to celebrate,

Marcy Kaptur

| | | Dear Friend --

My election is currently TOO CLOSE TO CALL. **We are in the lead, but the margins are so _razor_ _thin_ it's very likely there will be a RECOUNT.**

[This is where I need your help, Friend.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5c7ad44c40dd47f2a5808055adc4e863&_e=P61kMQzV1rtW0AB3dlIFEdRU-hUrGWkXVXDALaKq2i3rR8uuDe6zhf2faUJakc9krrhpRfD1XDNposmGEHvR9SKBP3lwBfW0q9RG2N5z8A0hOrNbhTaW5uj44Nnb0qDSrZWcnPJGnJCpmuNf1BYdbB9U7ehkf7VLJThXgEaAc4zuc68yVtvyhA95mD0dxoThP6bMGc6ntNf1t9hx8BPwoxYv-bV1Gc9DZZ896hjazmgCHPuScbjdg_zPZPmzdu05TOvjKw7kVDb5MLuc7p2r85K2J2AVenVi9Mx8n695S6M%3D)

The Democrats clearly targeted my race, pouring millions in to prop up my lying Democrat opponent and attack me with baseless lies.

We stepped up and spent what we had to fend off their attacks by running ads, holding rallies and getting out the vote. The [generosity of grassroots conservatives](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5c7ad44c40dd47f2a5808055adc4e863&_e=P61kMQzV1rtW0AB3dlIFEdRU-hUrGWkXVXDALaKq2i3rR8uuDe6zhf2faUJakc9krrhpRfD1XDNposmGEHvR9SKBP3lwBfW0q9RG2N5z8A0hOrNbhTaW5uj44Nnb0qDSrZWcnPJGnJCpmuNf1BYdbGXD_Ijb6L69aHZU9SJoo8wZOdQlCu4efH352IubkF3nxobQ3WhLDzInCEkrnL-rCxdPVxf_E5nq8aEPXzjeEmTkB5_XoDTexVHaVQpP_AtifUzKlrVaHoDIeSmgdWsC7O4-XjiL04CDukCrjqrevdU%3D) like you, Friend, was the reason why we were able to counter their attacks and maintain our lead.

**Now that we are still in a fight for survival, I need[ your help once again](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5c7ad44c40dd47f2a5808055adc4e863&_e=P61kMQzV1rtW0AB3dlIFEdRU-hUrGWkXVXDALaKq2i3rR8uuDe6zhf2faUJakc9krrhpRfD1XDNposmGEHvR9SKBP3lwBfW0q9RG2N5z8A0hOrNbhTaW5uj44Nnb0qDSrZWcnPJGnJCpmuNf1BYdbIhuG5_7JMoFxQMckQ5leJ9FWlt7BNhqlLB2G5zNudVnM09kz7moac2s_VwNHCDnU1nRRTcvpM-EwE4Pe_yqSOx8WQoE06YOCVWcLHzvCoLSSYRx3bXVJmdO7wljOfTflMCBlTSW1SE0v9VQfSoD2r4%3D). Please make a generous contribution as we prepare for the likely recount battle. **

name: Brent Bozell
subject: Don’t let the Media steal another election
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61876681:JGyFhrGON:m:1:3361486117:D9C55F66A4170D4346DD4630D9270F61:r)
Peter,

The media's bias against Republicans is on full display this election.

Why is biased media so dangerous? Here's an example.

Four years ago, TV's midterm coverage hammered **Republican candidates and then-President Trump with 88% negative spin** while sparing Democrats similarly bad press.

This year, Democrats are in charge of the White House and both chambers of Congress. However, a new Media Research Center study of ABC, CBS, and NBC evening newscasts finds that **Republicans still receive 87% negative news coverage. **

All the while, Democrats -- including the President -- are drawing far less scrutiny than the party out of power.

Let me introduce myself. My name is Brent Bozell, and I'm the Founder and President of the Media Research Center (MRC).

**MRC is the only conservative organization dedicated to exposing the radical left-wing agenda in the media and holding them accountable for their corruption and lies.**

Peter, I've set a goal to raise $25,000 to STOP media bias and corruption.

[_**Can I count on you to join the fight by sending an urgent gift today? Click here to send your support >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61876681:JGyFhrGON:m:1:3361486117:D9C55F66A4170D4346DD4630D9270F61:r)

This year, the Big Three evening newscasts aired 115 stories that mentioned or discussed the midterm elections, with a total airtime of 213 minutes, or about 60 percent more than the 130 minutes we tallied four years ago.

Here's what we found:

* **Burying Biden**

Four years ago, President Trump accounted for 48% of all midterm campaign airtime in 2018, more than all of the individual House, Senate, and gubernatorial candidates combined.

But the networks aren't interested in targeting President Biden this year. _Biden accounted for just 34 minutes of midterm coverage_ , just 16% of total campaign coverage.

* **Blasting Republicans**

This fall, Democrats, including President Biden, drew 13 positive comments vs. 26 negative ones for a **67% negative spin. **

That's not great, but not nearly as bad as Republicans. They received 94 negative comments vs. 14 positive statements, **a spin score of 87% negative** -- and virtually identical to the 88% negative spin for the whole GOP (including Trump) in 2018.

* **Showcasing Democrats ' Agenda**

While voters consistently ranked the economy and inflation as the most important issues this fall, the broadcast networks' campaign coverage instead emphasized the agenda favored by Democratic consultants.

Thus, the economy was only the fifth-most cited issue within these midterm stories, with 15 minutes of airtime. That's barely half of the time spent on anonymous and unverified allegations that GOP candidate Herschel Walker paid for two women's abortions years ago, _charges Walker has vehemently denied_.

[_**Join the fight against media bias! Just click here >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61876681:JGyFhrGON:m:1:3361486117:D9C55F66A4170D4346DD4630D9270F61:r)

As the Senate majority lingers on in the Georgia run-off election, we can't let the media steal the race from voters.

Here's the breakdown of the Left's coverage of issues during the midterm coverage:

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61876681:JGyFhrGON:m:1:3361486117:D9C55F66A4170D4346DD4630D9270F61:r)

**When the MRC was founded in 1987, over 75% of Americans trusted the left-wing media. Since then, MRC has successfully SHATTERED America 's trust in the left-wing media -- over 90% of Americans state they DO NOT trust the media anymore. **

But we can't do this alone, Peter. Can I count on you to join the fight for the truth? Click below to donate.

[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61876682:JGyFhrGON:m:1:3361486117:D9C55F66A4170D4346DD4630D9270F61:r)

clean_body: Peter, The media's bias against Republicans is on full display this election. Why is biased media so dangerous? Here's an example. Four years ago, TV's midterm coverage hammered Republican candidates and then-President Trump with 88% negative spin while sparing Democrats similarly bad press. This year, Democrats are in charge of the White House and both chambers of Congress. However, a new Media Research Center study of ABC, CBS, and NBC evening newscasts finds that Republicans still receive 87% negative news coverage. All the while, Democrats -- including the President -- are drawing far less scrutiny than the party out of power. Let me introduce myself. My name is Brent Bozell, and I'm the Founder and President of the Media Research Center (MRC). MRC is the only conservative organization dedicated to exposing the radical left-wing agenda in the media and holding them accountable for their corruption and lies. Peter, I've set a goal to raise $25,000 to STOP media bias and corruption. This year, the Big Three evening newscasts aired 115 stories that mentioned or discussed the midterm elections, with a total airtime of 213 minutes, or about 60 percent more than the 130 minutes we tallied four years ago. Here's what we found: Burying Biden Four years ago, President Trump accounted for 48% of all midterm campaign airtime in 2018, more than all of the individual House, Senate, and gubernatorial candidates combined. But the networks aren't interested in targeting President Biden this year. Biden accounted for just 34 minutes of midterm coverage , just 16% of total campaign coverage. Blasting Republicans This fall, Democrats, including President Biden, drew 13 positive comments vs. 26 negative ones for a 67% negative spin. That's not great, but not nearly as bad as Republicans. They received 94 negative comments vs. 14 positive statements, a spin score of 87% negative -- and virtually identical to the 88% negative spin for the whole GOP (including Trump) in 2018. Showcasing Democrats ' Agenda While voters consistently ranked the economy and inflation as the most important issues this fall, the broadcast networks' campaign coverage instead emphasized the agenda favored by Democratic consultants. Thus, the economy was only the fifth-most cited issue within these midterm stories, with 15 minutes of airtime. That's barely half of the time spent on anonymous and unverified allegations that GOP candidate Herschel Walker paid for two women's abortions years ago, charges Walker has vehemently denied. As the Senate majority lingers on in the Georgia run-off election, we can't let the media steal the race from voters. Here's the breakdown of the Left's coverage of issues during the midterm coverage: When the MRC was founded in 1987, over 75% of Americans trusted the left-wing media. Since then, MRC has successfully SHATTERED America 's trust in the left-wing media -- over 90% of Americans state they DO NOT trust the media anymore. ** But we can't do this alone, Peter. Can I count on you to join the fight for the truth? Click below to donate. Thank you, Brent Bozell Founder and President of MRC The mission of the Media Research Center is to create a media culture in America where truth and liberty flourish. The MRC is a research and education organization operating under Section 501(c)(3) of the Internal Revenue Code, and contributions to the MRC are tax-deductible. body:
Thank you for your support.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54629355/379155315/1188041192?refcode=em_fr_2022.11.15_b1_cd_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTA4YTA4NC0wMzY1LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nBTyicOvep-0wislxfnbHMc4BjnOYk5-FrjN3OBP0hU=) Hi Derek,

One week ago, we stood together and defended PA-17 from the outside forces targeting us. **We proved that no one knows western Pennsylvania like we do, and that when working folks come together, we are unstoppable.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54629356/379155316/1188041192?refcode=em_fr_2022.11.15_b1_cd_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTA4YTA4NC0wMzY1LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nBTyicOvep-0wislxfnbHMc4BjnOYk5-FrjN3OBP0hU=) Derek, this wasn’t an easy fight. We had challenges along the way, but we faced every single one head-on. And together, we won.

**Being on this journey with you has been the honor of a lifetime, and I am grateful to have you by my side as we embark on this next chapter in Washington.**

Thank you so much. I’m excited to see what we do next.

It is the honor of my lifetime to serve western Pennsylvania in Congress.

Very respectfully,

Chris Deluzio | **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54629357/379155317/1188041192?refcode=em_fr_2022.11.15_b1_cd_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTA4YTA4NC0wMzY1LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nBTyicOvep-0wislxfnbHMc4BjnOYk5-FrjN3OBP0hU=)**

The deadline is TOMORROW. **[So, if you can chip in $25, $50, or maybe even $75 or $100, you'd be doing a great service to our nation and putting us one step closer to introducing Joe Biden and the Radical Left to the concept of checks and balances.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874910:JOY5hrGNb:m:1:3317145305:C8166957CC2B99E9A538ADBE3FF3FAD2:r)**

name: Full Mag News
subject: Reserve your place in the study group
body:
This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis’s answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free 3-week study group

| | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e937d55ab1df4f5580f5337f8f29a942&_e=p-MMI-QJxhdDIZwXdsJJT0wbutWD8gnX3L3k7BR64qozrozwLjYOQp4RiUFYBRkEAXUS69thLiZXVDE3oxrhurr2MmmPzxeLR_PF88esXuW3vUWeqq4HEHcRM86x7_7eOQ6qJgVcjrqWy-Y7QVIZlC5eYydrnQWlI4tuHs0EodMo7nnJcIg7ycUj7KXAjSnk2_IrVZkq-FJq9ESX3TjA6BW6Wj2K9syGdmCLrCI_jII1eVF0e9z-iKY2zvQbCliFsYNbvRdWkQYs8KwSqMGYRTS92TddbkwhXIKVS5gQ-puZYiSLqYN9yE5PyHRW0qWE5e1oe0OD3mw0Qxc0E6yQz6VgvqntSxTpMleiYX-e47DD5XNupRu_luC_gpK3P1rl3ZlKvBsqXnVtTYAeNuBBjndHH8iIFMylgrp3t7iSFo8%3D)
---
| | Dear Friend,

You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis's answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free **3-week study group** on one of Hillsdale College's most popular online courses, **" C.S. Lewis on Christianity."**

C.S. Lewis is the best modern writer at explaining the truth and goodness of the Christian faith. Through his imaginative and invigorating style, Lewis answers the eternal questions of theology in a manner that attracts those outside Christianity and strengthens those within the faith. This course examines Lewis's writings about morality, conversion, prayer, the Bible, suffering, and the afterlife.

Here's a sample of what our online students are saying about the course.

_" Shares the story of C.S. Lewis in a way that is easy to understand. Very entertaining and thought-provoking." - Tammy from Georgia_

_" The course is organized very well. The instructor is a very gifted speaker who explains concepts clearly and passionately." - Bob from Colorado_

_" It gives the student insight into who C.S. Lewis really was as a man. He feels accessible all of a sudden. My wife gave me a compendium of eight volumes of his works, and I look forward to reading them now." - Mark from Washington_

**Join this exclusive study group on "C.S. Lewis on Christianity" for FREE-starting November 29.**

Reserve your spot here: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/cs-lewis-christianity-study-group](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e937d55ab1df4f5580f5337f8f29a942&_e=p-MMI-QJxhdDIZwXdsJJT0wbutWD8gnX3L3k7BR64qozrozwLjYOQp4RiUFYBRkEAXUS69thLiZXVDE3oxrhurr2MmmPzxeLR_PF88esXuW3vUWeqq4HEHcRM86x7_7eOQ6qJgVcjrqWy-Y7QVIZlC5eYydrnQWlI4tuHs0EodMo7nnJcIg7ycUj7KXAjSnk2_IrVZkq-FJq9ESX3TjA6NECvgTVCpBu8hkKV2SeOFGbRf8xvxqdEhDp2UFcZi-PuXOyOUEJRcHcCYR0Do5evbv2qr5BNzp0paKN-GFU3lcU7PJtZ5Y8jEAzuekLIMkryOlfMv3iGgYioULmQSW0itiKeIO1RVlPVRWEeng-n2WB4yyPK3LkErTkUyWrs4w8hk6sFtshv-kqzPR4ZkOcz4jfAZ1osZejT9YwREZM8HU%3D)

I hope you join us in this exploration of Lewis's timeless lessons on the truth and beauty of the Christian faith.

Warm Regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Tom Brejcha
subject: His case was thrown out. Then the FBI raided his home.
body:
| | | Dear Pro-Life Friend, [**Will you rush me your emergency donation to the HOUCK FAMILY LEGAL DEFENSE FUND immediately?**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d02e6a1e4e044be9b443c5cf8b603716&_e=wyUOxW1_5ydkjdOc_7enduFT6AlbjwN4Fp6rxq4XnShjwbcq6fxim3wkmuCd2615wLPjJ6p736m9jJeTVSH8HMF5JDJoLLbRh_9g4j4oLqdYePX7t-ds60UeZHcq-JD65UKtdMTurZXVja4xeiAE3ckgDwR0Vr4EYRw8mzp9vZgvIymtl4TtlCECLJ30rWexdLCcAMaxE3f-si_4xAG8yxntUcnxuGjK1V5jv-7R6XGeaV-85ricRYoBey90-LvgdBZ_jT_7qjXNMdR5Yo_xgWCixf8_rbcGuQ8KCSkeelVB5TAs00f6ogvG9uTeOA7GNvFHAtBg-31mUpvVosnLaCFcZFz5__lYYB_Kz1M0HY4%3D) On September 23, two dozen heavily-armed FBI agents...in tactical gear...guns drawn...raided the home of pro-life author, speaker, and sidewalk counselor Mark Houck...and, in front of his wife and seven children, handcuffed him and hauled him off to jail. Over what? Over a case so flimsy the District Court of Philadelphia already **_had thrown it out_.** Over an incident in which Mark was defending his 12-year-old son when an abortion clinic "escort" verbally abused and repeatedly violated his personal space. _And despite the fact that Mark offered to appear voluntarily (an important detail which I 'll come back to in a minute)._ Make no mistake, _this is_ the political weaponization of the FBI. Make no mistake, _this is_ retaliation for the overturning of Roe v. Wade (sidewalk counselors, crisis pregnancy centers, and even churches are now targets of the radical pro-abortion movement). And make no mistake, _this is_ an assault on all pro-life Americans. [**So, I hope I can count on your donation of $35 or more to the HOUCK FAMILY LEGAL DEFENSE FUND to help us give Mark the best defense possible.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d02e6a1e4e044be9b443c5cf8b603716&_e=wyUOxW1_5ydkjdOc_7enduFT6AlbjwN4Fp6rxq4XnShjwbcq6fxim3wkmuCd2615wLPjJ6p736m9jJeTVSH8HMF5JDJoLLbRh_9g4j4oLqdYePX7t-ds60UeZHcq-JD65UKtdMTurZXVja4xeiAE3ckgDwR0Vr4EYRw8mzp9vZgvIymtl4TtlCECLJ30rWexdLCcAMaxE3f-si_4xAG8y6kqfdS38vtFzHf7VoRevVqFkxYUNpDhfn-azzRjuHzTnTa1I3qIr9TRBsjJZoJ-pgAcvOh1dSR5DT1ZKy31Jf8k1ofbDWASiYWR1J2cetFk5m8ZgzyzHduULyejXl4Zt-yEOT88qCf10LEDCyaz26A%3D) Now, I'll cut right to the chase. Mark is being charged under the Freedom of Access to Clinic Entrances (FACE) Act - a law that dates back to Bill Clinton's pro-abortion presidency. If convicted, he faces **11 years** in prison and up to **$350,000 in fines**. Immediately upon hearing of the early morning raid and arrest, the Thomas More Society swung into action. Peter Breen (our vice president and general counsel) flew to Philadelphia for Mark's arraignment. Needless to say, Mark pled "NOT GUILTY!" to these sham charges. But the reality is this will be a long and expensive fight. **That 's why I'm asking for your best gift of $35 or more to the HOUCK FAMILY** **LEGAL DEFENSE FUND.** Mark is beloved by his family, friends, neighbors, and in the Philadelphia pro-life community. And I know your support means the world to Mark and his wife (Ryan-Marie). Now, imagine the terror and shock in the innocent faces of his young children as 25 armed federal agents descended on their home, threatened to break down the door, and then swarmed in with guns drawn and barrels pointed throughout the home. That's why I told you I would come back to the important detail that Mark offered to appear voluntarily to the FBI. His offer was rejected. Why? **Precisely because Joe Biden and his radically pro-abortion administration are intent on inflicting as much suffering on Mark and his family (and intimidating pro-lifers in Philadelphia and across the nation) as they possibly can.** "_We can get to you. We can get to your family._ " That's their message. That's the "street justice" they're looking to inflict. And it's that threat that we have to fight with our defense of Mark. It won't be easy. And it won't be cheap. [**But nothing could be more important. P.S. There's one more thing you should know about Mark Houck. He drove two hours every week to stand outside of abortion clinics for _six to eight hours at a time_ , praying the Rosary and offering support to women who are so desperate they think they have no alternative than to abort their babies, often bringing his twelve-year-old son. clean_body: | | | Dear Pro-Life Friend, On September 23, two dozen heavily-armed FBI agents...in tactical gear...guns drawn...raided the home of pro-life author, speaker, and sidewalk counselor Mark Houck...and, in front of his wife and seven children, handcuffed him and hauled him off to jail. Over what? Over a case so flimsy the District Court of Philadelphia already had thrown it out. Over an incident in which Mark was defending his 12-year-old son when an abortion clinic "escort" verbally abused and repeatedly violated his personal space. And despite the fact that Mark offered to appear voluntarily (an important detail which I 'll come back to in a minute). Make no mistake, this is the political weaponization of the FBI. Make no mistake, this is retaliation for the overturning of Roe v. Wade (sidewalk counselors, crisis pregnancy centers, and even churches are now targets of the radical pro-abortion movement). And make no mistake, this is an assault on all pro-life Americans. Now, I'll cut right to the chase. Mark is being charged under the Freedom of Access to Clinic Entrances (FACE) Act - a law that dates back to Bill Clinton's pro-abortion presidency. If convicted, he faces 11 years in prison and up to $350,000 in fines. Immediately upon hearing of the early morning raid and arrest, the Thomas More Society swung into action. Peter Breen (our vice president and general counsel) flew to Philadelphia for Mark's arraignment. Needless to say, Mark pled "NOT GUILTY!" to these sham charges. But the reality is this will be a long and expensive fight. That 's why I'm asking for your best gift of $35 or more to the HOUCK FAMILY LEGAL DEFENSE FUND. Mark is beloved by his family, friends, neighbors, and in the Philadelphia pro-life community. And I know your support means the world to Mark and his wife (Ryan-Marie). Now, imagine the terror and shock in the innocent faces of his young children as 25 armed federal agents descended on their home, threatened to break down the door, and then swarmed in with guns drawn and barrels pointed throughout the home. That's why I told you I would come back to the important detail that Mark offered to appear voluntarily to the FBI. His offer was rejected. Why? Precisely because Joe Biden and his radically pro-abortion administration are intent on inflicting as much suffering on Mark and his family (and intimidating pro-lifers in Philadelphia and across the nation) as they possibly can. "We can get to you. We can get to your family. " That's their message. That's the "street justice" they're looking to inflict. And it's that threat that we have to fight with our defense of Mark. It won't be easy. And it won't be cheap. The Thomas More Society knows what it takes to fight and win this kind of fight against the abortion industry and against its allies in government. From the moment Kamala Harris weaponized the California attorney general's office against David Daleiden (when he exposed the harvesting and sale of aborted baby body parts), the Thomas More Society spearheaded his defense. And we are proud to have defended many renowned pro-life and religious leaders like Joe, Ann, and Eric Scheidler, the Pro-Life Action League, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, David Bereit, Lila Rose and Live Action, Students for Life, Sidewalk Advocates for Life, Created Equal, the March for Life, Abby Johnson and many more. Because when dark forces of the abortion movement unleash their full might to legally, financially, and personally destroy our clients --- we fight back. So, if you are able to give more - say as much as $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000 or more - it would go a long way in helping us clear Mark of these charges. I know I don't have to tell you that if the long tentacles of the abortion industry can reach into the halls of the FBI and the Department of Justice and if pro-abortion politicians can rip the blindfold of impartiality from "Lady Justice" then the weaponization and the attacks won't stop, they 'll multiply. So please hurry. , before it's too late. For Life, Tom Brejcha President & Chief Counsel P.S. There's one more thing you should know about Mark Houck. My election is currently TOO CLOSE TO CALL. We are in the lead, but the margins are so razor thin it's very likely there will be a RECOUNT. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0027%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=sKO8jnjxG6nkgcT9WhE5%2fQ&sysid=1)

| | | Dear Friend \--

My election is currently TOO CLOSE TO CALL. **We are in the lead, but the margins are so _razor_ _thin_ it's very likely there will be a RECOUNT.**

[This is where I need your help, Friend.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40769%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Qml8Ug58lEE5ctFc%2f8AU8A&sysid=1)

The Democrats clearly targeted my race, pouring millions in to prop up my lying Democrat opponent and attack me with baseless lies.

We stepped up and spent what we had to fend off their attacks by running ads, holding rallies and getting out the vote. The [generosity of grassroots conservatives](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40760%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7tItm1o7qXKmMwjCFNZM8g&sysid=1) like you, Friend, was the reason why we were able to counter their attacks and maintain our lead.

**Now that we are still in a fight for survival, I need[ your help once again](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40761%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2yKDFDMJbrWuXGvjMfH3Dw&sysid=1). Please make a generous contribution as we prepare for the likely recount battle. **

---

---
| [URGENT: PITCH IN $100 >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40775%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9PUYhkkBw%2bU3GHuUqVL6eQ&sysid=1 "URGENT: PITCH IN $100 >>")

| [URGENT: PITCH IN $250 >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40776%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TSQvqJoLrb%2flrq90ftr%2b9g&sysid=1 "URGENT: PITCH IN $250 >>")
---
| Time could not be more critical. We still don't know who will control Congress, but clearly keeping Colorado's 3rd District **RED** is essential. My seat is a MUST-WIN.

Let's face it, if it weren't for grassroots patriots, like you Friend, we'd be looking at sending a Nancy Pelosi rubber stamp to Congress. So, please step up to the plate and [chip in your most generous donation](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40777%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4%2fEB84hYZE8zMvwzOTxMFQ&sysid=1).

**We have to remain vigilant during this time, and we need[ your support](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40778%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fkWmqwhyc2UqlO7UxdwOJA&sysid=1) to do so.** We must make sure no leftwing shenanigans affect the outcome.

I am absolutely confident that we will win, and I am looking forward to firing Nancy Pelosi very much. [Help me do it >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40779%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qi20nJ7VGTkNxxuZxQVOpA&sysid=1)

For Freedom,

Lauren Boebert
U.S. Congresswoman, 3rd District of Colorado

Peter,

**The Federal Election Commission has one final financial deadline before the runoff: 11:59 p.m. on Wednesday. We have LESS THAN 48 HOURS to raise every dollar we can.**

The deadline is TOMORROW. **[So, if you can chip in $25, $50, or maybe even $75 or $100, you'd be doing a great service to our nation and putting us one step closer to introducing Joe Biden and the Radical Left to the concept of checks and balances.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874622:JMUTirGNa:m:1:3372944669:9FD577E1D14133367A5FA634081CE320:r)**

Herschel Walker

name: Herschel Walker
subject: I need to ask you for just $5
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61871780:JXMJirGBN:m:1:3361486117:2940EE182B3DD6C89A949D611D5DD9A4:r)

Peter,

Raphael Warnock's runoff win last year is why Democrats control the Senate today.

Senator Warnock has voted for Joe Biden's disastrous agenda 96% of the time, so he is to blame for our country going in the wrong direction. We can hold him accountable, win this race and get our country back on track, _**[but we can only win if we have your help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61871780:JXMJirGBN:m:1:3361486117:2940EE182B3DD6C89A949D611D5DD9A4:r)**_

_If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[**CHIP IN $25 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61871781:JXMJirGBN:m:1:3361486117:2940EE182B3DD6C89A949D611D5DD9A4:r)
All eyes are on Georgia. If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51-seat majority where the most radical proposals will succeed. We cannot let that happen, Peter.

Senator Warnock and Democrat Super PACs have launched an advertising blitz that is flooding the airwaves. We already had over $70 million in false attack ads run against us in the general election, and now they're running even more in the runoff!

**[That's why I am asking for your help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61871780:JXMJirGBN:m:1:3361486117:2940EE182B3DD6C89A949D611D5DD9A4:r)**

_If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[**CHIP IN $25 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61871781:JXMJirGBN:m:1:3361486117:2940EE182B3DD6C89A949D611D5DD9A4:r)
The Georgia runoff will be the last fight of 2022, so WE MUST WIN IT! We can flip a Democrat seat in the Senate, but I need your help. I know money is tight in this Biden-Warnock economy, **[but if you can chip in even $25 right now- it will help us reach out to undecided voters, implement our 'get-out-the-vote' program, and win on December 6th!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61871780:JXMJirGBN:m:1:3361486117:2940EE182B3DD6C89A949D611D5DD9A4:r)**

Every single dollar impacts how many more doors we can knock on, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach. **[Please pitch in anything you're able ASAP, even if it's just $25.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61871780:JXMJirGBN:m:1:3361486117:2940EE182B3DD6C89A949D611D5DD9A4:r)**

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61871780:JXMJirGBN:m:1:3361486117:2940EE182B3DD6C89A949D611D5DD9A4:r)
Herschel Walker

[** DONATE TODAY ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61871780:JXMJirGBN:m:1:3361486117:2940EE182B3DD6C89A949D611D5DD9A4:r)

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61871782:JXMJirGBN:m:1:3361486117:2940EE182B3DD6C89A949D611D5DD9A4:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61871783:JXMJirGBN:m:1:3361486117:2940EE182B3DD6C89A949D611D5DD9A4:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61871784:JXMJirGBN:m:1:3361486117:2940EE182B3DD6C89A949D611D5DD9A4:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61871785:JXMJirGBN:m:1:3361486117:2940EE182B3DD6C89A949D611D5DD9A4:r)

Fellow American,

If there's one thing I learned throughout my sports career, _it's that hard work and dedication are often the difference between winning and losing._

body:
Fellow Conservative:

Conservative star Herschel Walker and woke, socialist Senator Raphael Warnock are locked in a runoff election in Georgia.
After two years of grueling campaigning, Herschel has to keep fighting. And so do we!
Please contribute to Herschel Walker's campaign!
The Georgia Senate runoff election will be on December 6, so we don't have much time. The entire Democrat Party, the media, and woke corporations will be pouring money and propaganda into this race.
Herschel Walker doesn't have Wall Street, Silicon Valley, and the Swamp. His campaign can only rely on two things now: conservative principles and us.
The marathon of the 2022 elections is now a sprint for Georgia.
Herschel Walker is ready for this fight. He is giving everything he's got to save America from another two years of anti-American corruption in Washington. What is it worth...

▶︎ To fight inflation?▶︎ To drill more oil and natural gas?▶︎ To protect our daughters from woke extremists?▶︎ To rescue our classrooms from racist indoctrination?▶︎ To secure our border?▶︎ To clean up our streets?
Please send $5, $10, $25, or more to Herschel Walker's campaign to build a conservative Senate.
We need principled fighters in the Senate, not more spineless and feckless RINOs. Together, we can help send Herschel Walker to Washington to fight for our values.
Thank you for considering this request and for doing so much to support strong candidates.

Sincerely,

Mary Vought
Executive Director
Senate Conservatives Fund

 

GEORGIA RUNOFF
COUNTDOWN

DONATE

Senate Conservatives Fund300 Independence Ave SEWashington, DC 20003

 

Senate Conservatives Fund is a grassroots organization that promotes conservative policies and helps elect conservative candidates to the U.S. Senate. SCF was founded by former Senator Jim DeMint to help the grassroots change Washington.

Contributions to the Senate Conservatives Fund are not deductible as charitable contributions. Contributions from corporations or foreign nationals lacking permanent resident status are not permitted. Federal law requires us to report the name, mailing address, occupation and
employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a calendar year. Not paid for at taxpayer expense.
