#
Friend of life,

There is an anti-life wave sweeping across the country that you need to know about.

Recently, California and Vermont voters approved a constitutional amendment to make abortion legal through birth, guaranteeing the ability to kill preborn children at any time during pregnancy and potentially even after birth, for any reason.

In Michigan, voters passed Proposal 3, which repealed the state's long-standing protection for human life that banned abortion.

In the pro-life and deeply Republican state of Kentucky, voters rejected a pro-life constitutional amendment that clarified that there was no right to abortion in the state Constitution, paving the way for activist judges in the state to reject their recent pro-life laws as "unconstitutional."

This is sickening and tragic. We need your help: **[https://give.liveaction.org/fight-just-begun/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ee8b66a8b64843119dad063bfac153ca&_e=tCCYBeBZ6DyPphyKxWI3TljkHvO_sNhpTEikzutYAee_7EElRRu_fmU-1Xy3BjC1-Jwo28HXUJgvOxCrNTdJp3NlmItUHsYJA8sxHXw17DcD6gatLKwEo7QrNifBfD_OoAtjWYugOykoH3Amie2Oqa88czVp-RLKLWs_nzM9G1GMcz8wEgB2GsT7s0kxXXM56ALPps1pw3WxkJ8uPXrXTpiV8LdQ_1quU41IKDQd-5SV2PfGEewxTfDyFYvGZyO77ylUAVcz1g9s7RR25dPqDTkwoFKCgwxy-oRGYRH1EAluH6gRrNnJ9aalWjlg-hTfwBS2kh8_VnQTyc-tJV9JnGY4uZzyEXn3QcA9TZGwZQI9soqf1uacjeEAqUA6LaQ8)**

Even pro-life states are now worse in a post-Roe v. Wade America than a pre-Roe v. Wade America.

We are seeing that many pro-life citizens are buying the lies of Big Abortion, unsure if they can stand 100% for life in the aftermath of Roe v. Wade. We must reach them before it's too late.

Your chance to stop this pro-death agenda is quickly disappearing. If we don't get the truth out to every American, we could lose all the progress we've made in this fight. Would you please pitch in right now? Every penny helps: **[https://give.liveaction.org/fight-just-begun/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ee8b66a8b64843119dad063bfac153ca&_e=tCCYBeBZ6DyPphyKxWI3TljkHvO_sNhpTEikzutYAee_7EElRRu_fmU-1Xy3BjC1-Jwo28HXUJgvOxCrNTdJp3NlmItUHsYJA8sxHXw17DcD6gatLKwEo7QrNifBfD_OoAtjWYugOykoH3Amie2Oqa88czVp-RLKLWs_nzM9G1GMcz8wEgB2GsT7s0kxXXM56ALPps1pw3WxkJ8uPXrXTpio_XrrlYivvxXe-MpQBYQc9x7mNvHyxl6QIHLDeCIPpmOWdvvLVaVpAYYFEOkzyIfIo8xirBHSBfDVPlUK3JaS3_L9GMYsYwC-FC8e1Lcje-fCI5FAnAl65so27n0svq2B9FsVbYq59RymK34fEj9klVIGYZCmS5jIK9XyAonq)**

Contrary to popular belief, the overturn of Roe v. Wade did not end abortion. In pro-abortion states and now even in pro-life states, it has had the effect of expanding abortion.

We must fight back.

Now is the time to increase our efforts and push back against the pro-death agenda of the abortion lobby. No one reaches more people online with the truth about abortion than Live Action. We are the organization with the proven track record to confront this head-on and win. But only if we have your support right now: **[https://give.liveaction.org/fight-just-begun/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ee8b66a8b64843119dad063bfac153ca&_e=tCCYBeBZ6DyPphyKxWI3TljkHvO_sNhpTEikzutYAee_7EElRRu_fmU-1Xy3BjC1-Jwo28HXUJgvOxCrNTdJp3NlmItUHsYJA8sxHXw17DcD6gatLKwEo7QrNifBfD_OoAtjWYugOykoH3Amie2Oqa88czVp-RLKLWs_nzM9G1GMcz8wEgB2GsT7s0kxXXM56ALPps1pw3WxkJ8uPXrXTuvj3_SGmOUUlGyg_PrKgSmIMe54R3JLLSnhd4fYkMw4FnA8uVBqBEIBK6U404NIUDgEbp4jFr_BeX3VC-tVcRY0v3oqlrd2jKY-8eQvtDBEyFnKZlMEjOACGyvIbsck741nxdgDEt7j4yiRF7lkVM4PHaDU3Uwjmct3PSZs5US_)**

We are up against a billion-dollar industry with the financial backing and support of the elites, the media, Hollywood, and higher education.

The recent elections saw unprecedented spending by Planned Parenthood and its allies to expand abortion and make sure human life is not protected by law at the state level. And this funding worked.

But Live Action's content is proven to change hearts and minds and save lives. We have the tools to end abortion in America and build a culture of life, but we need your help to reach more young people online before they fall for big abortion's propaganda.

It's critical that life must prevail in every state and overcome the horrific injustice of abortion as we spread the truth, one heart and one life at a time.

Help protect these innocent children from abortion by making a donation to Live Action today.

For life,

**Lila Rose**
Founder and President

Would you please pitch in right now? Every penny helps: Contrary to popular belief, the overturn of Roe v. Wade did not end abortion. In pro-abortion states and now even in pro-life states, it has had the effect of expanding abortion. We must fight back. Now is the time to increase our efforts and push back against the pro-death agenda of the abortion lobby. No one reaches more people online with the truth about abortion than Live Action. We are the organization with the proven track record to confront this head-on and win. But only if we have your support right now: We are up against a billion-dollar industry with the financial backing and support of the elites, the media, Hollywood, and higher education. The recent elections saw unprecedented spending by Planned Parenthood and its allies to expand abortion and make sure human life is not protected by law at the state level. And this funding worked. But Live Action's content is proven to change hearts and minds and save lives. We have the tools to end abortion in America and build a culture of life, but we need your help to reach more young people online before they fall for big abortion's propaganda. It's critical that life must prevail in every state and overcome the horrific injustice of abortion as we spread the truth, one heart and one life at a time. Help protect these innocent children from abortion by making a donation to Live Action today. For life, Lila Rose Founder and President 2200 Wilson Blvd, Suite 102, PMB 111 Arlington, VA 22201 Sent to Freedom Nation Today subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Brent Bozell
subject: Don’t let the Media steal another election
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61876546:J6kMWrGyN:m:1:3317145305:F66B7A50F62619C72A0FA67C2FEFD448:r)
Peter,

The media's bias against Republicans is on full display this election.

Why is biased media so dangerous? Here's an example.

Four years ago, TV's midterm coverage hammered **Republican candidates and then-President Trump with 88% negative spin** while sparing Democrats similarly bad press.

This year, Democrats are in charge of the White House and both chambers of Congress. However, a new Media Research Center study of ABC, CBS, and NBC evening newscasts finds that **Republicans still receive 87% negative news coverage. **

All the while, Democrats -- including the President -- are drawing far less scrutiny than the party out of power.

Let me introduce myself. My name is Brent Bozell, and I'm the Founder and President of the Media Research Center (MRC).

**MRC is the only conservative organization dedicated to exposing the radical left-wing agenda in the media and holding them accountable for their corruption and lies.**

Peter, I've set a goal to raise $25,000 to STOP media bias and corruption.

[_**Can I count on you to join the fight by sending an urgent gift today? Click here to send your support >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61876546:J6kMWrGyN:m:1:3317145305:F66B7A50F62619C72A0FA67C2FEFD448:r)

This year, the Big Three evening newscasts aired 115 stories that mentioned or discussed the midterm elections, with a total airtime of 213 minutes, or about 60 percent more than the 130 minutes we tallied four years ago.

Here's what we found:

* **Burying Biden**

Four years ago, President Trump accounted for 48% of all midterm campaign airtime in 2018, more than all of the individual House, Senate, and gubernatorial candidates combined.

But the networks aren't interested in targeting President Biden this year. _Biden accounted for just 34 minutes of midterm coverage_ , just 16% of total campaign coverage.

* **Blasting Republicans**

This fall, Democrats, including President Biden, drew 13 positive comments vs. 26 negative ones for a **67% negative spin. **

That's not great, but not nearly as bad as Republicans. They received 94 negative comments vs. 14 positive statements, **a spin score of 87% negative** -- and virtually identical to the 88% negative spin for the whole GOP (including Trump) in 2018.

* **Showcasing Democrats ' Agenda**

While voters consistently ranked the economy and inflation as the most important issues this fall, the broadcast networks' campaign coverage instead emphasized the agenda favored by Democratic consultants.

Thus, the economy was only the fifth-most cited issue within these midterm stories, with 15 minutes of airtime. That's barely half of the time spent on anonymous and unverified allegations that GOP candidate Herschel Walker paid for two women's abortions years ago, _charges Walker has vehemently denied_.

[_**Join the fight against media bias! Just click here >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61876546:J6kMWrGyN:m:1:3317145305:F66B7A50F62619C72A0FA67C2FEFD448:r)

As the Senate majority lingers on in the Georgia run-off election, we can't let the media steal the race from voters.

Here's the breakdown of the Left's coverage of issues during the midterm coverage:

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61876546:J6kMWrGyN:m:1:3317145305:F66B7A50F62619C72A0FA67C2FEFD448:r)

**When the MRC was founded in 1987, over 75% of Americans trusted the left-wing media. Since then, MRC has successfully SHATTERED America 's trust in the left-wing media -- over 90% of Americans state they DO NOT trust the media anymore. **

But we can't do this alone, Peter. Can I count on you to join the fight for the truth? Click below to donate.

[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61876547:J6kMWrGyN:m:1:3317145305:F66B7A50F62619C72A0FA67C2FEFD448:r)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61876548:J6kMWrGyN:m:1:3317145305:F66B7A50F62619C72A0FA67C2FEFD448:r)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61876549:J6kMWrGyN:m:1:3317145305:F66B7A50F62619C72A0FA67C2FEFD448:r)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61876550:J6kMWrGyN:m:1:3317145305:F66B7A50F62619C72A0FA67C2FEFD448:r)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61876551:J6kMWrGyN:m:1:3317145305:F66B7A50F62619C72A0FA67C2FEFD448:r)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61876552:J6kMWrGyN:m:1:3317145305:F66B7A50F62619C72A0FA67C2FEFD448:r)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61876553:J6kMWrGyN:m:1:3317145305:F66B7A50F62619C72A0FA67C2FEFD448:r)
[_**Donate $5,000 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61876554:J6kMWrGyN:m:1:3317145305:F66B7A50F62619C72A0FA67C2FEFD448:r)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61876546:J6kMWrGyN:m:1:3317145305:F66B7A50F62619C72A0FA67C2FEFD448:r)

Thank you,

Brent Bozell
Founder and President of MRC

_The mission of the Media Research Center is to create a media culture in America where truth and liberty flourish. The MRC is a research and education organization operating under Section 501(c)(3) of the Internal Revenue Code, and contributions to the MRC are tax-deductible._

The Jan. 6th Committee subpoenaed Trump — but without a massive surge of public pressure, experts say he could _completely disregard_ the order!

[**45,000 DEMOCRATS NEEDED BY MIDNIGHT: Sign our petition to DEMAND that Donald Trump testifies »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/trump-testify/?source=VPP_20221114_EMPET_E2_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=5377%2E878179%2ERvj6WF) | [**TAKE 10 SECONDS TO DEMAND THAT DONALD TRUMP TESTIFIES »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/trump-testify/?source=VPP_20221114_EMPET_E2_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=5377%2E878179%2ERvj6WF)

Here of just a few of the shocking revelations from the January 6th Committee’s previous hearings:
* Donald Trump knew that there was no significant voter fraud in the 2020 Presidential Election.
* Donald Trump communicated with the Oath Keepers and Proud Boys ahead of the January 6th armed insurrection.
* Donald Trump ignored the recommendations of his top advisors and top Republican officials and refused to end the deadly insurrection.

That’s why we’re gathering 45,000 Democrats on our petition demanding that Donald Trump testifies in front of the January 6th Committee.

[**But so far, NO ONE in your state has signed! So we’re reaching out to you directly: Sign our petition ASAP to DEMAND that Donald Trump testifies »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/trump-testify/?source=VPP_20221114_EMPET_E2_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=5377%2E878179%2ERvj6WF)

| | | Dear Friend --

My election is currently TOO CLOSE TO CALL. **We are in the lead, but the margins are so _razor_ _thin_ it's very likely there will be a RECOUNT.**

[This is where I need your help, Friend.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zst46v7kptng4904pfskc1qpsdint789buiiekeo_rp22sh2s8i66or0slj64pb2cjh2bs)

The Democrats clearly targeted my race, pouring millions in to prop up my lying Democrat opponent and attack me with baseless lies.

We stepped up and spent what we had to fend off their attacks by running ads, holding rallies and getting out the vote. The [generosity of grassroots conservatives](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zoc6qpcp7o0ogps2bu3597dg7u408qghvrf9oaa8_rp22sh2s8i66or0slj64pb2cjh2bs) like you, Friend, was the reason why we were able to counter their attacks and maintain our lead.

**Now that we are still in a fight for survival, I need[ your help once again](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsdsqtfca2rb61blcgofg0t67d50dvv6s38dk23g_rp22sh2s8i66or0slj64pb2cjh2bs). Please make a generous contribution as we prepare for the likely recount battle. **

| Time could not be more critical. We still don't know who will control Congress, but clearly keeping Colorado's 3rd District **RED** is essential. My seat is a MUST-WIN.

Let's face it, if it weren't for grassroots patriots, like you Friend, we'd be looking at sending a Nancy Pelosi rubber stamp to Congress. So, please step up to the plate and [chip in your most generous donation](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zptuee6u3nvthp0b4h5m6kdkotd5ihujpepts0sg_rp22sh2s8i66or0slj64pb2cjh2bs).

**We have to remain vigilant during this time, and we need[ your support](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8qnuracvd5aluff1sku5j1kdhnqkidpdkn9kie8_rp22sh2s8i66or0slj64pb2cjh2bs) to do so.** We must make sure no leftwing shenanigans affect the outcome.

I am absolutely confident that we will win, and I am looking forward to firing Nancy Pelosi very much. [Help me do it >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zs3frf5auil4hgp9cfd240mcijc9vrgkip08cq78_rp22sh2s8i66or0slj64pb2cjh2bs)

Lauren Boebert

Peter,

**The Federal Election Commission has one final financial deadline before the runoff: 11:59 p.m. on Wednesday. We have LESS THAN 48 HOURS to raise every dollar we can.**

**[Please don't let me come up short, Peter.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874712:6Uu67rGNB:m:1:3371220873:15ACD9C74B9DE94D596927E96611FACF:r)**

This is the financial report that Democrats will be following closely to see if we've been able to build momentum since the runoff was declared.

I am counting on you to help show the Left that conservatives will not give up the fight against the Democrats' policies that are destroying our country. **[Please, chip in whatever you can today to help me CLOSE THE GAP before the filing deadline tomorrow at midnight.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874712:6Uu67rGNB:m:1:3371220873:15ACD9C74B9DE94D596927E96611FACF:r)**

I know how to win, and I'm ready to win this battle for conservatives all over the country. However, I can't hold Senator Raphael Warnock accountable for his disastrous voting record without the help of patriots far and wide.

Senator Warnock has outraised us every single filing deadline, but with your help, we can put up some of our biggest numbers since the race began.

The deadline is TOMORROW. **[So, if you can chip in $25, $50, or maybe even $75 or $100, you'd be doing a great service to our nation and putting us one step closer to introducing Joe Biden and the Radical Left to the concept of checks and balances.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874712:6Uu67rGNB:m:1:3371220873:15ACD9C74B9DE94D596927E96611FACF:r)**

Thank you for continuing this fight with me. Your support is greatly appreciated.

Thanks,

Herschel Walker

name: Freedom Caucus
subject: Lauren Boebert Recount
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
Every vote should be counted, and every vote should count. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c6314%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=c4c3crvK45AlO%2bSwn10R2w&sysid=1)
| | |
---
|
---
Fellow Conservative: Every vote should be counted, and every vote should count.
In Colorado’s 3rd congressional district, conservative superstar **Lauren Boebert** is locked in a tight race against liberal Democrat Adam Frisch. With 99% of the votes in, Boebert led by just over 1,000 votes -- 0.4% of all votes cast.
Races this close in Colorado always go to a recount, and we all know what can happen when bureaucrats go behind closed doors with the ballots. In this race, it’s all about election integrity now.
**[Please support the Lauren Boebert Recount Fund!](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c82291%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1q6DZeEH8VSovig%2f6t05Qw&sysid=1)**
Rep. Boebert will need money to pay the costs of monitoring the process and enforcing the law, so every legally-cast vote is counted.
Boebert’s opponent will have the bottomless resources of the woke elite to draw on. Conservatives must help her answer, dollar for dollar.
**[You can help by supporting her recount fund today.](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c82292%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=I6hLLOr5M%2bKJnkxJ5L2O%2bA&sysid=1)**
_Individuals are allowed to contribute any amount up to $2,900 to this fund, and just like before, HFF will pay all processing fees and transfer 100% of your donation to her campaign._
If we want real election integrity, we must ensure every ballot gets the honest process it deserves.
Lauren Boebert won this race. A true recount will find that. But whether she gets a TRUE recount partly depends on us.
**[Please support Lauren Boebert and election integrity now.](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c82293%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GO7ePYAMs5hLOdln2GXJgA&sysid=1)**
Your support will pay for the lawyers, monitors, and other resources she will need to finish this fight.
If we work together, we can make the difference between a full, fair review of votes and a shadowy process behind closed doors.
Time is short. Lauren Boebert stands for freedom. Now we have to stand with her. The fight for election integrity is now the fight for a fair recount for Lauren Boebert in Colorado!
Thank you for helping us push so many of our Freedom Caucus candidates on to victory. We are grateful for your generous support. Sincerely,
---
---
Ray Yonkura Executive Director House Freedom Fund
---
|
---
|
---
**LAUREN BOEBERT RECOUNT**
---
---
Please help Lauren Boebert fight for a fair recount. Don't let the Democrats hijack the process and disenfranchise voters who want to send this fighter back to Washington.
---
[**DONATE NOW**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c82294%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FXuP5SsozGpIZuq8cJezXA&sysid=1)
---
|
---
_**"The House Freedom Fund helps grassroots candidates get the financial support they need to compete with establishment candidates." - Congressman Jim Jordan (R-OH)**_
---
|
---
---
House Freedom Fund
300 Independence Ave SE
Washington, DC 20003 House Freedom Fund (HFF) is a multi-candidate political action committee that helps elect conservative candidates to the U.S. House of Representatives. HFF only supports candidates who are dedicated to open, accountable, and limited government, and who support policies that promote liberty, safety, and prosperity for all Americans.

Paid for by House Freedom Fund. Not paid for at taxpayer expense. Contributions to House Freedom Fund are not deductible as charitable contributions. Contributions from corporations or foreign nationals lacking permanent resident status are not permitted. Federal law requires House Freedom Fund to report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a calendar year.
---

name: Jameson Ellis
subject: Climate change is a hoax (proof inside)...
body:
Oil & Gas fuel our economy, and that's why the WEF continues pushing the climate change narrative.

| | | |
---
**FELLOW PATRIOTS:**
Oil & Gas fuel our economy and that is why the WEF continues to push climate change...

When you hear people talk about “clean energy,” what they’re really referring to is a code word to mean less coal, fewer fossil fuels, and less nuclear. But eliminating these sources does not work... and all we have to do is look at Europe, which has dramatically decreased the production of these energy sources.

For example, Germany drastically eliminated coal and nuclear over the course of a couple of years, and now they are almost entirely dependent on Russian oil and natural gas. And ultimately, this is what the “green” movement is really about... American dependence on foreign supply.

It is an all-out assault on our independence and sovereignty as a nation.

**CLIMATE CHANGE IS A HOAX**
Before climate change was cool, global warming was... well, hot. But Dr. Willie Soon from Harvard challenged the mainstream narrative that global warming was caused by carbon emissions, and with documented evidence, he absolutely annihilated the global warming narrative.

That’s when they chose to instead call it what we now know it to be today: climate change.

**Watch the video below for proof.**

Don't forget to share and subscribe.

name: Conservatives Give
subject: How To Entirely Empty Your Bowels Every Morning - Top Surgeon Explains How
body:
To the Subscribers of Conservatives Give,

Many of our readers have expressed interest in the services offered by Gundry MD. We hope you benefit from the following message:
---
We've been told our whole lives to eat certain fruits, vegetables, and whole grains to stay in good health. However, according to Dr. Steven Gundry -- a world-renowned heart surgeon -- many so called **" health foods" in the American diet contain a dangerous toxin, that could be expanding your waistline.** **" This toxin causes micro-tears to form in your fragile intestinal-wall -- allowing bacteria and waste products to seep into your body."** Says Dr. Gundry. This harmful condition is best known as "leaky gut," and it's affecting millions of people nationwide. **Warning signs include weight gain, fatigue, digestive discomfort, stiff, achy joints, and even skin problems.** Dr. Gundry explains, "**These side effects are often mistaken for normal signs of aging, because leaky gut usually develops over a matter of years, and sometimes even decades. But I can assure you, the damage caused by these so called "health foods" is far from normal."** The good news is, this problem can be **easily fixed from your own home.** "It's very simple, you just have to know which foods are actually healthy, and which contain this hidden toxin," he goes on to explain. By simply eliminating this harmful toxin, Dr. Gundry has seen thousands of his own patients make swift recoveries. (In fact, he even lost 70lbs himself!) Now, after years of research, Dr. Gundry has decided to release an informative video to the public -- free and uninterrupted -- showcasing exactly which foods you need to avoid. "Good health is one of life's toughest obstacles," he explains. "So, if this video can help people achieve that, I'll be thrilled to hear I was of help." The video has since gone viral, first being shared by users on Facebook, then being featured on news sites like ABC and CBS. So far, the comments and feedback have been outstanding, with thousands of Americans feeling better than they have in decades. Most notable of which include legendary self-help guru Tony Robbins, Oscar award winning actor Alan Arkin, Grammy award winning singer Usher, and countless fortune 500 executives. Now, there is one thing Dr. Gundry asks from his viewers: "If watching this helps you take control of your weight back, fight unwanted cravings, increase your energy, ease gas and bloating, or find relief from stiff, achy joints," Dr. Gundry says... "Then please share this video with your friends and loved ones. Together, we can help as many people avoid these health issues as possible." This harmful condition is best known as "leaky gut," and it's affecting millions of people nationwide. Warning signs include weight gain, fatigue, digestive discomfort, stiff, achy joints, and even skin problems. Dr. Gundry explains, "These side effects are often mistaken for normal signs of aging, because leaky gut usually develops over a matter of years, and sometimes even decades. But I can assure you, the damage caused by these so called "health foods" is far from normal." The good news is, this problem can be easily fixed from your own home. "It's very simple, you just have to know which foods are actually healthy, and which contain this hidden toxin," he goes on to explain. By simply eliminating this harmful toxin, Dr. Gundry has seen thousands of his own patients make swift recoveries. (In fact, he even lost 70lbs himself!) Now, after years of research, Dr. Gundry has decided to release an informative video to the public -- free and uninterrupted -- showcasing exactly which foods you need to avoid. "Good health is one of life's toughest obstacles," he explains. "So, if this video can help people achieve that, I'll be thrilled to hear I was of help." The video has since gone viral, first being shared by users on Facebook, then being featured on news sites like ABC and CBS. So far, the comments and feedback have been outstanding, with thousands of Americans feeling better than they have in decades. Dr. Gundry also serves as the personal physician to many A-list celebrities. Most notable of which include legendary self-help guru Tony Robbins, Oscar award winning actor Alan Arkin, Grammy award winning singer Usher, and countless fortune 500 executives. Now, there is one thing Dr. Gundry asks from his viewers: "If watching this helps you take control of your weight back, fight unwanted cravings, increase your energy, ease gas and bloating, or find relief from stiff, achy joints," Dr. Gundry says... "Then please share this video with your friends and loved ones. Together, we can help as many people avoid these health issues as possible." Sent to Conservatives Give subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

subject: huge election update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Shemia Fagan
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=emailheader&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=emailheader&amount=25]
Team: we are on Cloud 9.
Voters across the country sent a clear message: they don’t want election deniers running their elections.
Every Election Denier and Trump-Endorsed Secretary of State candidate in a battleground state was defeated this election cycle.
Every voter who chose to defend our democracy, every donor, and every single one of you who believed in the work we do have made all of this possible.
None of this would have been possible without your support. We’ll never stop fighting to protect our democracy and we hope you’ll continue fighting with us. Please chip in anything you can today to keep fighting for Pro-Democracy candidates: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-nov22?refcode=em_fr_111522_b1_Jena_30ACC&amount=5]
Chip in $5 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-nov22?refcode=em_fr_111522_b1_Jena_30ACC&amount=5]
Chip in $25 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-nov22?refcode=em_fr_111522_b1_Jena_30ACC&amount=25]
Chip in $50 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-nov22?refcode=em_fr_111522_b1_Jena_30ACC&amount=50]
Chip in $100 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-nov22?refcode=em_fr_111522_b1_Jena_30ACC&amount=100]
Chip in $250 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-nov22?refcode=em_fr_111522_b1_Jena_30ACC&amount=250]
Chip in another amount >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-nov22?refcode=em_fr_111522_b1_Jena_30ACC&amount=5]
Thanks to your support of Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, we were able to boost some incredible candidates to victory:
Cisco Aguilar defeated election denier Jim Marchant, who helped organize a national right-wing slate of candidates under the name “America First”.
Adrian Fontes pulled out a huge victory against extremist Mark Finchem, who’s appeared on QAnon radios and attended the January 6th insurrection.
Jocelyn Benson won her re-election against Trump-endorsed candidate and election denier Kristina Karamo.
Steve Simon received the most votes in the entire state of Minnesota.
Maggie Toulouse Oliver outpaced incumbent Governor Michelle Lujan Grisham.
Shirley Weber became the FIRST Black woman to be Secretary of State in California and Stephanie Thomas became the FIRST Black woman to serve as Secretary of State in Connecticut.
Steve Hobbs was elected following his appointment becoming the first Democratic Secretary elected since 1965 and the state’s first AAPI Secretary.
We stopped election deniers from winning in key states in one of the most historic elections of our lifetimes. And that’s something to be incredibly proud of.
President Obama said it best:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-nov22?refcode=em_fr_111522_b1_Jena_30ACC&amount=5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-nov22?refcode=em_fr_111522_b1_Jena_30ACC&amount=5]
Democracy won this election cycle. And we must continue fighting for it. If you’re with us, chip in anything you can afford today: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-nov22?refcode=em_fr_111522_b1_Jena_30ACC&amount=5]

Thank you,
Jena Griswold
DASS Chair
DASS is a national organization supporting the election of Democratic Secretaries of State who are committed to protecting and preserving voting rights and ballot access for all Americans through fair, honest, open, and accurate elections.
Help us fight back against the GOP's voter suppression agenda by pitching in today!
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=footer-button&amount=25]

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Mitch McConnell said if he didn't get a majority this election he'd seriously consider retirement. Raphael Warnock’s re-election could be just the boost McConnell needs to think harder about spending more time with his family. Wouldn’t that be better for everyone?
body:

Vance, in Ohio. But it didn't get McConnell his white whale--a Senate majority that's ****seemingly all he lives for**** (Can't the man find a hobby??).**_ **_McConnell said before this election if he didn't get a majority he'd seriously consider retirement. Well, let's give the ole fella a push. By electing Raphael Warnock, gaining that 51st seat and putting McConnell that much further away from his dream--while Trump's antics undermine it further every day--a blow like this might just convince McConnell to walk away right now, as he said he was contemplating if he lost._**

name: Pride Fund Election HQ
subject: A Sincere Thanks for Making History!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Pride Fund to End Gun Violence PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Peter, **Thanks for all that you do in this important movement. You are appreciated more than you know.** Please take a minute to read about what you helped accomplish and about whats next in our movement. We need you to keep up the good work. As a follow up to our email a few days ago, we wanted to reiterate what a difference you made in this historic election. You voted, you donated, you volunteered, and you mobilized other voters to turn out at the polls. Working together, Pride Fund and all of you helped Democrats defy historical trends and keep control of the Senate and eliminate any major gains by Republicans in the House. Working together, we stopped the predicted "Red Wave" of Republicans winning in big numbers.

The values of a stable democracy, gun safety, health care, women's rights and the economy won on election day. In one exit poll of voters on Election Day, Democrats ranked gun policy as the second most important issue facing the country. In a different exit poll, gun policy was tied for third place as the issue that mattered most in deciding their votes. Gun reform was a big win.
We want our leaders in Washington and our Governors and state elected officials around the country to be truthful and have the backs of the American people, not disrupt our country over false election conspiracies and do the bidding of the NRA, putting us all at risk. The January 6th attack was a wakeup call for all of us, that we must stand up and fight like hell to protect our democracy from the far right and the hateful movement Donald Trump created.

[_**Will you donate to help us win the Senate race in Georgia that will have a run off on December 6th, and help us continue our momentum as the race for President starts to kick off?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/b52ITb9wcsbhDozYZMdfwoOfwLrPPNGvYcOE8de5lAE=/E1AxnhPYETgNK_1fDkOYlTqrCGaKKn3347ASoo0gUfs=?refcode=2022&amount=25&recurring=yes)

History shows us that in midterm elections, the political party in power usually makes big gains and often in big swings. It has been common for a political party to gain 20, sometimes 30 seats in the House. Your hard work prevented that from happening, while it is still too close to call, it appears Republicans will win control of the House, but by only a small handful of seats. If they do win, we will have to work hard to hold them accountable. We are lucky to have Democrats in control of the Senate to stop any legislation.

_**HERE IS WHAT COMES NEXT:**_

We absolutely must do everything possible to help Senator Raphael Warnock win his run off Senate race in Georgia. His win would give Democrats a CRUCIAL extra Senator to advance our agenda. What we have seen in the past is some extremely moderate Democrats like Joe Manchin and Kyrsten Sinema vote with Republicans on some key issues, keeping our agenda from moving forward. So that extra vote will be very crucial.

And we have prayed for years that we would never have to write the following, but based on media reports, Donald Trump will announce his plans to run for President in 2024 tonight in Florida. We all know the threat he poses to our country and our democracy. We must start our work immediately to ensure he doesn't become President.

[_**Will you stand with us to help Democrats win an extra Senate seat and begin our efforts to defeat Trump? Please donate today. Any amount will make a difference.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/b52ITb9wcsbhDozYZMdfwoOfwLrPPNGvYcOE8de5lAE=/E1AxnhPYETgNK_1fDkOYlTqrCGaKKn3347ASoo0gUfs=?refcode=2022&amount=25&recurring=yes) In gratitude,
Pride Fund Election Headquarters |
---|---
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/b52ITb9wcsbhDozYZMdfwoOfwLrPPNGvYcOE8de5lAE=/E1AxnhPYETgNK_1fDkOYlTqrCGaKKn3347ASoo0gUfs=?refcode=2022&amount=25&recurring=yes)
---
**To help us grow this movement, will you please forward this email to 2 friends to get them involved?**

Not subscribed to Pride Fund's emails? **[Sign up here.](https://act.myngp.com/el/b52ITb9wcsbhDozYZMdfwoOfwLrPPNGvYcOE8de5lAE=/Zi9YTI7QJ21rcRV-T3hOJxuVHqtpeI2Mc5RScnrj23w=)**

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/b52ITb9wcsbhDozYZMdfwoOfwLrPPNGvYcOE8de5lAE=/aY_nsBhH_E2i3DiLZ1Tnn3n_3Ga7nTmXPeyXQ9tuHc0=). Pride Fund to End Gun Violence

Washington DC 20007 United States

**🚨 BREAKING GA RUNOFF NEWS 🚨**

Peter, I have some disturbing news.

name: Freedom Caucus
subject: Don’t Let the Left Steal This One
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
Please support the Lauren Boebert Recount Fund!

| | |
---
|
---
Peter: Every vote should be counted, and every vote should count.
In Colorado's 3rd congressional district, conservative superstar **Lauren Boebert** is locked in a tight race against liberal Democrat Adam Frisch. With 99% of the votes in, Boebert led by just over 1,000 votes -- 0.4% of all votes cast.
Races this close in Colorado always go to a recount, and we all know what can happen when bureaucrats go behind closed doors with the ballots. In this race, it's all about election integrity now.
**[Please support the Lauren Boebert Recount Fund!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61876562:6Vl23rGvN:m:1:3317145305:BCB733A031597645FA25CB8EC12351CA:r)**
Rep. Boebert will need money to pay the costs of monitoring the process and enforcing the law, so every legally-cast vote is counted.
Boebert's opponent will have the bottomless resources of the woke elite to draw on. Conservatives must help her answer, dollar for dollar.
**[You can help by supporting her recount fund today.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61876562:6Vl23rGvN:m:1:3317145305:BCB733A031597645FA25CB8EC12351CA:r)**
_Individuals are allowed to contribute any amount up to $2,900 to this fund, and just like before, HFF will pay all processing fees and transfer 100% of your donation to her campaign._
If we want real election integrity, we must ensure every ballot gets the honest process it deserves.
Lauren Boebert won this race. A true recount will find that. But whether she gets a TRUE recount partly depends on us.
**[Please support Lauren Boebert and election integrity now.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61876562:6Vl23rGvN:m:1:3317145305:BCB733A031597645FA25CB8EC12351CA:r)**
Your support will pay for the lawyers, monitors, and other resources she will need to finish this fight.
If we work together, we can make the difference between a full, fair review of votes and a shadowy process behind closed doors.
Time is short. Lauren Boebert stands for freedom. Now we have to stand with her. The fight for election integrity is now the fight for a fair recount for Lauren Boebert in Colorado!
Thank you for helping us push so many of our Freedom Caucus candidates on to victory. We are grateful for your generous support. Sincerely,
---
---
Ray Yonkura Executive Director House Freedom Fund
---
|
---
|
---
**LAUREN BOEBERT RECOUNT**
---
---
Please help Lauren Boebert fight for a fair recount. Don't let the Democrats hijack the process and disenfranchise voters who want to send this fighter back to Washington.
---
| [DONATE NOW](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61876562:6Vl23rGvN:m:1:3317145305:BCB733A031597645FA25CB8EC12351CA:r)
---
|
---
_**" The House Freedom Fund helps grassroots candidates get the financial support they need to compete with establishment candidates." - Congressman Jim Jordan (R-OH)**_
---
|
---
---
House Freedom Fund
300 Independence Ave SE
Washington, DC 20003 House Freedom Fund (HFF) is a multi-candidate political action committee that helps elect conservative candidates to the U.S. House of Representatives. HFF only supports candidates who are dedicated to open, accountable, and limited government, and who support policies that promote liberty, safety, and prosperity for all Americans.

Paid for by House Freedom Fund. Not paid for at taxpayer expense. Contributions to House Freedom Fund are not deductible as charitable contributions. Contributions from corporations or foreign nationals lacking permanent resident status are not permitted. Federal law requires House Freedom Fund to report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a calendar year.
---

Peter,

**The Federal Election Commission has one final financial deadline before the runoff: 11:59 p.m. on Wednesday. We have LESS THAN 48 HOURS to raise every dollar we can.**

**[Please don't let me come up short, Peter.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61875472:66aG3rG6N:m:1:3369487795:38437F932B4E25DB6DE85A3FD849895E:r)**

This is the financial report that Democrats will be following closely to see if we've been able to build momentum since the runoff was declared.

I am counting on you to help show the Left that conservatives will not give up the fight against the Democrats' policies that are destroying our country. **[Please, chip in whatever you can today to help me CLOSE THE GAP before the filing deadline tomorrow at midnight.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61875472:66aG3rG6N:m:1:3369487795:38437F932B4E25DB6DE85A3FD849895E:r)**

name: Team Warnock
subject: 21 days. 7 million. $200,000.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
| | |
---
It’s official, friend. **Georgia is headed to a runoff election, and we need all hands on deck to power Rev. Warnock to victory. Here are three key numbers you need to know:**
**21 days.**
That's how long we have to defend this seat before the runoff election on Dec. 6.
**7 million.**
That's the number of registered voters across Georgia that we need to reach with our people-powered message.
**$200,000.**
That's how much more we’re aiming to raise before midnight to ramp up our voter mobilization efforts in this final stretch.

name: =?utf-8?Q?James=20Bradley?=
subject: The big announcement of 2024
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James
body:
| | | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=e910777460&e=fdefed58de)
---
PeterWell, I've got huge news. In 2018, I ran for Senate in California against one of the most ineffective members of the US Senate - Dianne Feinstein.In that primary, I got 556,252 votes - the most of any Republican in the race by far. As you know, however, California has a jungle primary system where only the top two vote-getters advance to the general election.Democrats stuck in a far-left progressive who got into second place and we did NOT have a general election contest.**Well, I’ve decided that in 2024 I am running once again to rematch against Dianne Feinstein - and this time, with the political winds in California having changed, I’m going to get to the general and defeat her.**
| [SUPPORT JAMES BRADLEY, LET’S BEAT DIANNE!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=899ed308df&e=fdefed58de)
---
Now, let’s discuss the data that informs this decision so that we can be upfront with each other.
1. Dianne Feinstein will be 91 years old at the time of the 2024 election but has still committed to running for the seat. That means at the end of her six-year term, she would be 97 years old. Now, I respect good genes as much as the next person, but no one should be deciding our laws in the US Senate at 97 years old.
2. The progressives in our state hate Dianne Feinstein. They think she is far too “conservative” despite having a 100% voting record with Joe Biden. The fight to replace her is going to be crowded and thanks to a very divided jungle primary, a well-funded Republican can get through and win.

So, as a Constitutional conservative who is common-sense and one of the leaders of the election integrity movement in California, I know that I can win this race.
[](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=2f710cf0c6&e=fdefed58de)
**Voters know me and I have the name recognition, but now I need the financial backing.** I’m starting EARLY so that by the time people begin to truly pay attention to this race we can be way ahead in fundraising and begin to unify the ticket.It works. Look at Lee Zelda. There was not a fierce primary. New Yorkers all unified around him and he pulled that state to heights no one expected. Frankly, he’s responsible for getting us the House. Now, Lee didn’t win... but we know why that * **truly** * was. We can do it, but we need to have a financial war chest that rivals Dianne’s.And we need to begin to learn how to compete with the Democrats with this ballot harvesting operation. We can’t continue to be “too good” for it. We have to focus on winning.
| [DONATE $25.00](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=fac7705344&e=fdefed58de)

name: Laurie Teper
subject: Geels Sign on 85 South / Confirm Your Election Day Vote Record
body:
Team Geels,
If you or you know who placed the Geels sign on 85 South, about 1 1/2 miles north of the 170 exit, please remove it. There are also multiple Ted Budd signs as well. Also, there are two large 4x8 signs unaccounted for. If you see them or they are on your property, please let me know.

The following was passed on to me by one of our volunteers. Please read and take action.

**URGENT Election Integrity Call To Action!!**

**If you voted on election day, please check here to see if it is showing up here.**

<https://vt.ncsbe.gov/RegLkup/>

I have checked several people who voted on election day and the record is not available. I am told that although early voting votes are showing up as required, election day votes are not required to be reported before the canvass meetings where the elections are certified.

County boards of elections will hold their canvass meeting at 11 a.m. Friday, November 18. The State Board will meet on Tuesday, November 29, to certify the election.

It is outrageous for us not to be able to see our votes 6 days after the election and before the election is certified.

Please draft your complaint and send it to the contacts below. Pass this email on if you can.

To:
Karen Brinsen Bell, Executive Director, NC State Board of Elections
[Karen.Bell@ncsbe.gov](mailto:Karen.Bell@ncsbe.gov)
Patrick Gannon, Public Information Director, NC State Board of Elections [Patrick.Gannon@ncsbe.gov](mailto:Patrick.Gannon@ncsbe.gov)

CC:
**Your County BOE Director**
Your NC legislators-
Legislator lookup for NC House and NC Senate <https://www.ncleg.gov/FindYourLegislators>

**Please forward your email replies from NCSBE to :**

**NC AUDIT FORCE EMAIL:**
**Carol Snow**
[cls28655@gmail.com](mailto:cls28655@gmail.com)

__Fighting for Truth, Justice and Unity Together!__
Laurie Teper
Volunteer Director
Courtney Geels for Congress NC04
Email: [volunteers@courtneygeelsforcongress.com](mailto:volunteers@courtneygeelsforcongress.com)
Cell: (847)212-5651
[courtneygeelsforcongress.com](http://courtneygeelsforcongress.com)

name: Josh Harder
subject: our race still isn’t called
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Harder for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/zm30jm2H1o5XxlD6Xu1YTa6wNhx7MoWu92lldi2jJCU=/keAUi7uaae_B-eFo-B94fxjPtLvUTvnsqb2rVv3hVGE=?refcode=E19439-20221115-RaceUpdate-header-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25) | Hi all - Well, here we are a week after Election Day and our race is still too close to call. We knew this was going to be close and we knew vote counting takes a _loooong_ time in California. Here's where we stand as of today:
* 48% of ballots have been counted and released publicly
* We currently are beating Republican Tom Patti 56% to 44%
* However, at least 80,000 ballots remain uncounted
* Included in this 80,000 are tens of thousands of mail-in ballots and drop box ballots

**What does this mean for us?** We're cautiously optimistic. We believe the race will tighten as more ballots are counted and we are waiting anxiously for more data points to understand where the results are headed. We've seen great results across the country (holding the Senate!) and we're watching closely what's going to happen here in California to understand if we hold the House. We weren't kidding when we said the House Majority was going to come down to our seat! I'll make sure to keep you in the loop as we learn more. We expect another drop of ballots tonight, so keeping our fingers crossed for good news... Talk soon,
Josh
---
* * *

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/zm30jm2H1o5XxlD6Xu1YTa6wNhx7MoWu92lldi2jJCU=/WRDVK8BBz4AwodixIQy42YL0AQZKcTNXYqOvQTVA0AU=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/zm30jm2H1o5XxlD6Xu1YTa6wNhx7MoWu92lldi2jJCU=/BMtETkBe6JDucb_CjsY276EuKjfCYZC3JGQEkhLhbhI=)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because CA-9 is one of our country's most pivotal tossup districts. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, we understand. You can click [**here**](https://act.myngp.com/el/zm30jm2H1o5XxlD6Xu1YTa6wNhx7MoWu92lldi2jJCU=/ZJFGEzlrrNyrTbVIycIuobKl2qUJtfoJIhzFS-HEcTs=?recipientId=JGP1LIgKX8KYGR8WifkGL1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com) to get only the most important updates, or you can [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/zm30jm2H1o5XxlD6Xu1YTa6wNhx7MoWu92lldi2jJCU=/70uJxgbrK9yyK9Eh7khltDpHg6tqgFQjQiMYREE_S1s=) here.

Josh is running for re-election to deliver for working families whose voices are too often ignored in DC. clean_body: Win the last race of 2022 | | | | | | | RUNOFF ELECTION TRIGGERED Election Day: Dec 6th Herschel Walker needs your support to win the final race of 2022! I know I've asked a lot from you, Peter. But the 2022 election just went into overtime, and a repeat defeat simply isn't an option. We wanted to win this race outright. But we battled back from a double-digit deficit this summer and forced a runoff in Georgia. That's all thanks to you. | | | This has been a long and grueling campaign. I can't thank you enough for sticking it out to the end. But I'm asking you to dig deep one last time and help Herschel Walker stay in this fight. Herschel's cash reserves are depleted, and liberal mega-donors are preparing to funnel MILLIONS into Raphael Warnock's campaign fund. "The only way to fight back and win this race is with your help. That’s why I’m coming to you and asking you to rush a contribution of any amount." | | | Democrats are gearing up for the fight of their lives in a desperate attempt to keep Georgia blue. Peter,

Raphael Warnock's runoff win last year is why Democrats control the Senate today.

Senator Warnock has voted for Joe Biden's disastrous agenda 96% of the time, so he is to blame for our country going in the wrong direction. We can hold him accountable, win this race and get our country back on track, _**[but we can only win if we have your help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61871859:JtrBJrG7N:m:1:3372944669:3BAF3F35F9E3EEEBE62D5B7C9516141A:r)**_

All eyes are on Georgia. If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51-seat majority where the most radical proposals will succeed. We cannot let that happen, Peter.

Senator Warnock and Democrat Super PACs have launched an advertising blitz that is flooding the airwaves. We already had over $70 million in false attack ads run against us in the general election, and now they're running even more in the runoff!

**[That's why I am asking for your help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61871859:JtrBJrG7N:m:1:3372944669:3BAF3F35F9E3EEEBE62D5B7C9516141A:r)**

The Georgia runoff will be the last fight of 2022, so WE MUST WIN IT! We can flip a Democrat seat in the Senate, but I need your help. I know money is tight in this Biden-Warnock economy, **[but if you can chip in even $25 right now- it will help us reach out to undecided voters, implement our 'get-out-the-vote' program, and win on December 6th!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61871859:JtrBJrG7N:m:1:3372944669:3BAF3F35F9E3EEEBE62D5B7C9516141A:r)**

Every single dollar impacts how many more doors we can knock on, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach. **[Please pitch in anything you're able ASAP, even if it's just $25.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61871859:JtrBJrG7N:m:1:3372944669:3BAF3F35F9E3EEEBE62D5B7C9516141A:r)**

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Final FEC runoff deadline is tomorrow
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874747:6fwjarG3N:m:1:3331421248:940A0228D302108BDF06D916DD837ACD:r)

---
Peter,

**The Federal Election Commission has one final financial deadline before the runoff: 11:59 p.m. on Wednesday. We have LESS THAN 48 HOURS to raise every dollar we can.**

**[Please don't let me come up short, Peter.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874747:6fwjarG3N:m:1:3331421248:940A0228D302108BDF06D916DD837ACD:r)**

This is the financial report that Democrats will be following closely to see if we've been able to build momentum since the runoff was declared.

I am counting on you to help show the Left that conservatives will not give up the fight against the Democrats' policies that are destroying our country. **[Please, chip in whatever you can today to help me CLOSE THE GAP before the filing deadline tomorrow at midnight.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874747:6fwjarG3N:m:1:3331421248:940A0228D302108BDF06D916DD837ACD:r)**

[** RUSH $25 -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874748:6fwjarG3N:m:1:3331421248:940A0228D302108BDF06D916DD837ACD:r)
[** RUSH $50 -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874749:6fwjarG3N:m:1:3331421248:940A0228D302108BDF06D916DD837ACD:r)
[** RUSH $75 -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874750:6fwjarG3N:m:1:3331421248:940A0228D302108BDF06D916DD837ACD:r)
[** RUSH $100 -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874751:6fwjarG3N:m:1:3331421248:940A0228D302108BDF06D916DD837ACD:r)
I know how to win, and I'm ready to win this battle for conservatives all over the country. However, I can't hold Senator Raphael Warnock accountable for his disastrous voting record without the help of patriots far and wide.

Senator Warnock has outraised us every single filing deadline, but with your help, we can put up some of our biggest numbers since the race began.

The deadline is TOMORROW. **[So, if you can chip in $25, $50, or maybe even $75 or $100, you'd be doing a great service to our nation and putting us one step closer to introducing Joe Biden and the Radical Left to the concept of checks and balances.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874747:6fwjarG3N:m:1:3331421248:940A0228D302108BDF06D916DD837ACD:r)**

Thank you for continuing this fight with me. Your support is greatly appreciated.

Thanks,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874747:6fwjarG3N:m:1:3331421248:940A0228D302108BDF06D916DD837ACD:r)

Herschel Walker

P.S. Federal law prohibits us from extending this runoff fundraising deadline, **[so please help us hit our goal before midnight tomorrow!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874747:6fwjarG3N:m:1:3331421248:940A0228D302108BDF06D916DD837ACD:r)**

Peter,

**The Federal Election Commission has one final financial deadline before the runoff: 11:59 p.m. on Wednesday. We have LESS THAN 48 HOURS to raise every dollar we can.**

**[Please don't let me come up short, Peter.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874456:J2mLarGKN:m:1:3360412034:0F6E7E07FF0BB5FFA34A9EACD7ECC727:r)**

This is the financial report that Democrats will be following closely to see if we've been able to build momentum since the runoff was declared.

I am counting on you to help show the Left that conservatives will not give up the fight against the Democrats' policies that are destroying our country. **[Please, chip in whatever you can today to help me CLOSE THE GAP before the filing deadline tomorrow at midnight.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874456:J2mLarGKN:m:1:3360412034:0F6E7E07FF0BB5FFA34A9EACD7ECC727:r)**

Senator Warnock has outraised us every single filing deadline, but with your help, we can put up some of our biggest numbers since the race began.

The deadline is TOMORROW. **[So, if you can chip in $25, $50, or maybe even $75 or $100, you'd be doing a great service to our nation and putting us one step closer to introducing Joe Biden and the Radical Left to the concept of checks and balances.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874456:J2mLarGKN:m:1:3360412034:0F6E7E07FF0BB5FFA34A9EACD7ECC727:r)**

Thank you for continuing this fight with me. Your support is greatly appreciated.

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874456:J2mLarGKN:m:1:3360412034:0F6E7E07FF0BB5FFA34A9EACD7ECC727:r)

Herschel Walker

This is the financial report that Democrats will be following closely to see if we've been able to build momentum since the runoff was declared.

I am counting on you to help show the Left that conservatives will not give up the fight against the Democrats' policies that are destroying our country. **[Please, chip in whatever you can today to help me CLOSE THE GAP before the filing deadline tomorrow at midnight.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874919:6wG2arGNk:m:1:3350876382:7B3737D8643BD7FE7A43CA091B57A84B:r)**

I know how to win, and I'm ready to win this battle for conservatives all over the country. However, I can't hold Senator Raphael Warnock accountable for his disastrous voting record without the help of patriots far and wide.

Senator Warnock has outraised us every single filing deadline, but with your help, we can put up some of our biggest numbers since the race began.

The deadline is TOMORROW. **[So, if you can chip in $25, $50, or maybe even $75 or $100, you'd be doing a great service to our nation and putting us one step closer to introducing Joe Biden and the Radical Left to the concept of checks and balances.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874919:6wG2arGNk:m:1:3350876382:7B3737D8643BD7FE7A43CA091B57A84B:r)**

Thank you for continuing this fight with me. Your support is greatly appreciated.

Thanks,

Herschel Walker

name: Lauren Boebert
subject: This is a Nail-Biter 😬 and I need your help!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LAUREN BOEBERT FOR CONGRESS
body:
My election is currently TOO CLOSE TO CALL. We are in the lead, but the margins are so razor thin it's very likely there will be
| | | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z43llgk9k54cbpge1lo824dqpoa8dnhpht4bc35o_rp22sh2s8i66or0slj69o30cph2bs)
---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zsec9fp9jmnt3hj9tb4knba5f6k6qgo5bo7t82eo_rp22sh2s8i66or0slj69o30cph2bs)
---
|
---
| | | Dear Friend --

My election is currently TOO CLOSE TO CALL. **We are in the lead, but the margins are so _razor_ _thin_ it's very likely there will be a RECOUNT.**

[This is where I need your help, Friend.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2za7utlshvbbvd4v0ma44d7bjhe2dkg7uevapfhq0_rp22sh2s8i66or0slj69o30cph2bs)

The Democrats clearly targeted my race, pouring millions in to prop up my lying Democrat opponent and attack me with baseless lies.

We stepped up and spent what we had to fend off their attacks by running ads, holding rallies and getting out the vote. The [generosity of grassroots conservatives](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zhdi62eshgdlg8krrd2ji2fvfpfi2jjof4r1sjv8_rp22sh2s8i66or0slj69o30cph2bs) like you, Friend, was the reason why we were able to counter their attacks and maintain our lead.

**Now that we are still in a fight for survival, I need[ your help once again](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z8iq9kbff79fn5f090c0q8k12hocejm570gh5meo_rp22sh2s8i66or0slj69o30cph2bs). Please make a generous contribution as we prepare for the likely recount battle. **

---
| [URGENT: PITCH IN $10 >>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z6p3vpsd3deol07gh8uqbvr7hulbcc0b8endanko_rp22sh2s8i66or0slj69o30cph2bs "URGENT: PITCH IN $10")
---
| [URGENT: PITCH IN $25 >>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zt29n0esgagbldg66bpaa5cqnebteors6p97ii7o_rp22sh2s8i66or0slj69o30cph2bs "URGENT: PITCH IN $25")
---
| [URGENT: PITCH IN $50 >>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zgk54mm5g60e2s8hf5l0aeqhjr7huevrivp4mvt0_rp22sh2s8i66or0slj69o30cph2bs "URGENT: PITCH IN $50")
---
| [URGENT: PITCH IN $100 >>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zitbfffc1uonp38ecgnh31dkujrk7iv4er9jmof8_rp22sh2s8i66or0slj69o30cph2bs "URGENT: PITCH IN $100")
---
| [URGENT: PITCH IN $250 >>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zfsmkpte3eu0pcb8qpglf5pth26ho768668bbji8_rp22sh2s8i66or0slj69o30cph2bs "URGENT: PITCH IN $250")
---
| Time could not be more critical. We still don't know who will control Congress, but clearly keeping Colorado's 3rd District **RED** is essential. My seat is a MUST-WIN.

Let's face it, if it weren't for grassroots patriots, like you Friend, we'd be looking at sending a Nancy Pelosi rubber stamp to Congress. So, please step up to the plate and [chip in your most generous donation](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zihdgi3e739u2pcr8dtd3bdvngosi8bqsgo9i828_rp22sh2s8i66or0slj69o30cph2bs).

**We have to remain vigilant during this time, and we need[ your support](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zcjk80aldsgr0vjv7aqhft6beobvohlm7vou1520_rp22sh2s8i66or0slj69o30cph2bs) to do so.** We must make sure no leftwing shenanigans affect the outcome.

name: Freedom Caucus
subject: Don’t Let the Left Steal This One
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
Every vote should be counted, and every vote should count.
[View this message in your browser](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjshh2oapldoq0uvom1qk14aebm2t9hci6tsovao_rp22sh2s8i66or0slj6aoj4cdh238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuij78bielqr0sbiegqb7ctl6tr779hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onmeur61c9hchieaddle5o7eptl6lrr6tdgekor8dllckr6co76m1j33cri64p71puie1p68dhgm9j74t1hepge1d3563gbacb4spj6cc9n6kq30sllcoqe9cr3cuobapbi4no)
| | |
---
|
---
Fellow Conservative: Every vote should be counted, and every vote should count.
In Colorado’s 3rd congressional district, conservative superstar **Lauren Boebert** is locked in a tight race against liberal Democrat Adam Frisch. With 99% of the votes in, Boebert led by just over 1,000 votes — 0.4% of all votes cast.
Races this close in Colorado always go to a recount, and we all know what can happen when bureaucrats go behind closed doors with the ballots. In this race, it’s all about election integrity now.
**[Please support the Lauren Boebert Recount Fund!](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zknjen2234hbq0eopjsfvq72us6svd2ho94dvrag_rp22sh2s8i66or0slj6aoj4cdh2bs)**
Rep. Boebert will need money to pay the costs of monitoring the process and enforcing the law, so every legally-cast vote is counted.
Boebert’s opponent will have the bottomless resources of the woke elite to draw on. Conservatives must help her answer, dollar for dollar.
**[You can help by supporting her recount fund today.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqr5qubbahpo9af5ol3dedgasgb9vfta1ugt2qs8_rp22sh2s8i66or0slj6aoj4cdh2bs)**
_Individuals are allowed to contribute any amount up to $2,900 to this fund, and just like before, HFF will pay all processing fees and transfer 100% of your donation to her campaign._
If we want real election integrity, we must ensure every ballot gets the honest process it deserves.
Lauren Boebert won this race. A true recount will find that. But whether she gets a TRUE recount partly depends on us.
**[Please support Lauren Boebert and election integrity now.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ze1a0kbqtjnmtphsq4a64ldegi1hpm7e5a0ns4g8_rp22sh2s8i66or0slj6aoj4cdh2bs)**
Your support will pay for the lawyers, monitors, and other resources she will need to finish this fight.
If we work together, we can make the difference between a full, fair review of votes and a shadowy process behind closed doors.
Time is short. Lauren Boebert stands for freedom. Now we have to stand with her. The fight for election integrity is now the fight for a fair recount for Lauren Boebert in Colorado!
Thank you for helping us push so many of our Freedom Caucus candidates on to victory. We are grateful for your generous support. Sincerely,
---
---
Ray Yonkura Executive Director House Freedom Fund
---
|
---
|
---
**LAUREN BOEBERT RECOUNT**
---
---
Please help Lauren Boebert fight for a fair recount. Don't let the Democrats hijack the process and disenfranchise voters who want to send this fighter back to Washington.
---
[**DONATE NOW**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2za4uj3krt7e7g4aaqlm0ocppv1tkci2egilu4mjo_rp22sh2s8i66or0slj6aoj4cdh2bs)
---
|
---
_**"The House Freedom Fund helps grassroots candidates get the financial support they need to compete with establishment candidates." – Congressman Jim Jordan (R-OH)**_
---
|
---
---
House Freedom Fund
300 Independence Ave SE
Washington, DC 20003 House Freedom Fund (HFF) is a multi-candidate political action committee that helps elect conservative candidates to the U.S. House of Representatives. HFF only supports candidates who are dedicated to open, accountable, and limited government, and who support policies that promote liberty, safety, and prosperity for all Americans.

Paid for by House Freedom Fund. Not paid for at taxpayer expense. Contributions to House Freedom Fund are not deductible as charitable contributions. Contributions from corporations or foreign nationals lacking permanent resident status are not permitted. Federal law requires House Freedom Fund to report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a calendar year.
---

---

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Access “C.S. Lewis on Christianity”
body:
You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis’s answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free 3-week study

| | | This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zoubvt1si4dn54q2vufiu1i0r04do3kofffaee1o_rp22sh2s8i66or0slj6eo32chh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis's answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free **3-week study group** on one of Hillsdale College's most popular online courses, **" C.S. Lewis on Christianity."**

C.S. Lewis is the best modern writer at explaining the truth and goodness of the Christian faith. Through his imaginative and invigorating style, Lewis answers the eternal questions of theology in a manner that attracts those outside Christianity and strengthens those within the faith. This course examines Lewis's writings about morality, conversion, prayer, the Bible, suffering, and the afterlife.

Here's a sample of what our online students are saying about the course.

_" Shares the story of C.S. Lewis in a way that is easy to understand. Very entertaining and thought-provoking." - Tammy from Georgia_

_" The course is organized very well. The instructor is a very gifted speaker who explains concepts clearly and passionately." - Bob from Colorado_

_" It gives the student insight into who C.S. Lewis really was as a man. He feels accessible all of a sudden. My wife gave me a compendium of eight volumes of his works, and I look forward to reading them now." - Mark from Washington_

**Join this exclusive study group on "C.S. Lewis on Christianity" for FREE-starting November 29.**

Reserve your spot here: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/cs-lewis-christianity-study-group](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z0r31ujfi2jeiag308hln9buqrvfmdjbbnrea620_rp22sh2s8i66or0slj6eo32chh2bs)

I hope you join us in this exploration of Lewis's timeless lessons on the truth and beauty of the Christian faith.

Warm Regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Peter,

Raphael Warnock's runoff win last year is why Democrats control the Senate today.

Senator Warnock has voted for Joe Biden's disastrous agenda 96% of the time, so he is to blame for our country going in the wrong direction. We can hold him accountable, win this race and get our country back on track, _**[but we can only win if we have your help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61871826:JXnlPrGEN:m:1:3369487795:47303CF7DA8AB2D1B198E565A11C198E:r)**_

_If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[**CHIP IN $25 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61871827:JXnlPrGEN:m:1:3369487795:47303CF7DA8AB2D1B198E565A11C198E:r)
All eyes are on Georgia. If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51-seat majority where the most radical proposals will succeed. We cannot let that happen, Peter.

Senator Warnock and Democrat Super PACs have launched an advertising blitz that is flooding the airwaves. We already had over $70 million in false attack ads run against us in the general election, and now they're running even more in the runoff!

**[That's why I am asking for your help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61871826:JXnlPrGEN:m:1:3369487795:47303CF7DA8AB2D1B198E565A11C198E:r)**

The Georgia runoff will be the last fight of 2022, so WE MUST WIN IT! We can flip a Democrat seat in the Senate, but I need your help. I know money is tight in this Biden-Warnock economy, **[but if you can chip in even $25 right now- it will help us reach out to undecided voters, implement our 'get-out-the-vote' program, and win on December 6th!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61871826:JXnlPrGEN:m:1:3369487795:47303CF7DA8AB2D1B198E565A11C198E:r)**

Every single dollar impacts how many more doors we can knock on, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach. **[Please pitch in anything you're able ASAP, even if it's just $25.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61871826:JXnlPrGEN:m:1:3369487795:47303CF7DA8AB2D1B198E565A11C198E:r)**

Thanks,

Peter,

**The Federal Election Commission has one final financial deadline before the runoff: 11:59 p.m. on Wednesday. We have LESS THAN 48 HOURS to raise every dollar we can.**

**[Please don't let me come up short, Peter.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874947:6hQIPrGdN:m:1:3317145305:094995A7B37E235230343CA30AD6D3B1:r)**

This is the financial report that Democrats will be following closely to see if we've been able to build momentum since the runoff was declared.

I am counting on you to help show the Left that conservatives will not give up the fight against the Democrats' policies that are destroying our country. **[Please, chip in whatever you can today to help me CLOSE THE GAP before the filing deadline tomorrow at midnight.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874947:6hQIPrGdN:m:1:3317145305:094995A7B37E235230343CA30AD6D3B1:r)**

I know how to win, and I'm ready to win this battle for conservatives all over the country. However, I can't hold Senator Raphael Warnock accountable for his disastrous voting record without the help of patriots far and wide.

Senator Warnock has outraised us every single filing deadline, but with your help, we can put up some of our biggest numbers since the race began.

The deadline is TOMORROW. **[So, if you can chip in $25, $50, or maybe even $75 or $100, you'd be doing a great service to our nation and putting us one step closer to introducing Joe Biden and the Radical Left to the concept of checks and balances.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874947:6hQIPrGdN:m:1:3317145305:094995A7B37E235230343CA30AD6D3B1:r)**

name: Liz Hall, Team Kilmer
subject: While we wait for more races to be called
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
In one of our most important midterm election years yet, Washington Democrats won up and down the ticket
Peter,

In one of our most important midterm election years yet, Washington Democrats won up and down the ticket. We the people re-elected Derek. We helped defend the Democratic Senate majority by re-electing Senator Patty Murray. We flipped Washington's 3rd District BLUE when Marie Gluesenkamp Perez defeated her opponent. And we defended Dr. Kim Schrier's vulnerable House seat.

Peter, while the House majority is still to be determined, one thing remains clear: **Democrats ' message of protecting our democracy, saving our planet, defending reproductive rights, and fighting for our values resonated with the American people.**

Derek is proud of the grassroots team that made these victories possible._No matter what_ happens with the Democratic House majority, we have to keep up this momentum.

We've set a goal to bring in 150 new monthly recurring donors before tonight's mid-month deadline. Monthly contributions are resources Derek can count on while he fights to defend our democracy and strengthen our economy. **[Will you commit to becoming a sustaining donor before tonight's deadline?](https://act.myngp.com/el/QSLtcp7FpUTY5YB-Nc3DGjuM1wd5wuMBm7EJCiv2ZwM=/4xFyMT1dNQY3nCXzJl-jdp5bJ7y_wPZxNpLBg0YAQZs=?refcode=em22_221115_mmrecu_fnd_gq_act___LH_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_221115_mmrecu_fnd_gq_act___LH_ettx&utm_medium=email&email={{EmailAddress%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&firstname={{FirstName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&lastname={{LastName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&zip={{ZipCode%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&recurring=auto)**

name: Adam Kinzinger
subject: Can you join me for a Zoom tonight?
body:
| Hi Friend -- I'd like us to come together tonight via Zoom to recap the election and discuss next steps. We'll also hear from some awesome conflict resolution experts who will teach us how to diffuse challenging family/friend political conversations ahead of the holidays. I think we can all get a lot of value out of this one, plus we'll have an opportunity for optional breakout sessions for us all to meet other reasonable people of goodwill from around the country. **It's tonight, Tuesday, November 15th at 8pm ET / 7pm CT / 6pm MT / 5pm PT.** [**Click here to RSVP for the Zoom link.**](https://www.country1st.com/fear_trust_campfire?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feartrust_fu_s&n=1) I know it's last minute, but can you make it? Country First, Adam
* * *

name: Dean Tran for Congress
subject: Will you please show your support as we wrap up the campaign?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dean Tran for Congress No longer want to receive these emails? [Unsubscribe](https://ct
body:
| | | | | | | | [ ](https://ct.klclick.com/f/a/0ZF3PZrhQzBBLrhqRoyKOg~~/AASl5QA~/RgRlVi6PP0RTaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZGVhbnRyYW4uY29tLz9fa3g9M0tJbERhT0t4c3ZaMVpVRno5WDZYbDgwcnpSUXdIXzIwUU5aZG9TSDYzYyUzRC5WeDliS0FXA3NwY0IKY2OPqXNj9k3ZS1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAFDRE~)

| | Dear , I would like to take this opportunity to express my deep gratitude for your support in my campaign to represent you in the U. S. Congress. Although the outcome was not what we hoped for, we are proud of the historic campaign that we ran. We listened to the people in the district, state, and country and crafted a message that would represent everyone who is enduring hardships in this devastating economy. My campaign and I are very proud that we ran a positive, ethical, and spirited campaign that was inclusive. During the days leading up to election day, we did everything that we could to continue to reach voters and get my message out. Running a campaign is costly and the expenses continue to come in. I am asking for your continued support with a donation to assist with the costs of our last minute get out the vote effort. I would sincerely appreciate any donation you can make to help me. name: Freedom Caucus
subject: Lauren Boebert Election Integrity
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
Please support the Lauren Boebert Recount Fund!

| | |
---
|
---
Peter: Every vote should be counted, and every vote should count.
In Colorado's 3rd congressional district, conservative superstar **Lauren Boebert** is locked in a tight race against liberal Democrat Adam Frisch. With 99% of the votes in, Boebert led by just over 1,000 votes -- 0.4% of all votes cast.
Races this close in Colorado always go to a recount, and we all know what can happen when bureaucrats go behind closed doors with the ballots. In this race, it's all about election integrity now.
**[Please support the Lauren Boebert Recount Fund!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61876539:J3lifrGNh:m:1:3253819041:6828A4C97E9A742A6A27FE752FD06D27:r)**
Rep. Boebert will need money to pay the costs of monitoring the process and enforcing the law, so every legally-cast vote is counted.
Boebert's opponent will have the bottomless resources of the woke elite to draw on. Conservatives must help her answer, dollar for dollar.
**[You can help by supporting her recount fund today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61876539:J3lifrGNh:m:1:3253819041:6828A4C97E9A742A6A27FE752FD06D27:r)**
_Individuals are allowed to contribute any amount up to $2,900 to this fund, and just like before, HFF will pay all processing fees and transfer 100% of your donation to her campaign._
If we want real election integrity, we must ensure every ballot gets the honest process it deserves.
Lauren Boebert won this race. A true recount will find that. But whether she gets a TRUE recount partly depends on us.
**[Please support Lauren Boebert and election integrity now.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61876539:J3lifrGNh:m:1:3253819041:6828A4C97E9A742A6A27FE752FD06D27:r)**
Your support will pay for the lawyers, monitors, and other resources she will need to finish this fight.
If we work together, we can make the difference between a full, fair review of votes and a shadowy process behind closed doors.
Time is short. Lauren Boebert stands for freedom. Now we have to stand with her. The fight for election integrity is now the fight for a fair recount for Lauren Boebert in Colorado!
Thank you for helping us push so many of our Freedom Caucus candidates on to victory. We are grateful for your generous support. Sincerely,
---
---
Ray Yonkura Executive Director House Freedom Fund
---
|
---
|
---
**LAUREN BOEBERT RECOUNT**
---
---
Please help Lauren Boebert fight for a fair recount. Don't let the Democrats hijack the process and disenfranchise voters who want to send this fighter back to Washington.
---
| [DONATE NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61876539:J3lifrGNh:m:1:3253819041:6828A4C97E9A742A6A27FE752FD06D27:r)
---
|
---
_**" The House Freedom Fund helps grassroots candidates get the financial support they need to compete with establishment candidates." - Congressman Jim Jordan (R-OH)**_
---
|
---
---
House Freedom Fund
300 Independence Ave SE
Washington, DC 20003 House Freedom Fund (HFF) is a multi-candidate political action committee that helps elect conservative candidates to the U.S. House of Representatives. HFF only supports candidates who are dedicated to open, accountable, and limited government, and who support policies that promote liberty, safety, and prosperity for all Americans.

Paid for by House Freedom Fund. Not paid for at taxpayer expense. Contributions to House Freedom Fund are not deductible as charitable contributions. Contributions from corporations or foreign nationals lacking permanent resident status are not permitted. Federal law requires House Freedom Fund to report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a calendar year.
