---
Peter,

**The Federal Election Commission has one final financial deadline before the runoff: 11:59 p.m. on Wednesday. We have LESS THAN 48 HOURS to raise every dollar we can.**

**[Please don't let me come up short, Peter.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874664:6DqZfrGTN:m:1:3359512271:3192BD5056A957F837DB4411A506B041:r)**

This is the financial report that Democrats will be following closely to see if we've been able to build momentum since the runoff was declared.

I am counting on you to help show the Left that conservatives will not give up the fight against the Democrats' policies that are destroying our country. **[Please, chip in whatever you can today to help me CLOSE THE GAP before the filing deadline tomorrow at midnight.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874664:6DqZfrGTN:m:1:3359512271:3192BD5056A957F837DB4411A506B041:r)**

[** RUSH $25 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874665:6DqZfrGTN:m:1:3359512271:3192BD5056A957F837DB4411A506B041:r)
[** RUSH $50 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874666:6DqZfrGTN:m:1:3359512271:3192BD5056A957F837DB4411A506B041:r)
[** RUSH $75 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874667:6DqZfrGTN:m:1:3359512271:3192BD5056A957F837DB4411A506B041:r)
[** RUSH $100 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874668:6DqZfrGTN:m:1:3359512271:3192BD5056A957F837DB4411A506B041:r)
I know how to win, and I'm ready to win this battle for conservatives all over the country. However, I can't hold Senator Raphael Warnock accountable for his disastrous voting record without the help of patriots far and wide.

Senator Warnock has outraised us every single filing deadline, but with your help, we can put up some of our biggest numbers since the race began.

The deadline is TOMORROW. **[So, if you can chip in $25, $50, or maybe even $75 or $100, you'd be doing a great service to our nation and putting us one step closer to introducing Joe Biden and the Radical Left to the concept of checks and balances.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874664:6DqZfrGTN:m:1:3359512271:3192BD5056A957F837DB4411A506B041:r)**

Thank you for continuing this fight with me. Your support is greatly appreciated.

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874664:6DqZfrGTN:m:1:3359512271:3192BD5056A957F837DB4411A506B041:r)

Herschel Walker

P.S. Federal law prohibits us from extending this runoff fundraising deadline, **[so please help us hit our goal before midnight tomorrow!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874664:6DqZfrGTN:m:1:3359512271:3192BD5056A957F837DB4411A506B041:r)**

body:
After a gunman killed eight people in a shooting spree in Atlanta, Senator Raphael Warnock vowed to do everything in his power to make sure families never have to endure that kind of tragedy.
#

Friends -
After a gunman killed eight people in a shooting spree in Atlanta, Senator Raphael Warnock vowed to do everything in his power to make sure families never have to endure that kind of tragedy.
He supported legislation that would close loopholes allowing people convicted of domestic abuse to access guns; he voted for background checks; and he voted to fund gun violence research.
He’s done all this representing the very purple state of Georgia.
Now he’s in a runoff election, and we simply cannot afford to lose his vote in the next Congress. This is mission critical for our movement, so please:
[**Can you split a contribution between Raphael Warnock’s re-election and Giffords PAC’s work to make our communities safer from gun violence?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-warnock.-vAtEH&refcode=em221115-1-15&t=1&akid=2747%2E3935704%2ElQ9Jl3)

name: Connor Boyack
subject: Did you see this?
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.readactnews.)
---
| | Hi Friend, I'm not sure if you saw the recent uproar in Dearborn, Michigan, where parents crashed a school board meeting to demand that objectionable books were removed from the library.

The big story behind it all was that Christian parents and Muslim parents had united to demand removal of certain books from their public school library.
---
| [](http://trk.readactnews.)
---
| | When I saw it, I couldn't help but ask a slightly different question: who will speak up for which books should be _in _public school libraries?

I'm glad that parents have freedom of speech to protest this-it's one of the best things about our country. And public school libraries matter. It's where kids go to pick books off the shelves that influence them at an early age.

That's why I'm concerned about _putting books into libraries_. If all we do is remove books from libraries, they'll eventually be empty.

But I want to put books into libraries that inspire kids to love liberty, learn more about our amazing country, and learn about classical economics and how the government should work.

A few years ago, these books didn't exist, so I wrote them!

---
| | Now, the Tuttle Twins books have sold millions of copies. But they are largely nonexistent in public school libraries, where so many kids look for their next read.

I'd like to get a set of Tuttle Twins books in every public school library in America. And my friends at Moms for Liberty have stepped up to hand deliver them. Would you like to see a set of Tuttle Twins books in a library near you?

**[_If so, go here and tell me your ZIP code so I can have our friends at Moms for Liberty get a set delivered to a public school near you. _](http://trk.readactnews.-fIpdKEgNw0re1W2g)
**
---
| [](http://trk.readactnews.-q4eJaQ)
---
| | Thanks for your support of this initiative. Let's get better books into libraries for our kids and help them learn to love liberty at a young age. Sincerely,

Connor Boyack
Author, Tuttle Twins
Founder, Libertas Institute
---
| | 2183 W Main St, Lehi, UT 84043, USA
Libertas Institute | Unsubscribe
---
PO Box 455, Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.readactnews.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzNjUxNjA3IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIzMTktYTNhNTg1ZGRlYTUwNGVjYWJkYWQ4YzYxYjUxMDg0YTQiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2V9/9E53rGN_hfbUsUTG_JoAoA) to unsubscribe.
---

name: LTC (Ret.) Alex Vindman
subject: I am writing to ask if you can you please make a contribution to VoteVets today? They will put your donation to work doing some of the most effective work to help Senator Warnock defeat Herschel Walker in the Georgia runoff.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
I’ve witnessed firsthand the corruption that Trump and his ilk have brought to the highest levels of government.
#
Derek -
In just a moment, I am going to ask you to make a contribution to VoteVets — one of the key organizations leading the fight to hold Republicans accountable and to win the runoff in Georgia. Please give me a chance to explain why this request is so important.
Here is the truth:
I’ve witnessed firsthand the corruption that Trump and his ilk have brought to the highest levels of government.
And we need more Democrats in Congress who are prepared to hold Republicans accountable for the radical shift their party has taken during the Trump era.
**That is why I was proud to work alongside VoteVets as a Senior Advisor as they fought to re-elect Mark Kelly in Arizona — including a massive independent expenditure that helped deliver the win.**
But we cannot stop now. VoteVets has a crucial role to play in the Georgia runoff. We’ll turn out Democratic veterans, and we’ll run ads that reach Independent voters and move polls. But we cannot do it alone:
[**Can you please make a $3 contribution to VoteVets today? body:
Friend, what if I told you that you could help us win our critical race here in Georgia for the price of a cup of coffee?
| | |

It's true!

Georgia is now the key to expanding Senate control, and with all signs pointing to a tight race, we're running out of time to raise the funds we need to power this campaign to victory.

**[When you donate $5 today (the price of just a cup of coffee), every dollar will go directly toward reaching as many voters as we possibly can in this crucial final stretch. Please, can you chip in now to keep Georgia blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54624321/379134636/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5059-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzJkZjFlOC1mNjY0LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_N-vbO3MOog9MFZfaWoNkvCEn6Ly3HPYD40qgG9Eaf0=)**

That's because I'm in this race to represent everyday folks, not corporations and megadonors. **But that means I can't fight back against this flood of GOP spending, pull ahead, and win in the next 21 days without grassroots supporters like you, chipping in $5 at a time.**

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: Acting like a loser
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Team Graham, Inc
body:
Herschel Walker and Warnock are virtually tied. |
---
Fellow American,

Raphael Warnock is already acting like a loser.

Warnock raised millions of dollars over the last two years, and every mainstream media outlet tried to destroy Herschel on his behalf, **but he STILL couldn't get more than 50% of votes in Georgia!**

Fellow American, the result of the Senate race in Georgia is proof that you can't buy a seat, but I can tell you that _**lack of funding can lose a race**_. If we don't act now, Herschel's lack of money could lose us this seat. He needs resources for television ads, direct mail to reach all Georgians, and door-to-door voter contact. In the General Election, Herschel was outraised 3 to 1, **[so I need you to help us blow up Herschel's fundraising right now.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61123570:sdJdaTDFN:m:1:877327319:DAF448602C6DC3416648D1C81A8AB014:r)**

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61123570:sdJdaTDFN:m:1:877327319:DAF448602C6DC3416648D1C81A8AB014:r)
We need to make today the best fundraising day we've had this year. **[Can you chip in $10, $20, or maybe even $100 to make that happen?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61123570:sdJdaTDFN:m:1:877327319:DAF448602C6DC3416648D1C81A8AB014:r)**

I'll do whatever I can to help Herschel. I'm going to knock on doors, I'm going to make calls, and I'll be in Georgia until we win this thing. I'm all in Fellow American. **[Are you with me?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61123570:sdJdaTDFN:m:1:877327319:DAF448602C6DC3416648D1C81A8AB014:r)**

**[Warnock is going to lose if we give Herschel the resources he needs for the next 21 days. He needs us now. Do you have Herschel's back?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61123570:sdJdaTDFN:m:1:877327319:DAF448602C6DC3416648D1C81A8AB014:r)**

**[Please join Team Herschel today and chip in $10 or more immediately.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61123570:sdJdaTDFN:m:1:877327319:DAF448602C6DC3416648D1C81A8AB014:r)**

Thanks,

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61123570:sdJdaTDFN:m:1:877327319:DAF448602C6DC3416648D1C81A8AB014:r)

Lindsey Graham

| [** DONATE TODAY -> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61123570:sdJdaTDFN:m:1:877327319:DAF448602C6DC3416648D1C81A8AB014:r)

Republicans need all the support we can get, and we have one last battle we have to fight: **GEORGIA. **

Herschel Walker is on the ground talking to as many Georgia voters as he can, but he needs your help.

This race is going to be tight, Peter, and YOUR help could be the tipping point in the peach state.

subject: Kevin McCarthy Must Go
body:
Here’s how to make that happen. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/citizensrenewingamerica.com/were-on-the-offensive-9537511?e=17913c7d6d)
---
| | |
---
| | |
#
Friends,

As Republicans are poised to regain control of the House of Representatives and begin the process of installing a new Speaker, one thing is certain: _we need a war-time Speaker of the House_.

I’m talking about a fighter who is not afraid to go to battle against Biden’s woke progressive agenda and the weaponized deep state. **That person is not Kevin McCarthy.**

As I recently told [Fox News](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=c58a2d0174&e=17913c7d6d), "We need a wartime leader who eats confrontation with his adversaries for breakfast and is committed to an America First agenda... Saving the country requires nothing less."

The good news is conservatives have the power to stop McCarthy, if they band together to block and veto him until they find an acceptable America First candidate.

Here’s how:
---
|
---
| **A Blueprint to Stop Kevin McCarthy as Speaker**
---
| [ ](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=54764aa72c&e=17913c7d6d)
---
I put out a [tweet thread](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=bd3640db68&e=17913c7d6d) last week explaining why Kevin McCarthy is in serious trouble as a candidate for Speaker and what can be done to stop him. The thread quickly picked up the attention of media and conservatives hoping for a real change of leadership in the House.

The thread, which has quickly gained thousands of likes and retweets, explains in detail why both procedurally and politically McCarthy’s bid for Speaker is in trouble.
| [ ](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=d103deda0c&e=17913c7d6d)
---
I then went on to offer a clear path forward for conservatives in the House to thwart a McCarthy Speakership.

| This past week I joined [Fox News](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=56e5f688f3&e=17913c7d6d), [Bannon’s War Room](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=7b8c273a2c&e=17913c7d6d), and [Rep. Matt Gaetz’s podcast](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=3c9cf515cc&e=17913c7d6d) to make the case for conservatives to reject McCarthy and choose a paradigm-shifting Speaker who will wake up every morning and take it to the adversary.

As I [explained](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=dcc754b2ad&e=17913c7d6d) on Fox News, the behind-closed-doors “cartel vote” to choose candidates for Speaker is critical:

_“It’s important for enough House Republicans to stand up and say we’re done with this. We’re done with the cartel-Speaker, the peacetime Speaker. We want real change. We actually want to save the Country in this late house and we want someone else.”_

We can stop McCarthy and find conservatives willing to go to battle against the Left’s destructive woke agenda that is destroying our country.

**We’ll never stop fighting. **

Russ Vought

name: =?utf-8?Q?Josh=20Quill?=
subject: I'm Announcing My Campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Quill for Virginia_
body:
Rising costs & rampant inflation are tightening our finances. Our schools are failing to give our children the quality of education that they deserve. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/70893df1ba9d/today-im-announcing-my-campaign-15060329?e=8787be5d90)
---
| | |
---
|
---
| [Donate](https://quillforvirginia.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4748996a05a433fd69cc0588e&id=ba4db38410&e=8787be5d90 "Donate")
---
| | | Dear , Over the last few years, I’ve watched as the American Dream has slipped out of reach for many of the families around me. Rising costs and rampant inflation are tightening our finances. Our schools are failing to give our children the quality of education that they deserve. And an all-out assault on our law enforcement and a failure at our southern border are causing our communities to be less safe. Community is important to me. My desire to serve began as an Eagle Scout in high school, and has continued today through coaching my son’s soccer team and leading his Cub Scout den. Now I’ve realized that’s not enough. If we want to change the direction our country is headed, we need to elect leaders who will fight to do what’s best for our community. That’s why I’m announcing my candidacy for the Virginia House of Delegates to represent District 21. Let me introduce myself. My name is Josh Quill. I’m a second generation Hispanic immigrant, born in rural upstate New York. Growing up, my family often struggled to put food on the table. Coming from humble beginnings I’ve experienced first-hand what it means to achieve the American Dream, and it pains me to see it being ripped away from our children by reckless Democrat policies. After graduating high school, I enlisted in the Marine Corps, where I spent a decade in service to our country. After getting out the Marines, I earned a bachelor’s degree and two master’s degrees while working to improve our country’s Veteran Policy. In 2018, I was appointed to serve in the Department of Veteran Affairs under the Trump Administration. Serving our Veterans and their families was an honor, and since leaving the administration I’ve continued to work to ensure that the men and women who have risked their lives in service to our country receive the benefits they deserve.
---
|
---

I live in Gainesville with my beautiful wife, Jessica, our seven year old son and our two year old daughter.

I’m running for Delegate because I see the direction we’re heading, and I don’t want that future for my children.
---
|
* I don’t want our children to live in a country where they don’t feel safe walking down the street.
* I don’t want our children to worry about being able to both fill up their gas tank and put food on the table.
* I don’t want our children to go to a school that doesn’t incentivize them to learn.

We have to do better. As Delegate, I will do everything that I can at the state level to bring down the cost of living for hard-working Virginia families, fix our education system by requiring schools to teach our children how to think – instead of what to think, and give our law enforcement the support that they need to combat crime and keep our community safe. I’m excited to kick off my campaign and to enact real change to benefit our community – but I’m going to need your help to do it. The 21st District is extremely competitive, and we already know that the Democrats will spend hundreds of thousands of dollars to stop me from winning. [Can I count on you today to chip in $10, $25, $50, $100, or as much as you are able to help me kick off my campaign and start spreading my message to the voters of the 21st District?](https://quillforvirginia.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4748996a05a433fd69cc0588e&id=2e69ab4e03&e=8787be5d90)
---
| [Contribute $10](https://quillforvirginia.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4748996a05a433fd69cc0588e&id=fe177d46d9&e=8787be5d90 "Contribute $10")
---
| [Contribute $25](https://quillforvirginia.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4748996a05a433fd69cc0588e&id=5562381b1f&e=8787be5d90 "Contribute $25")
---
| [Contribute $50](https://quillforvirginia.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4748996a05a433fd69cc0588e&id=821ff04548&e=8787be5d90 "Contribute $50")
---
| [Contribute $100](https://quillforvirginia.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4748996a05a433fd69cc0588e&id=5d982a0a4a&e=8787be5d90 "Contribute $100")
---
| [Contribute any amount](https://quillforvirginia.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4748996a05a433fd69cc0588e&id=95b0d75753&e=8787be5d90 "Contribute any amount")
---
| I’m tired of watching our country go down a path that makes life harder for my friends and neighbors. I’m scared that the American Dream won’t be achievable for our children the way it was for me. Together, we can work to combat the Democrats’ dangerous policies and ensure that our children have the future they deserve. I hope I can count on your support this year! For Virginia,
---
|
---
| Josh Quill
---
|
---
Republican Candidate
Virginia House of Delegates
District 21

[www.QuillforVirginia.com](https://quillforvirginia.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4748996a05a433fd69cc0588e&id=0766521185&e=8787be5d90)

name: Freedom Caucus
subject: Lauren Boebert Recount
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
House Freedom Fund Fellow Conservative: Every vote should be counted, and every vote should count. In Colorado’s 3r
| | |
---
|
---
Fellow Conservative: Every vote should be counted, and every vote should count.
In Colorado’s 3rd congressional district, conservative superstar **Lauren Boebert** is locked in a tight race against liberal Democrat Adam Frisch. With 99% of the votes in, Boebert led by just over 1,000 votes — 0.4% of all votes cast.
Races this close in Colorado always go to a recount, and we all know what can happen when bureaucrats go behind closed doors with the ballots. In this race, it’s all about election integrity now.
**[Please support the Lauren Boebert Recount Fund!](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6r16v3d0ish6sm0ienacc3ncfu2uecptj428dc8_rp22sh2s8i66or0slgm2oj4cph2bs)**
Rep. Boebert will need money to pay the costs of monitoring the process and enforcing the law, so every legally-cast vote is counted.
Boebert’s opponent will have the bottomless resources of the woke elite to draw on. Conservatives must help her answer, dollar for dollar.

name: Freedom Caucus
subject: Lauren Boebert Recount
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
Please support the Lauren Boebert Recount Fund!

| | |
---
|
---
Peter: Every vote should be counted, and every vote should count.
In Colorado's 3rd congressional district, conservative superstar **Lauren Boebert** is locked in a tight race against liberal Democrat Adam Frisch. With 99% of the votes in, Boebert led by just over 1,000 votes -- 0.4% of all votes cast.
Races this close in Colorado always go to a recount, and we all know what can happen when bureaucrats go behind closed doors with the ballots. In this race, it's all about election integrity now.
**[Please support the Lauren Boebert Recount Fund!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61876494:JdKsnrGNo:m:1:3331421248:8A0ECE5088466C844DC369DF68895DD9:r)**
Rep. Boebert will need money to pay the costs of monitoring the process and enforcing the law, so every legally-cast vote is counted.
Boebert's opponent will have the bottomless resources of the woke elite to draw on. Conservatives must help her answer, dollar for dollar.
**[You can help by supporting her recount fund today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61876494:JdKsnrGNo:m:1:3331421248:8A0ECE5088466C844DC369DF68895DD9:r)**
_Individuals are allowed to contribute any amount up to $2,900 to this fund, and just like before, HFF will pay all processing fees and transfer 100% of your donation to her campaign._
If we want real election integrity, we must ensure every ballot gets the honest process it deserves.
Lauren Boebert won this race. A true recount will find that. But whether she gets a TRUE recount partly depends on us.
**[Please support Lauren Boebert and election integrity now.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61876494:JdKsnrGNo:m:1:3331421248:8A0ECE5088466C844DC369DF68895DD9:r)**
Your support will pay for the lawyers, monitors, and other resources she will need to finish this fight.
If we work together, we can make the difference between a full, fair review of votes and a shadowy process behind closed doors.
Time is short. Lauren Boebert stands for freedom. Now we have to stand with her. The fight for election integrity is now the fight for a fair recount for Lauren Boebert in Colorado!
Thank you for helping us push so many of our Freedom Caucus candidates on to victory. We are grateful for your generous support. Sincerely,
---
---
Ray Yonkura Executive Director House Freedom Fund
---
|
---
|
---
**LAUREN BOEBERT RECOUNT**
---
---
Please help Lauren Boebert fight for a fair recount. Don't let the Democrats hijack the process and disenfranchise voters who want to send this fighter back to Washington.
---
| [DONATE NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61876494:JdKsnrGNo:m:1:3331421248:8A0ECE5088466C844DC369DF68895DD9:r)

**The Federal Election Commission has one final financial deadline before the runoff: 11:59 p.m. on Wednesday. We have LESS THAN 48 HOURS to raise every dollar we can.**

Senator Warnock has outraised us every single filing deadline, but with your help, we can put up some of our biggest numbers since the race began.

The deadline is TOMORROW. **[So, if you can chip in $25, $50, or maybe even $75 or $100, you'd be doing a great service to our nation and putting us one step closer to introducing Joe Biden and the Radical Left to the concept of checks and balances.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874314:JcSknrGtN:m:1:3361486117:1B83A7BCE46BD4CBD4E871A868D6FF76:r)**

name: Draft DeSantis
subject: Look at the damage Biden caused
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61878978:Jkq-nrGtN:m:1:3350876382:BBA37EA30F8D9124E60091DAC6D5F236:r)

Peter,

In 2020, Ron DeSantis was criticized for keeping schools open.

But today's National Assessment of Educational Progress (NAEP) results once again prove that **_Ron made the right decision_. **

In Florida, adjusted for demographics, 4th-grade students are #1 in both Reading and Math! This the highest NAEP Ranking in the state's history.

Ron made the right call in Florida. Now we need him to make the right calls for our nation.

We're Ready for Ron, an America First grassroots movement working to recruit Ron for President. We've set a goal to raise $35,000 by the end of November to help us gain more signatures to convince Ron to run in 2024.

[_**If you 're ready to put America's children first, click here to send your urgent gift >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61878978:Jkq-nrGtN:m:1:3350876382:BBA37EA30F8D9124E60091DAC6D5F236:r)

**It was Biden's decision to shut down schools that had****terrible consequences for America's children.**

In 2022, _the average fourth-grade mathematics score_ _**decreased**_ _by 5 points_ and was lower than all previous assessment years going back to 2005.

_The average eighth-grade mathematics score_ _**decreased**_ _by 8 points_ compared to 2019 and was lower than all previous assessment years going back to 2003.

_**Can America 's children afford to keep falling behind?**_

You can help us meet our goal before the end of the month by**clicking below and donating.**

[_**Click here to help recruit Ron for President >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61878978:Jkq-nrGtN:m:1:3350876382:BBA37EA30F8D9124E60091DAC6D5F236:r)

Thank you,

Draft DeSantis

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: please, don't scroll away
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
Friend – I'll keep this short:

Our Senate race in Georgia is officially going to a runoff election. With less than 30 days to defend my seat, Republicans are doing everything in their power to defeat me.

That's why Donald Trump has visited our state multiple times to rally the GOP base for my opponent, Herschel Walker – and why Mitch McConnell's super PAC has spent millions smearing me with attack ads.

I don't take a cent from corporate PACs, so I'm fully counting on your grassroots support to power our movement to victory. We’ve done this once before, and I know we can do it again.

So please, friend, will you split a donation between me and Kirsten Gillibrand – or as much as you can spare today – to help me defeat Herschel Walker and win in Georgia? https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock_gfs?

Thank you for all that you do. None of this would be possible without you.
– Rev. Raphael Warnock
[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]

name: 1600 Daily
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our presi
This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zicfh1a4o165c0c2suhtvulj9qe11memdrr6kf7o_rp22sh2s8i66or0slgm2oj2clh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2za7n6cht53qt1fb8js5j6t2kev7e6jkahgg4ogq0_rp22sh2s8i66or0slgm2oj2clh2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9bqah804pg8qtjfhm1qkjob95vq4d95n88o3fmo_rp22sh2s8i66or0slgm2oj2clh2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

clean_body: A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our presi This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection. By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below: For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty. This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;” Reaching over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty; Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people; Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and Restoring excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide. Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future. So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below: And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for 1600 Daily, . 625 First St #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: =?utf-8?Q?JAMES=20JUDGE?=
subject: Seriously, thank you for your support!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James Judge for Congress
body:
(NOTE: This email was written this morning personally by me, to you and the rest of my supporters. I appreciate your time in reading it and any... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/40b6eb7e6e2f/running-for-congress-in-my-hometown-13691804?e=00028e5542)
---
Good morning,(Note: This email was written this morning, personally, by me, to you and the rest of my supporters. I appreciate your time in reading it and any responses you may have.)First and foremost, thank you so much for your support over the last year. It was an honor and an incredible experience. I’d like to take a moment to go over some brief facts and some of what we accomplished. I also want to discuss what the future may hold.It is important to note, the only financial support I received during this campaign was from people like you, my friends and my family. The following items are not complaints or grievances, but facts, which I hope will put the situation in context. Unlike many candidates, my campaign received ZERO support from Governor Ron DeSantis, the National Republican Congressional Committee, Club for Growth, Kevin McCarthy’s Congressional Leadership Fund and other conservative political action committees.Other Republican candidates in the district and around the area actually raised money in my district by telling other people that this seat was unwinnable, essentially working against me and indirectly helping Kathy Castor to keep her seat, while putting control of the U.S. House of Representatives in jeopardy.This was a redistricting year, which happens after each census. Through the redistricting process, this district became more favorable to Democrats than it ever has been before, giving Kathy Castor a significant advantage from the outset.Despite these circumstances, we accomplished far more than anyone thought possible, and we did it with a shoestring budget.Here are a few important facts to remember:
* We far outperformed expectations and came closer than anyone has ever come to beating Kathy Castor, in what was the hardest district to ever compete against Castor (Kathy Castor 56.9% – James Judge 43.1%) (According to the experts, I was supposed to lose by 20 points)
* Last election, Castor defeated her opponent 60.3% – 39.7% and that was when the map was more favorable for Republicans
* Castor has won every election up until this point by at least approximately 10 percent, and often more than 70 percent of the vote – that was when the district map was more favorable for Republicans
* According to the Hillsborough County Supervisor of Elections, we won on Election Day with 53.68% of the votes
* According to the Hillsborough County Supervisor of Elections, we won in early voting with 52.52% of the votes. This is despite more Democrats showing up to vote in Hillsborough County than Republicans during the early voting period.
* We made Kathy Castor spend more than $1.5 million, money which would have gone to support other Democrats, had she not had a strong challenger.
* Castor was forced to spend somewhere around $15 a vote, while we were only financially able to spend about $1 per vote.
* We did all of this despite not having the money to buy TV or radio advertisements, and with zero PACs buying TV or radio ads to support us.

While the Republican Party may not have believed that I was a viable candidate, we proved that I was the most viable candidate to ever face Kathy Castor.Had we have had the backing and financial support of the Republican party and local Republican fundraisers; this could have been a very different race.Instead, the party and political action committees spent millions of dollars to defeat other Republicans in the primary process.Going forward, I would encourage you to consider a few things.First, if you support these groups, please demand that they stop destroying Republican candidates in the primary process.Regardless of how you feel about these candidates, Republican groups spent several million dollars here in the Tampa Bay area to destroy Kevin Hayslett and Anna Paulina Luna in the primary process.This was not an isolated incident. It happened over and over in races throughout the country.Second, please insist that they support all of the Republican nominees who make it out of the primary process, regardless of what the odds say. Despite my support for Kevin Hayslett in the primary, I supported Anna Paulina Luna in the general election, because it was the right thing to do for our country, and in order to get radical leftists out of Washington.Good, Christian, conservative candidates like Scotty Moore in Orlando and myself here in the Tampa Bay area, could have had a much better shot and likely won our elections with the millions of dollars these groups wasted on primary races and in other general election races that were already heavily in favor of Republicans.Going forward, I am headed back to work at Judge Public Relations, and I will be helping good Republican candidates to get elected by taking on and consulting political campaigns in the future. I believe we have proven we have what it takes to run effective, competitive political campaigns for a fraction of the cost.Additionally, I am weighing my own political options for the future.From what I have been told, there is a strong chance that the Florida Supreme Court will reject the redistricted map and likely make this district much more competitive, so it will no longer heavily favor Democrats.If that happens, I believe I will likely run against Kathy Castor again, but I will only do so if I have your support, the support of the local Republican clubs and executive committees, and the support of the Republican party.I am tired of extremism. I want stability. I want to return to Godly values. I want to ensure that our freedoms remain intact, and I want to get the government out of my life.I would like to thank you and all of those people who supported this race.I especially want to thank my wife Danielle for tolerating the daily insanity of running a Congressional campaign. She put up with the stress, days without seeing me, where I would have breakfasts, lunches and dinners scheduled, along with often attending 2-3 events a day.I also want to thank my family, my mom, dad, stepdad, sisters, in-laws, and of course, my team, which includes: Peter G, Peter D, Sam B, Thomas D, John V, Michael M, Sheila H, Dawn S, Don K, Ernest W, Terrence O, Luke D, Christy M, Justin C, Matt T, Jonathon P, and so many more. (As a precaution, I did not list last names because I don’t want to put them in any jeopardy for supporting my race, but you know who you are.) If I missed you, text me and I will make sure to say thanks personally!I also want to thank those who endorsed me, Senator Rick Scott, the Florida Police Benevolent Association (PBA), Tampa PBA, Pinellas Sheriff Bob Gualtieri, Clearwater Mayor Frank Hibbard, Retired Pinellas Sheriff Jim Coats, Retired St. Petersburg Mayor Rick Baker, Congressman Brian Mast, Congressman Paul Gosar, Retired Congressman Ted Yoho, Roger Stone, Chris Chambers, the Associated Builders & Contractors, the Community Patriots Tampa, Matt Becker and Born to Ride for 45. Also, thank you to the members of the Tampa Bay Young Republicans, Pinellas County Young Republicans, Tampa Republican Women Federated, the South Tampa Republican Club, The Community Patriots, The Patriots, the New Tampa Republican Club, the North Hillsborough Republican Club, Hillsborough County Republican Executive Committee and the Pinellas County Republican Executive Committee. Thank you to the countless pastors who helped both physically and through prayer. I would name them, but I do not want to jeopardize anyone or any church for their support. Finally, I believed in this race and fighting the good fight against Castor. I did take on enormous personal debt to give us the best fighting chance to defeat Castor. [If you are able to help me by contributing any amount towards paying off our campaign debt, I would be extremely grateful.](https://judgepr.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1f416ce0ac5ddfd320ec0ff6b&id=16433d7661&e=00028e5542)All glory be to God!Humbly and Respectfully, James P. Judge Jr.Republican Nominee, Florida’s 14th Congressional District

clean_body: (NOTE: This email was written this morning personally by me, to you and the rest of my supporters. I appreciate your time in reading it and any... | | | Good morning,(Note: This email was written this morning, personally, by me, to you and the rest of my supporters. I appreciate your time in reading it and any responses you may have.)First and foremost, thank you so much for your support over the last year. It was an honor and an incredible experience. I’d like to take a moment to go over some brief facts and some of what we accomplished. I also want to discuss what the future may hold.It is important to note, the only financial support I received during this campaign was from people like you, my friends and my family. The following items are not complaints or grievances, but facts, which I hope will put the situation in context. Unlike many candidates, my campaign received ZERO support from Governor Ron DeSantis, the National Republican Congressional Committee, Club for Growth, Kevin McCarthy’s Congressional Leadership Fund and other conservative political action committees.Other Republican candidates in the district and around the area actually raised money in my district by telling other people that this seat was unwinnable, essentially working against me and indirectly helping Kathy Castor to keep her seat, while putting control of the U.S. House of Representatives in jeopardy.This was a redistricting year, which happens after each census. Through the redistricting process, this district became more favorable to Democrats than it ever has been before, giving Kathy Castor a significant advantage from the outset.Despite these circumstances, we accomplished far more than anyone thought possible, and we did it with a shoestring budget.Here are a few important facts to remember: We far outperformed expectations and came closer than anyone has ever come to beating Kathy Castor, in what was the hardest district to ever compete against Castor (Kathy Castor 56.9% – James Judge 43.1%) (According to the experts, I was supposed to lose by 20 points) Last election, Castor defeated her opponent 60.3% – 39.7% and that was when the map was more favorable for Republicans Castor has won every election up until this point by at least approximately 10 percent, and often more than 70 percent of the vote – that was when the district map was more favorable for Republicans According to the Hillsborough County Supervisor of Elections, we won on Election Day with 53.68% of the votes According to the Hillsborough County Supervisor of Elections, we won in early voting with 52.52% of the votes. This is despite more Democrats showing up to vote in Hillsborough County than Republicans during the early voting period. We made Kathy Castor spend more than $1.5 million, money which would have gone to support other Democrats, had she not had a strong challenger. Castor was forced to spend somewhere around $15 a vote, while we were only financially able to spend about $1 per vote. We did all of this despite not having the money to buy TV or radio advertisements, and with zero PACs buying TV or radio ads to support us. While the Republican Party may not have believed that I was a viable candidate, we proved that I was the most viable candidate to ever face Kathy Castor.Had we have had the backing and financial support of the Republican party and local Republican fundraisers; this could have been a very different race.Instead, the party and political action committees spent millions of dollars to defeat other Republicans in the primary process.Going forward, I would encourage you to consider a few things.First, if you support these groups, please demand that they stop destroying Republican candidates in the primary process.Regardless of how you feel about these candidates, Republican groups spent several million dollars here in the Tampa Bay area to destroy Kevin Hayslett and Anna Paulina Luna in the primary process.This was not an isolated incident. It happened over and over in races throughout the country.Second, please insist that they support all of the Republican nominees who make it out of the primary process, regardless of what the odds say. Despite my support for Kevin Hayslett in the primary, I supported Anna Paulina Luna in the general election, because it was the right thing to do for our country, and in order to get radical leftists out of Washington.Good, Christian, conservative candidates like Scotty Moore in Orlando and myself here in the Tampa Bay area, could have had a much better shot and likely won our elections with the millions of dollars these groups wasted on primary races and in other general election races that were already heavily in favor of Republicans.Going forward, I am headed back to work at Judge Public Relations, and I will be helping good Republican candidates to get elected by taking on and consulting political campaigns in the future. I believe we have proven we have what it takes to run effective, competitive political campaigns for a fraction of the cost.Additionally, I am weighing my own political options for the future.From what I have been told, there is a strong chance that the Florida Supreme Court will reject the redistricted map and likely make this district much more competitive, so it will no longer heavily favor Democrats.If that happens, I believe I will likely run against Kathy Castor again, but I will only do so if I have your support, the support of the local Republican clubs and executive committees, and the support of the Republican party.I am tired of extremism. I want stability. I want to return to Godly values. I want to ensure that our freedoms remain intact, and I want to get the government out of my life.I would like to thank you and all of those people who supported this race.I especially want to thank my wife Danielle for tolerating the daily insanity of running a Congressional campaign. She put up with the stress, days without seeing me, where I would have breakfasts, lunches and dinners scheduled, along with often attending 2-3 events a day.I also want to thank my family, my mom, dad, stepdad, sisters, in-laws, and of course, my team, which includes: Peter G, Peter D, Sam B, Thomas D, John V, Michael M, Sheila H, Dawn S, Don K, Ernest W, Terrence O, Luke D, Christy M, Justin C, Matt T, Jonathon P, and so many more. (As a precaution, I did not list last names because I don’t want to put them in any jeopardy for supporting my race, but you know who you are.) If I missed you, text me and I will make sure to say thanks personally!I also want to thank those who endorsed me, Senator Rick Scott, the Florida Police Benevolent Association (PBA), Tampa PBA, Pinellas Sheriff Bob Gualtieri, Clearwater Mayor Frank Hibbard, Retired Pinellas Sheriff Jim Coats, Retired St. Petersburg Mayor Rick Baker, Congressman Brian Mast, Congressman Paul Gosar, Retired Congressman Ted Yoho, Roger Stone, Chris Chambers, the Associated Builders & Contractors, the Community Patriots Tampa, Matt Becker and Born to Ride for 45. Also, thank you to the members of the Tampa Bay Young Republicans, Pinellas County Young Republicans, Tampa Republican Women Federated, the South Tampa Republican Club, The Community Patriots, The Patriots, the New Tampa Republican Club, the North Hillsborough Republican Club, Hillsborough County Republican Executive Committee and the Pinellas County Republican Executive Committee. Thank you to the countless pastors who helped both physically and through prayer. I would name them, but I do not want to jeopardize anyone or any church for their support. Finally, I believed in this race and fighting the good fight against Castor. I did take on enormous personal debt to give us the best fighting chance to defeat Castor. glory be to God!Humbly and Respectfully, James P. Judge Jr.Republican Nominee, Florida’s 14th Congressional District | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | Copyright (C) 2022 James Judge For Congress. All rights reserved.

**Derek -- With 21 days until the election to defend my seat, Republicans are doing everything in their power to defeat me.** I'm fully counting on your grassroots support to power our movement to victory. We’ve done this once before, and I know we can do it again. **Derek, you haven’t donated this year to the DNC. Will you split $10 between my campaign and our party -- or as much as you can spare today -- to help defeat Herschel Walker, win in Georgia, and elect Democrats nationwide?**

Thank you for all that you do. None of this would be possible without you. name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Sign the petition: The U.S. must commit to a Fossil Fuel Non-Proliferation Treaty phasing out fossil fuels
body:
Biden must act now
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb3b5f8eb-7adf-40e9-bf93-f256df6cde5a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | _Peter_ _ - _ Last month, the President of Vanuatu, an island nation in the Pacific, made history by calling on the international community to negotiate a Fossil Fuel Non-Proliferation Treaty at the UN General Assembly. They were swiftly followed by Timor-Leste, another Pacific Island nation gravely endangered by the climate crisis. **[Sign the petition: The U.S. must commit to a Fossil Fuel Non-Proliferation Treaty phasing out fossil fuels.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T291b263d-753b-487c-a070-05a4906c969b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** The Fossil Fuel Non-Proliferation Treaty would be a binding international agreement to phase out fossil fuels while supporting dependent economies, workers, and communities to diversify away from fossil fuels. It would ensure 100% access to renewable energy globally and promote a just transition that leaves no one behind. Negotiating and signing a treaty like this would be a critical climate mitigation step on the path to a greener economy. As the [President of Vanuatu, Nikenike Vurobaravu](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2e74d39b-ff6b-4227-a85e-f60be8f809ef/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), explains, “Every day, we are experiencing the debilitating consequences of the climate crisis...we are measuring climate change not in degrees of Celsius or tons of carbon, but in human lives.”
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**SIGN THE PETITION →**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T54549acf-66a6-4e11-86e9-d56196de2c19/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| As a global leader, the U.S. government must join other countries to support a Fossil Fuel Non-Proliferation Treaty and commit to phasing out fossil fuel production and fast-tracking progress towards safer and more cost-effective alternatives. [**We are stronger together. In advance of COP27, add your name and join in solidarity with the Pacific island nations calling for a fossil free future. Sign the petition: The U.S. must commit to a Fossil Fuel Non-Proliferation Treaty phasing out fossil fuels.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T25baec64-3c7c-49a9-8ffb-9d3b479a5636/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thanks for all you do, Cliff
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | [**ADD YOUR NAME →**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfc8e829e-9095-48ad-9104-cbc06788eda2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212

| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/fossilfuelnonproliferationtreaty-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. —
_You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. name: Michael Bennet
subject: I’m not heading back to Washington alone.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54641596/379201347/-1043101526?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20221115_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTJiM2NmNi0yZDY1LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KDilSbRyB0Bjse8HMMhEaQ9vtj1zTKq_q1D04SSRcnA=) Hi team, Yesterday, I flew back to Washington for the first time since being re-elected last Tuesday, and I’m happy to say I had some great company: _my friends, Representatives Jason Crow, Salud Carbajal, and Joe Neguse._ Packed flights like this are what happens when we put in the work and Coloradans turn out to vote! Last Tuesday, Colorado Democrats grew our Congressional delegation and notched crucial wins at every level: We **re-elected Joe Neguse, Jason Crow, and Diana DeGette** — holding all of Colorado’s Democratic US House seats. We **gained two new members of Congress, Brittany Pettersen and Yadira Caraveo** , sending two remarkable Democratic women to Washington. We **re-elected Governor Polis and Attorney General Weiser** and ensured we have four more years of strong Democratic leadership in Denver. We **sent a clear message about strengthening our democracy** and Colorado’s elections when we **re-elected Secretary of State Griswold.** And we **expanded our state legislative majority** — adding so many new Democratic lawmakers that they [ran out of seats in the conference chambers](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54641597/379201348/-2044206580?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20221115_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTJiM2NmNi0yZDY1LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KDilSbRyB0Bjse8HMMhEaQ9vtj1zTKq_q1D04SSRcnA=&emci=5304ef8c-2365-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=9a2b3cf6-2d65-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=1295540)! Folks, the future of Colorado is bright, and that’s largely thanks to the dedication and generosity of this team. With your support, we ran a race that took no vote and no community for granted, and we invested in uplifting fellow Democrats from the top of the ticket to the smallest local race. **Now, even though I won’t be on the ballot for several years, we need to continue investing in building Democratic power from the ground up**. That means supporting local Democrats, expanding our organizing infrastructure, and investing in year-round voter outreach. Last Tuesday’s incredible victories did not happen overnight. They took years of hard work from folks all across Colorado, and we can’t let off the gas now. [**That’s why I’m asking:****Will you please chip in to continue the hard work of keeping Colorado blue? The presidential election of 2024 will be an all-out fight for our democracy, and we need to begin investing right now.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54641598/379201349/-1043101526?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20221115_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTJiM2NmNi0yZDY1LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KDilSbRyB0Bjse8HMMhEaQ9vtj1zTKq_q1D04SSRcnA=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **** | | | ********[Donate $10 now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54641599/379201350/-1043101526?express_lane=true&amount=10&&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20221115_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTJiM2NmNi0yZDY1LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KDilSbRyB0Bjse8HMMhEaQ9vtj1zTKq_q1D04SSRcnA=)********

clean_body: | = Hi team, Yesterday, I flew back to Washington for the first time since being re-elected last Tuesday, and I’m happy to say I had some great company: my friends, Representatives Jason Crow, Salud Carbajal, and Joe Neguse. Packed flights like this are what happens when we put in the work and Coloradans turn out to vote! Last Tuesday, Colorado Democrats grew our Congressional delegation and notched crucial wins at every level: We re-elected Joe Neguse, Jason Crow, and Diana DeGette — holding all of Colorado’s Democratic US House seats. We gained two new members of Congress, Brittany Pettersen and Yadira Caraveo , sending two remarkable Democratic women to Washington. We re-elected Governor Polis and Attorney General Weiser and ensured we have four more years of strong Democratic leadership in Denver. We sent a clear message about strengthening our democracy and Colorado’s elections when we re-elected Secretary of State Griswold. And we expanded our state legislative majority — adding so many new Democratic lawmakers that they ! Folks, the future of Colorado is bright, and that’s largely thanks to the dedication and generosity of this team. With your support, we ran a race that took no vote and no community for granted, and we invested in uplifting fellow Democrats from the top of the ticket to the smallest local race. Now, even though I won’t be on the ballot for several years, we need to continue investing in building Democratic power from the ground up. That means supporting local Democrats, expanding our organizing infrastructure, and investing in year-round voter outreach. Last Tuesday’s incredible victories did not happen overnight. They took years of hard work from folks all across Colorado, and we can’t let off the gas now. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ** | | | ****=**** | ******=**** | | ****=**** | ******=**** | | ****=**** | ******=**** I can’t wait to get back to work for you in Washington, and I look forward to working with you to win in 2024. Thank you, Michael Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado ** By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

Peter,

In 2020, Ron DeSantis was criticized for keeping schools open.

But today's National Assessment of Educational Progress (NAEP) results once again prove that **_Ron made the right decision_. **

In Florida, adjusted for demographics, 4th-grade students are #1 in both Reading and Math! This the highest NAEP Ranking in the state's history.

Ron made the right call in Florida. Now we need him to make the right calls for our nation.

We're Ready for Ron, an America First grassroots movement working to recruit Ron for President. We've set a goal to raise $35,000 by the end of November to help us gain more signatures to convince Ron to run in 2024.

[_**If you 're ready to put America's children first, click here to send your urgent gift >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61878903:6-XRBrG4N:m:1:3345639852:AA6061BDA20F5A682ED893E5135784E3:r)

**It was Biden's decision to shut down schools that had****terrible consequences for America's children.**

In 2022, _the average fourth-grade mathematics score_ _**decreased**_ _by 5 points_ and was lower than all previous assessment years going back to 2005.

_The average eighth-grade mathematics score_ _**decreased**_ _by 8 points_ compared to 2019 and was lower than all previous assessment years going back to 2003.

_**Can America 's children afford to keep falling behind?**_

You can help us meet our goal before the end of the month by**clicking below and donating.**

[_**Click here to help recruit Ron for President >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61878903:6-XRBrG4N:m:1:3345639852:AA6061BDA20F5A682ED893E5135784E3:r)

Thank you,

Draft DeSantis

name: =?utf-8?Q?True=20the=20Vote?=
subject: Message from Catherine Engelbrecht
body:
Message from Catherine Engelbrecht | | |
---
|
---
|
---
| | Hi Friend,

It’s been quite a week for us all.

As many of you likely know, I was released from prison last Monday afternoon, after having spent the previous seven days behind bars. I, along with longtime True the Vote contractor Gregg Phillips, was both held in contempt of court in a civil defamation case, ending in an unprecedented sentence of imprisonment without bond.

Thankfully, an emergency ruling from the 5th Circuit Court of Appeals ordered our release. With no time to waste we immediately jumped into Election Day operations, which continue unto today, with key races still undecided.

Many of you are, no doubt, disappointed in Tuesday’s results.

I want you to consider, however, that perhaps we did have a tsunami of sorts after all, though it did not look like we expected it to.

The wave of passion-filled Americans, voting, serving, seeing firsthand the process failures that increasingly define our elections - it’s a wave of truth that’s washing over millions of Americans willing to stand in defense of their freedoms, regardless of what the “establishment” tries to spin.

I believe the call of our generation is to claw back the deep institutional structures, built up over decades, that are responsible for the erosion of our freedom. It is not unexpected that we would face fierce headwinds and obstacles in that process.

Think about what today might have looked like if we hadn’t challenged the “body politic” over the past two years — if we just assumed that the political establishment was doing what it was supposed to be doing, if we just assumed that we had shared interests, assumed that it had our best interests at heart. Today we would be facing much darker days. But that’s not what happened. And America is better for it.

Consider these factors regarding the political establishment:
* The Republican Party had been under a consent decree for forty years in which it was not allowed to engage in ballot security activities. The Party was released from the consent decree only in 2018.

* The RNC barely lifted a finger to help some of its candidates get over the finish line.

* The Democrat Party invests heavily in lawfare and attorneys who file election-related lawsuits all year round.

* The Democrat Party still holds raw political machine power in many cities. They have huge patronage armies activist armies, and anarchist armies at their disposal that extend into the courts, the media, social media and corporate America.

* Over the past two years, we were continuously disappointed in the cowardice of state legislatures to exercise their power on a variety of election integrity matters.

---
|
---
| [SUPPORT TRUE THE VOTE](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=bcdb95cba0&e=ad8cba7e98 "SUPPORT TRUE THE VOTE")
---
| We could have anticipated that machines would break down, polling places would run out of ballots, last minute lawsuits would be filed to change election processes. We could have anticipated that lawlessness would again be on full display. True the Vote was overwhelmed with voters contacting us for help or to report wrongdoing. We know what’s happening, now we must work without ceasing to correct the problems before they occur again in November 2024.

I don’t tell you this to discourage you. I tell you this to inspire you to join us in the battles ahead.

The political establishment is not on board with correcting what has become a perpetually broken election process. They prefer the status quo. While not everyone is part of the engine that drives election fraud, they are on board with it because politicos know how to exploit the vulnerabilities to get them to their desired destinations. It’s going to take continued Atlassian efforts on our part to keep elections free and fair.

Look at where we are right now, especially compared to where we were two, four and six years ago. The efforts of all of us have been nothing short of spectacular.

People who value freedom tend not to organize. This does not come naturally to us. We tend to mind our own business. We don’t try to force others to do what we think they should do. That is our nature.

But we realized that our liberty was slipping away, taken by people who are happy to organize, happy to drown out other viewpoints, happy to bully others into doing what they want.

So we organized, we got to know each other. We united into a movement.

Getting organized is no small thing. That hard work is largely behind us. We know how to find each other now and have scaled the steep learning curve of getting our message out. Going forward, we will only grow our bond and increase our numbers, and our messages will reach farther over the next two years. We can now focus on using our power to take back our elections and take back our country.

Let’s take our wins from this week and build on them. More importantly, let’s learn our lessons and steel our resolve to stay engaged. When people tell you who they are, we should believe them.

Nobody ever said a tsunami was the endgame. It was always the beginning. We have a long way to go, but we are moving forward.

Ever onward,
Catherine
---
|
---
|
---
| **[](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=bfd957de8b&e=ad8cba7e98)CATHERINE **ENGELBRECHT
* * *
FOUNDER | TRUE THE VOTE
---
|
---
| [SUPPORT TRUE THE VOTE](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=8c551b4ca0&e=ad8cba7e98 "SUPPORT TRUE THE VOTE")
---
|
---
| | _Copyright © 2022 True the Vote, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in for updates via the True the Vote website.

**Our mailing address is:**
True the VotePO Box 3109# 19128Houston, TX 77253-3109
[Add us to your address book](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/vcard?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=10c8087c36)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/profile?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=10c8087c36&e=ad8cba7e98&c=546a5a3d4e) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=10c8087c36&e=ad8cba7e98&c=546a5a3d4e).

Ever onward, Catherine | | | ENGELBRECHT FOUNDER | TRUE THE VOTE | | "SUPPORT TRUE THE VOTE" | | | Copyright © 2022 True the Vote, All rights reserved.

Help us take back the Majority for the Republican Party |
Peter,

My race against far-Left Democrat Senator Raphael Warnock is going to a RUNOFF.

**This race is going to decide the future of our country, Peter, and we cannot afford to have any dedicated patriots like you sit on the sidelines.**
**[Please, the future of our country is on the line, and we desperately need your support.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=b4b60581209b4772abc1f413b8c346bd&_e=0WSm0SDx973CXI5H5WvphmNRVrpr_l_2BRIzct-LHjWDQnl5BP58TD2AnV1glFzD0VQhSDn49KhvVuXgZGovRtsk6PRQU-zlG4WjZkkyMCi8PU4O_7OD3n0bqzxS_3zak-OGoHZle8Dz1T02xO0fETHsAOHb26KgwePWoF3lMethb0uALWhjcXD10X6Jyg8eu70IgHL10ARtpsgsGyP2DI8XQTlpR18KVy7gutXKYQrRMzfpXds6u6W4Uvt3BeIi9tiht3sMUXbv1tNwnS18J-WmpCAfjGNpy9Uk5nKcU65yRDNIo82e97dGNy30_hCNXOpY7yCtqZFyL9t_ZjnySYw474T1RnLdgiEWPBYuYG2Xx5gAwTAfOYsUVk25SalxGlu5OFxwus34XsYUr-y_IRuTzWBH7QLA7gszf8rOaT4%3D)**

subject: Just five bucks
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61876316:Je6rZrGON:m:1:3374012347:E19B10B035F88F7D5B6480B200C81BEE:r)

Peter,

Raphael Warnock's runoff win last year is why Democrats control the Senate today.

Senator Warnock has voted for Joe Biden's disastrous agenda 96% of the time, so he is to blame for our country going in the wrong direction. We can hold him accountable, win this race and get our country back on track, _**[but we can only win if we have your help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61876316:Je6rZrGON:m:1:3374012347:E19B10B035F88F7D5B6480B200C81BEE:r)**_

_If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[**CHIP IN $25 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61876317:Je6rZrGON:m:1:3374012347:E19B10B035F88F7D5B6480B200C81BEE:r)
All eyes are on Georgia. If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51-seat majority where the most radical proposals will succeed. We cannot let that happen, Peter.

Senator Warnock and Democrat Super PACs have launched an advertising blitz that is flooding the airwaves. We already had over $70 million in false attack ads run against us in the general election, and now they're running even more in the runoff!

**[That's why I am asking for your help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61876316:Je6rZrGON:m:1:3374012347:E19B10B035F88F7D5B6480B200C81BEE:r)**

_If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[**CHIP IN $25 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61876317:Je6rZrGON:m:1:3374012347:E19B10B035F88F7D5B6480B200C81BEE:r)
The Georgia runoff will be the last fight of 2022, so WE MUST WIN IT! We can flip a Democrat seat in the Senate, but I need your help. I know money is tight in this Biden-Warnock economy, **[but if you can chip in even $25 right now- it will help us reach out to undecided voters, implement our 'get-out-the-vote' program, and win on December 6th!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61876316:Je6rZrGON:m:1:3374012347:E19B10B035F88F7D5B6480B200C81BEE:r)**

Every single dollar impacts how many more doors we can knock on, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach. **[Please pitch in anything you're able ASAP, even if it's just $25.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61876316:Je6rZrGON:m:1:3374012347:E19B10B035F88F7D5B6480B200C81BEE:r)**

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61876316:Je6rZrGON:m:1:3374012347:E19B10B035F88F7D5B6480B200C81BEE:r)
Herschel Walker

[** DONATE TODAY ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61876316:Je6rZrGON:m:1:3374012347:E19B10B035F88F7D5B6480B200C81BEE:r)

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61876318:Je6rZrGON:m:1:3374012347:E19B10B035F88F7D5B6480B200C81BEE:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61876319:Je6rZrGON:m:1:3374012347:E19B10B035F88F7D5B6480B200C81BEE:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61876320:Je6rZrGON:m:1:3374012347:E19B10B035F88F7D5B6480B200C81BEE:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61876321:Je6rZrGON:m:1:3374012347:E19B10B035F88F7D5B6480B200C81BEE:r)

name: Herschel Walker
subject: DEADLINE: FEC financial cutoff is tomorrow
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874774:6fNYZrGNK:m:1:3331421248:2457256105D9018190D070009B39CC17:r)

---
Peter,

**The Federal Election Commission has one final financial deadline before the runoff: 11:59 p.m. on Wednesday. We have LESS THAN 48 HOURS to raise every dollar we can.**

**[Please don't let me come up short, Peter.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874774:6fNYZrGNK:m:1:3331421248:2457256105D9018190D070009B39CC17:r)**

This is the financial report that Democrats will be following closely to see if we've been able to build momentum since the runoff was declared.

I am counting on you to help show the Left that conservatives will not give up the fight against the Democrats' policies that are destroying our country. **[Please, chip in whatever you can today to help me CLOSE THE GAP before the filing deadline tomorrow at midnight.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874774:6fNYZrGNK:m:1:3331421248:2457256105D9018190D070009B39CC17:r)**

[** RUSH $25 -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874775:6fNYZrGNK:m:1:3331421248:2457256105D9018190D070009B39CC17:r)
[** RUSH $50 -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874776:6fNYZrGNK:m:1:3331421248:2457256105D9018190D070009B39CC17:r)
[** RUSH $75 -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874777:6fNYZrGNK:m:1:3331421248:2457256105D9018190D070009B39CC17:r)
[** RUSH $100 -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874778:6fNYZrGNK:m:1:3331421248:2457256105D9018190D070009B39CC17:r)
I know how to win, and I'm ready to win this battle for conservatives all over the country. However, I can't hold Senator Raphael Warnock accountable for his disastrous voting record without the help of patriots far and wide.

Senator Warnock has outraised us every single filing deadline, but with your help, we can put up some of our biggest numbers since the race began.

The deadline is TOMORROW. **[So, if you can chip in $25, $50, or maybe even $75 or $100, you'd be doing a great service to our nation and putting us one step closer to introducing Joe Biden and the Radical Left to the concept of checks and balances.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874774:6fNYZrGNK:m:1:3331421248:2457256105D9018190D070009B39CC17:r)**

Thank you for continuing this fight with me. Your support is greatly appreciated.

Thanks,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874774:6fNYZrGNK:m:1:3331421248:2457256105D9018190D070009B39CC17:r)

Herschel Walker

P.S. Federal law prohibits us from extending this runoff fundraising deadline, **[so please help us hit our goal before midnight tomorrow!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874774:6fNYZrGNK:m:1:3331421248:2457256105D9018190D070009B39CC17:r)**

[** Donate Today -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874774:6fNYZrGNK:m:1:3331421248:2457256105D9018190D070009B39CC17:r)

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874779:6fNYZrGNK:m:1:3331421248:2457256105D9018190D070009B39CC17:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874780:6fNYZrGNK:m:1:3331421248:2457256105D9018190D070009B39CC17:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874781:6fNYZrGNK:m:1:3331421248:2457256105D9018190D070009B39CC17:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874782:6fNYZrGNK:m:1:3331421248:2457256105D9018190D070009B39CC17:r)
