| Dear Friends,
On Tuesday November 8, we did not get the red wave many predicted. And sadly, election day is still not over. But we did win some local races, picked up a new congressional seat with Jen Kiggans, and won a majority in Congress. I am thankful to those who stepped up and didn't win as well. I was especially hopeful for Yesli Vega, a true Patriot who gave it her all. It takes a lot of guts and sacrifice to run, and their efforts moved our conservative message forward. I am amazed and thankful for the hard work our many volunteers put in to get our Republicans across the finish line. Thank you!

| Fluvanna Veterans Day
---
|
---
| This is the Medal of Honor earned by Colonel Van T. Barfoot in World War II. He fought in WW2, Korea, and Vietnam. Colonel Barfoot lived on a farm in Amelia County for years. His son-in-law, Roger, told us his story and showed pictures in Fluvanna for Veterans Day. When I was in the hospital with a life-threatening injury, Colonel Barfoot visited with me and gave me encouraging words. When he lived in Henrico the HOA told him to take his American flag down; he refused and it stayed up. Many of you may know they are about to change the name of Fort Pickett in Blackstone to Fort Barfoot. | House Bill 108 Fentanyl
---
|
---
| I submitted House Bill 108 this year, which would have made it a felony homicide for drug dealers to distribute fentanyl, resulting in drug users dying from an overdose. Unfortunately, Democrats in the House and the State Senate voted, "no". There is a fatal overdose epidemic in our Commonwealth and Country. These drugs, which are manufactured in China, are coming across our southern border and killing Americans. In January, I will submit a version of this bill again.

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | == ---|--- | Virginia Winners!! Congratulations, Senator Jen Kiggans, now Congresswoman Jen Kiggans, on winning the 2nd Congressional District! Also, congratulations, on reelection: Congressman Rob Whitman Congressman Morgan Griffith￼￼ Congressman Ben Cline ￼￼￼￼￼Congressman Bob Good￼ The midterm goal to gain a majority in Congress was achieved. == | == | President Trump will make an announcement tonight 9pm at Mar-a-Largo Club Palm Beach, Florida. == for more on Newsmax. | Dear Friends, On Tuesday November 8, we did not get the red wave many predicted. And sadly, election day is still not over. But we did win some local races, picked up a new congressional seat with Jen Kiggans, and won a majority in Congress. I am thankful to those who stepped up and didn't win as well. I was especially hopeful for Yesli Vega, a true Patriot who gave it her all. It takes a lot of guts and sacrifice to run, and their efforts moved our conservative message forward. I am amazed and thankful for the hard work our many volunteers put in to get our Republicans across the finish line. Thank you! | | | ---|--- | We must now focus on 2023. In addition to working with other legislators and preparing legislation for January, I am gearing up my campaign to be your next State Senator District 10. Learn more at www.mcguireforvirginia.com and email john@mcguireforvirginia.com to volunteer, get a sign, and more. Please share! Here is some of what I've been up to around the district and some of what's on my mind. | 5 McGuire Boys Hanover County | | Five McGuire boys from Hanover County fought in WW2. When knocking doors in Hanover County, a woman had this Herald Progress Story in her Bible from WW2 that included my grandfather, Navy Veteran John Joseph McGuire Sr. My father, the second, served in the Army. I am the third and a Navy Veteran. My son is the fourth and is currently serving in the Navy! My brother Rusty, is currently serving in the Virginia National Guard. #proudtoserve #veteransday #usa #hanover #sd10 | Election Integrity | | We must win the Virginia State Senate so we can roll back the changes to our election system made during the pandemic. | Governor Sarah Huckabee Sanders | | Congratulations to Sarah Huckabee Sanders, the first female Governor of Arkansas! | 8 Billion People | == | The population of the earth just hit 8 billion people. Agriculture and farming are even more important than ever. We must support Agriculture and Forestry, the largest industry in Virginia. | Governor Youngkin | | Governor Youngkin and his team campaigned everywhere to help fellow Republicans win. Thank you! | Congratulations, Florida Governor Ron DeSantis! | | Winner!!! Congratulations, Florida governor Ron DeSantis. He won by 20 percent! | Powhatan GOP Committee | | Thank you, Powhatan GOP Committee, for allowing me to give an update. And thank you for everything you did to help Congressman Bob Good, Commonwealth Attorney Rob Cerullo, and School Board Vicki Hurt get elected. Now it is time to focus on 2023! #sd10 #virginia | Liz Cheney Republicans? | | Are you tired of unreliable Republican politicians that flip flop? == | Bendectine Football Goochland | | | | It was good to see Governor Youngkin, our First Lady Suzanne Youngkin, and others at the Benedictine Football game in Goochland County. | VA Tech Football | | | It was a perfect day for a game. Tracy and I enjoyed tailgating and watching the Virginia Tech Football with some wonderful people at Lane Stadium. It was good to see my seat mate Delegate Jason Ballard, huge Hokie Fan Senator Mark Obenshain, Congressman Morgan Griffith for the re-election win Tuesday November 8, Education Secretary Aimee Guidera, Hanover Supervisor Sue Dibble, VA Tech President Tim Sands, and many more. #virginia | Veterans Day Appomattox County | | Happy Veterans Day! I spent a good part of the day in Appomattox County, "Where our Country Reunited", with many fellow Veterans. #thankyou #welcomehome #veteransday #godblessamerica | "Bibi" Back? | | It looks like "Bibi" is making a strong political comeback in Israel. | Fluvanna Veterans Day | | This is the Medal of Honor earned by Colonel Van T. Barfoot in World War II. He fought in WW2, Korea, and Vietnam. Colonel Barfoot lived on a farm in Amelia County for years. His son-in-law, Roger, told us his story and showed pictures in Fluvanna for Veterans Day. When I was in the hospital with a life-threatening injury, Colonel Barfoot visited with me and gave me encouraging words. When he lived in Henrico the HOA told him to take his American flag down; he refused and it stayed up. Many of you may know they are about to change the name of Fort Pickett in Blackstone to Fort Barfoot. == == == == | Virginia Farmers | | Virginia Farm Bureau is not just for farmers. They support all Virginians through auto, home and farm insurance from local agents; deals and savings on shopping, travel and farm equipment; and lobbying, advocacy and education on behalf of Virginia agriculture. farmers == | UVA Shooting | | We are praying for the UVA victims and their families. Evil does exist and we need to keep an eye on each other. Thank God the UVA shooting suspect is in custody. Thank you to our law enforcement officers and first responders, including members of the Louisa County Sheriff's department. We are praying for the UVA victims and their families. My heart breaks for the three football players no longer with us, and the community traumatized by events like this. ￼I hear a lot of people talk about mental illness, but we need to talk about an evil heart. We need more love and understanding. I've been told by law-enforcement officers, in ￼most cases someone knew something, but didn't report it.￼￼ Let's keep an eye on each other. If you see something, say something, and do something. ￼ == | Bob Good Meet & Greet Buckingham | | | | | Election Day Photos | | | | Congratulations, Rob Manolo Beaverdam Supervisor | | | | | | | Congratulations, Lloyd Runnett Louisa County School Board | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Congratulations, Vickie Hurt Powhatan School Board | | | Congratulations, Congressman Rob Wittman on Re-election | | | | | | | | | | After campaigning everywhere, including 10 counties on election day, my brother Rusty and I stopped by the Hanover Watch Party and met some wonderful patriots. Unfortunately, it was not the red wave many expected. The fight is not over, keep your chin up, keep working, keep praying, and let's save our commonwealth. Where Virginia goes so goes the country! == | | | Henrico GOP | | Senator Siobhan Dunnavant gave us a great campaign update at the Henrico GOP breakfast. Delegate Buddy Fowler, Supervisor Tommy Brannin, David Owens for Delegate D57, and I also spoke. It was good to see everyone! | Louisa Safe Schools Task Force | | Superintendant Doug Straley and team are doing a great job with the Safe Schools Task Force. It has been an honor being part of this team for four years now. Our kids should be number one! | House Bill 108 Fentanyl | | I submitted House Bill 108 this year, which would have made it a felony homicide for drug dealers to distribute fentanyl, resulting in drug users dying from an overdose. Unfortunately, Democrats in the House and the State Senate voted, "no". There is a fatal overdose epidemic in our Commonwealth and Country. These drugs, which are manufactured in China, are coming across our southern border and killing Americans. In January, I will submit a version of this bill again. | I'm running for State Senate so we can un-California Virginia. It starts with election integrity. For a better future, we must win back the Virginia State Senate in 2023 and stop the madness. I invite you and your friends to join me in this cause. Please sign up now to be a delegate for the convention, TBD, and please share with friends via email here: john@mcguireforvirginia.com Take care, please spread the word and I look forward to seeing you around the district! | | | | | == | | | | God Bless America, Delegate John McGuire Running for == in 2023 Jesus is my Savior Husband Father Navy SEAL Business Owner Pro-Life Pro-Gun America 1st Family Foundation 100 VCDL 100 == our Facebook Page Twitter: @JohnMcGuire4VA Instagram: JohnMcGuire4VA Email: john@mcguireforvirginia.com | | == | == | == | == == == Past Newsletters: End of October == Mid October == September == End of August == Mid August == End of July == == == == Mid June == May == April == March == Week 9 == Week 8. == Week 7 == Week 6. == Week 5. == Week 4. == Week 3. == Week 2. == Week 1 == Paid for and Authorized by Friends of John McGuire | | McGuire for Delegate | Friends of John McGuire, PO Box 168, Manakin Sabot, VA 23103 | | Sent by mailto:john@mcguireforvirginia.com powered by

Senator Warnock has outraised us every single filing deadline, but with your help, we can put up some of our biggest numbers since the race began.

clean_body: The Federal Election Commission’s filing deadline for the runoff is tomorrow ... we have LESS THAN 48 HOURS TO HIT OUR FUNDRAISING GOAL. | Fellow American, The Federal Election Commission has one final financial deadline before the runoff: 11:59 p.m. on Wednesday. We have LESS THAN 48 HOURS to raise every dollar we can. This is the financial report that Democrats will be following closely to see if we've been able to build momentum since the runoff was declared. I am counting on you to help show the Left that conservatives will not give up the fight against the Democrats' policies that are destroying our country. I know how to win, and I'm ready to win this battle for conservatives all over the country. However, I can't hold Senator Raphael Warnock accountable for his disastrous voting record without the help of patriots far and wide. Senator Warnock has outraised us every single filing deadline, but with your help, we can put up some of our biggest numbers since the race began. The deadline is TOMORROW. Thank you for continuing this fight with me. Your support is greatly appreciated. Thanks, Herschel Walker P.S. Federal law prohibits us from extending this runoff fundraising deadline, | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/31621?t=1009&amount=32&akid=6455%2E3611125%2EVeGXGW ][IMG]

Friends, it’s official: our critical Georgia Senate race is
heading to a runoff.

With the entire GOP establishment behind my opponent, Herschel Walker, I
can't keep up this momentum and defend my critical seat without your
immediate support. That's why I'm humbly asking: [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/31621?t=1010&amount=32&akid=6455%2E3611125%2EVeGXGW ]Will you split $32 or
more right now between me and Tim Ryan to keep Georgia blue?

GOP donors are flooding our race with over $37 million—and Mitch
McConnell's super PAC has launched attack ad after attack ad against me.
Republicans are determined to flip Georgia red.

I know this grassroots team has what it takes to win—but with national
Republicans going all-in to flip this seat, we can't let up for even a
second. We've set a goal to raise another $200,000 today so we can fight
back against GOP attacks—but we're falling short, and I need your help.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/31621?t=1011&amount=32&akid=6455%2E3611125%2EVeGXGW ]Please,
will you split a donation of $32 or more between me and Tim Ryan so we can
win in Georgia and expand our Democratic Senate majority?

clean_body: If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51 seat majority. | Fellow American, Raphael Warnock's runoff win last year is why Democrats control the Senate today. Senator Warnock has voted for Joe Biden's disastrous agenda 96% of the time, so he is to blame for our country going in the wrong direction. We can hold him accountable, win this race and get our country back on track, If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly: All eyes are on Georgia. If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51-seat majority where the most radical proposals will succeed. We cannot let that happen, Fellow American. Senator Warnock and Democrat Super PACs have launched an advertising blitz that is flooding the airwaves. We already had over $70 million in false attack ads run against us in the general election, and now they're running even more in the runoff! If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly: The Georgia runoff will be the last fight of 2022, so WE MUST WIN IT! We can flip a Democrat seat in the Senate, but I need your help. I know money is tight in this Biden-Warnock economy, Every single dollar impacts how many more doors we can knock on, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Sent to Freedom Nation Today subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

| | | Dear Friend --

My election is currently TOO CLOSE TO CALL. **We are in the lead, but the margins are so _razor_ _thin_ it's very likely there will be a RECOUNT.**

[This is where I need your help, Friend.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fbc462e50f974b15bad872ac64d8cb86&_e=zdKC6nfDLE3WVFOw_dbUQL1EChimGqcNfRVAdMlR5JutrXz3pL-Jj7I_zxXJn1Fb40V7Qa2vrW63SiUya39GqPCZ40zc5Uww8gXexNGoO_hjnipqQEugDLFtCxFJ3UOkxnQL4JjilnPC1kzDMKcjvdvrabx_mLQhdQXJFwyWDusDA5y2PApPbXIQaA0aLZ5abo6WwwsCFgxQiXV6Eshsl2kRBqZgHn_rL20D73tEttbTWC2Ex4obZFrpIBAAZj7-iOMRXUhlLksQw1xC88DiybXQ9LYEtUqkDFhvalnWjT0%3D)

The Democrats clearly targeted my race, pouring millions in to prop up my lying Democrat opponent and attack me with baseless lies.

We stepped up and spent what we had to fend off their attacks by running ads, holding rallies and getting out the vote. The [generosity of grassroots conservatives](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fbc462e50f974b15bad872ac64d8cb86&_e=zdKC6nfDLE3WVFOw_dbUQL1EChimGqcNfRVAdMlR5JutrXz3pL-Jj7I_zxXJn1Fb40V7Qa2vrW63SiUya39GqPCZ40zc5Uww8gXexNGoO_hjnipqQEugDLFtCxFJ3UOkxnQL4JjilnPC1kzDMKcjvcJiTQ7eXHofXMvc_CMOKbp8avGXpmn22cTsNNPsGL43RRZb5uC7KTR3dxRCMQ6OrCuakVCoDd6k20TfYfJ6PnF3WZMu-cF0NqURCbFxIpYRS57ktRmYq9h7DdCa7OLE9M_92IXWogxpSYHgEKXAocA%3D) like you, Friend, was the reason why we were able to counter their attacks and maintain our lead.

**Now that we are still in a fight for survival, I need[ your help once again](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fbc462e50f974b15bad872ac64d8cb86&_e=zdKC6nfDLE3WVFOw_dbUQL1EChimGqcNfRVAdMlR5JutrXz3pL-Jj7I_zxXJn1Fb40V7Qa2vrW63SiUya39GqPCZ40zc5Uww8gXexNGoO_hjnipqQEugDLFtCxFJ3UOkxnQL4JjilnPC1kzDMKcjvYnJ2qxUoecaLuX9D-2z0_V5GIi6fGF4NxEHG9jB4H6Wj0Z19lccQFIp63xqByfi0kd57bREzKWaYsJQ-TI_zCs-xQtrb2_XJs-HspdwIqLH2MuJ31EwYeEBeA9qfxi-JmfaqjG8SDIVECfH4pn9B0A%3D). name: Jimmy Panetta
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jimmy Panetta for Congress 2020, FEC ID# C00592154
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54631875/379167184/-2113420158?refcode=JP_EM_ST_WL_20221115_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjQ5NTkyZS0wYjY1LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0Me5kuBdzCnAkfpIJMMM34ppRaKYNQrctLOsABncV_k=&emci=d401a071-fc64-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=3b49592e-0b65-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=6108787) | Peter,

Thank you so much for playing your part and participating in our democracy by voting in last Tuesday’s midterm elections. I also want to express my appreciation for all of your support for my campaign. Based on your work and all of your help, I was re-elected to continue my service as the U.S. Representative for California’s new 19th Congressional District.

As the results slowly come in, Peter, it appears that California will determine control of the House of Representatives. As we wait for the final vote counts, I want to let you know that we in Congress are still focused on the issues that matter to the people of the 19th Congressional District. I am continuing my fight to help lower gas and food prices, pass meaningful legislation to increase affordable housing for working families and decrease the cost of prescription drugs for senior citizens, and ensure that we get our share of federal funding to invest in our infrastructure, including local water projects.

Regardless of the results of this election and no matter who is in the majority, you have my commitment that I will continue to give you my all in representing and fighting for the people and families of the new 19th Congressional District.

Thank you, again, for your support and the honor of serving for the next two years as your U.S. Representative.

Sincerely,

Jimmy

---

subject: Tomorrow is a big day
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874875:6tUE9rGNU:m:1:3331703221:EFC24918C99DDF5FA576D5AF0963ED7C:r)

---
Peter,

**The Federal Election Commission has one final financial deadline before the runoff: 11:59 p.m. on Wednesday. We have LESS THAN 48 HOURS to raise every dollar we can.**

**[Please don't let me come up short, Peter.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874875:6tUE9rGNU:m:1:3331703221:EFC24918C99DDF5FA576D5AF0963ED7C:r)**

This is the financial report that Democrats will be following closely to see if we've been able to build momentum since the runoff was declared.

I am counting on you to help show the Left that conservatives will not give up the fight against the Democrats' policies that are destroying our country. **[Please, chip in whatever you can today to help me CLOSE THE GAP before the filing deadline tomorrow at midnight.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874875:6tUE9rGNU:m:1:3331703221:EFC24918C99DDF5FA576D5AF0963ED7C:r)**

[** RUSH $25 -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874876:6tUE9rGNU:m:1:3331703221:EFC24918C99DDF5FA576D5AF0963ED7C:r)
[** RUSH $50 -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874877:6tUE9rGNU:m:1:3331703221:EFC24918C99DDF5FA576D5AF0963ED7C:r)
[** RUSH $75 -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874878:6tUE9rGNU:m:1:3331703221:EFC24918C99DDF5FA576D5AF0963ED7C:r)
[** RUSH $100 -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874879:6tUE9rGNU:m:1:3331703221:EFC24918C99DDF5FA576D5AF0963ED7C:r)
I know how to win, and I'm ready to win this battle for conservatives all over the country. However, I can't hold Senator Raphael Warnock accountable for his disastrous voting record without the help of patriots far and wide.

Senator Warnock has outraised us every single filing deadline, but with your help, we can put up some of our biggest numbers since the race began.

The deadline is TOMORROW. **[So, if you can chip in $25, $50, or maybe even $75 or $100, you'd be doing a great service to our nation and putting us one step closer to introducing Joe Biden and the Radical Left to the concept of checks and balances.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874875:6tUE9rGNU:m:1:3331703221:EFC24918C99DDF5FA576D5AF0963ED7C:r)**

Thank you for continuing this fight with me. Your support is greatly appreciated.

Thanks,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874875:6tUE9rGNU:m:1:3331703221:EFC24918C99DDF5FA576D5AF0963ED7C:r)

Herschel Walker

P.S. Federal law prohibits us from extending this runoff fundraising deadline, **[so please help us hit our goal before midnight tomorrow!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874875:6tUE9rGNU:m:1:3331703221:EFC24918C99DDF5FA576D5AF0963ED7C:r)**

[** Donate Today -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874875:6tUE9rGNU:m:1:3331703221:EFC24918C99DDF5FA576D5AF0963ED7C:r)

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874880:6tUE9rGNU:m:1:3331703221:EFC24918C99DDF5FA576D5AF0963ED7C:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874881:6tUE9rGNU:m:1:3331703221:EFC24918C99DDF5FA576D5AF0963ED7C:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874882:6tUE9rGNU:m:1:3331703221:EFC24918C99DDF5FA576D5AF0963ED7C:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61874883:6tUE9rGNU:m:1:3331703221:EFC24918C99DDF5FA576D5AF0963ED7C:r)

Warnock we will expand our slim Democratic majority in the Senate and be one step closer to codifying Roe, protecting voting rights, defending Social Security, and so much more... But, Peter, it’s clear from the current polling: this race is going to come down to just a handful of votes. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | Peter, MAGA money is going to be FLOODING into this runoff election. That’s why we’re reaching out to YOU. We need your help to give Rev. Warnock the resources he needs to power through this runoff election and pull out a HUGE VICTORY for Democrats (and our democracy...) If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | We can’t make history without you. The Collective PAC The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. To Donate by Check: PO Box 15320, DC 20003 Paid for by the Collective PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. ** | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from The Collective PAC, please .

name: =?utf-8?Q?Adam=20Laxalt?=
subject: Thank You Nevada
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laxalt for Senate
body:
While this race and the 2022 election cycle didn’t go as we hoped, I am proud of the race we ran. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/adamlaxalt/thankyounevada-7532399?e=018ab83301)
---
| | Dear fellow Nevadan,

_I have fought the good fight, I have finished the race, I have kept the faith._ (2 TIM 4:7)

I’m reaching out to thank you for your generous support to me and my campaign. While this race and the 2022 election cycle didn’t go as we hoped, I am proud of the race we ran.

So many Nevadans and Americans rose to the occasion, donating their time and treasure, in an effort to help save our state and our country. Unfortunately, we came up short, falling less than one percent behind, and that’s with $120 million spent against us, more than all other Republican federal and state candidates in Nevada, combined. We relentlessly campaigned for 16 months, and ran the race we wanted to run. Our team left everything on the field and should be proud.

This heartbreaking loss was not expected, but we close out with two realities. First, our Republican turnout on Election Day was significantly lower than expected as we needed to overcome nearly three weeks of Democrat-favored mail-in voting.

And second, Nevada’s new elections laws enacted two years ago allowed for massive ballot harvesting and votes dropped off at dropboxes and polling places on Election Day. This is not a form of voting Republican voters prefer, so as those ballots were tabulated, they skewed heavily towards Democrats up and down the ballot, including our opponent.

Going forward, Republicans will either have to fix our election laws or better adjust to them and to the tactics used against us.

As you know, I entered this arena for my family and those all over Nevada and America who believe our country needed a new direction. It has been a privilege to meet and get to know so many great Nevadans from every community. We have a remarkable state, full of remarkable people who love their country.

I would like to thank our countless volunteers, our supporters, and our incredible campaign team. I am enduringly grateful for your tireless efforts, and for your passion for a better Nevada and America.

My biggest concern when entering this race was the toll on my wife and our four young children. I am thankful for their love, support, and tremendous sacrifice this year. I now get to return to being the husband and father I strive to be, and return to private life and private practice.

I am grateful for the outpouring and encouragement I have received, and I’ll remain forever committed to our state, our country, and our cause.

Thank you, Nevada.

Adam P. Laxalt
---
| | ###
---
| | | | | | [](https://adamlaxalt.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=da4abd80675c7148be5f8e45a&id=3435c0affc&e=018ab83301)

We have LESS THAN 48 HOURS to raise every dollar we can. This is the financial report that Democrats will be following closely to see if we've been able to build momentum since the runoff was declared. I am counting on you to help show the Left that conservatives will not give up the fight against the Democrats' policies that are destroying our country. I know how to win, and I'm ready to win this battle for conservatives all over the country. However, I can't hold Senator Raphael Warnock accountable for his disastrous voting record without the help of patriots far and wide. Senator Warnock has outraised us every single filing deadline, but with your help, we can put up some of our biggest numbers since the race began. The deadline is TOMORROW. Thank you for continuing this fight with me. Your support is greatly appreciated. Thanks, Herschel Walker P.S. clean_body: Herschel needs every hand on deck. | Friend, Our fight to take back our country is far from over. With the fate of Georgia's must-win Senate seat still hanging in the balance, my good friend Herschel Walker needs our support now more than ever. That’s why I’m personally sending my campaign team down to GA to give Herschel the final push he needs to WIN his runoff election. But we can’t afford to send our team empty-handed. I’m counting on my top supporters like YOU – who already delivered an incredible victory here in Texas – to help me provide Herschel with both the team and resources he needs to FLIP this Senate seat. Friend, nearly 6 months ago I reached out asking you to help Herschel with just a day left in his primary... ...And the outpouring of support you showed him was truly incredible. And now, with so much at stake, I have to ask that you join me in standing with Herschel once again when it matters most. This runoff will be won by a RAZOR-THIN MARGIN, and every dollar our team brings with them to Georgia could be the difference between victory and defeat. Thank you, Wesley Hunt Congressman-elect TX-38 1707 1/2 Post Oak Blvd. #525 Houston, TX 77056 Paid for by Hunt for Congress. clean_body: I’m in DC for New Member Orientation! | | Hi Peter, It’s official: I’m in DC this week for New Member Orientation – a fun, whirlwind week of learning everything I need to know to get myself, my staff, and my office prepared to serve Vermont in Congress come January! One of the promises I made to Vermonters during this campaign was that I would always have your back and be a voice for our communities if you sent me to Washington. Now, I’m ready to make-good on that promise. As we’re gearing up for the 118th Congress, I want to hear from you: I’m more energized than ever to get to work with my new colleagues in Congress and pass meaningful legislation that will make a meaningful difference for Vermonters. As I’m gearing up to serve you in Congress, I want to know what issue is at the top of your list. Thanks for taking a few minutes to share with me – I’m excited to read through these responses after New Member Orientation wraps! -Becca Balint Becca believes the best thoughts are not always from the loudest voices in the room. As President Pro Tem of the Vermont State Senate, she's led the charge to invest in affordable housing, fight climate change, enshrine reproductive freedom into our state's constitution, and so much more. Peter, because of your unyielding support, we were able to achieve a historic re-election victory for Attorney General Letitia James. But now, as we plan our priorities for the next four years, we need to know how top supporters like you _really_ feel about the AG’s work so far.

**That’s why we decided to compile a list of some of Letitia’s biggest accomplishments during her first term as New York’s attorney general:**
* Letitia successfully **sued Big Pharma** for its astronomical increases in prescription drug prices AND its role in the tragic opioid epidemic – ultimately winning BILLIONS for New York.

* She stood tall against some of **our nation’s wealthiest and most powerful men, organizations, and corporations** to put an end to generations-long corruption and malfeasance.

* She **fiercely defended reproductive freedom **when Roe v. Wade was overturned by calling for a statewide abortion fund for people throughout our nation who are seeking reproductive care, by fighting in court against states that outlawed abortion with no exceptions, and by convening a task force to offer patients and health care providers aid in this new legal landscape.

Peter, we think Letitia James has done a fantastic job as New York’s attorney general over these last four years, but we need to hear what people like you think of her work thus far. Every single response we receive will help define Letitia’s fight for the voiceless and vulnerable in her next term – but it looks like we’re still missing _your_ response.

**We set a goal to hear from at least 5,000 supporters before midnight tonight, so please let us know ASAP:**

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: We’ve got an incredibly tough fight ahead
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
and we need to refill our campaign.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/jONF-3TiDltHYgXdssyAC66hjs350rs7hRNR1TPgmjA=/00nVPovlA2PBY9vC1EgUf9rWnuYhfcWZ6gfgZrGYdCM=?amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2022.11.15_b1_rw_all) Friend, I just want to say _thank you._

Because of the strength of our grassroots movement, we've come one step closer to making history yet again here in Georgia. And we've shown the country that our fight for progress isn't over.

**We know we can win this - we have done it before! But I've always been honest with you, so I'll do so again: we've got an incredibly tough fight ahead. We poured every cent we had into getting this far - which means we're now back to square one.** With all eyes on Georgia, the GOP is gearing up to flood us with millions in attack ads, and we need to refill our campaign.

That's why I'm asking directly: [**Will you split $10 between me and Greg Stanton right now to kickstart this critical next phase and power both of our reelection campaigns to victory?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/jONF-3TiDltHYgXdssyAC66hjs350rs7hRNR1TPgmjA=/00nVPovlA2PBY9vC1EgUf9rWnuYhfcWZ6gfgZrGYdCM=?amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2022.11.15_b1_rw_all)

When we launched this campaign, we knew it wouldn't be easy. The GOP has been coming after me with everything it's got since the beginning, and they haven't let up since.

Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire Republican establishment have spent millions to prop up my opponent, Herschel Walker, and defeat me. And they're about to spend a whole lot more to definitively turn Georgia red.

That's why taking our foot off the gas is simply not an option. **We 're in a position to win this race - but not without grassroots support.

With time running out before our crucial midnight deadline, we're falling short of the $50,000 we need to raise by midnight tonight, so I'm personally asking: [Will you split $10 or more right now between me and Greg Stanton to help me defeat Herschel Walker, keep Georgia blue, and kick off Greg's reelection campaign?](https://act.myngp.com/el/jONF-3TiDltHYgXdssyAC66hjs350rs7hRNR1TPgmjA=/00nVPovlA2PBY9vC1EgUf9rWnuYhfcWZ6gfgZrGYdCM=?amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2022.11.15_b1_rw_all)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Illinois=20Review?=
subject: Illinois Review Welcomes New Ownership Team
body:
Conservative Radio Show Host Mark Vargas and Chicago Attorney Scott Kaspar Acquire the 17-year-old Publication in Latest Deal | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ed160c1f5e22/illinois-review-welcomes-new-ownership-team?e=1cb5fdae9e)
---
| |
---
| | **Leading Conservative News Publication Illinois Review Welcomes New Ownership Team**
---
| Conservative Radio Show Host Mark Vargas and Chicago Attorney Scott Kaspar Acquire the 17-year-old Publication in Latest Deal
---
| **Chicago, IL** – Illinois Review (IR) announced on Tuesday a new ownership team that includes conservative radio show host and Newsmax columnist Mark Vargas and Chicago attorney and former US congressional candidate Scott Kaspar. The widely recognized and conservative publication on Illinois news was founded in 2005 by conservative leaders Fran Eaton and Dennis LaComb.
---
| |
---
| “After 17 years and 17,000 stories later, it was time to hand over Illinois Review to a trusted and capable new ownership team that could take the organization to the next level,” said IR co-founder Fran Eaton. “Now more than ever, we’re going to need leading conservative voices and perspectives to rebuild the Republican Party in Illinois – and I know Mark and Scott are the team that can do it.”
“I have known Fran and Dennis since 2005, and I am honored to leverage my resources and rolodex to help take IR to the next level,” said Mark Vargas. “The very first OpEd that I published many years ago was on IR – and so it brings me great joy to officially be a part of the team as co-owner.”
“For decades, IR has been a leading voice on conservative news and perspectives here in Illinois,” said Scott Kaspar. “The brand, our contributors, supporters and subscribers have made IR a total success over the last 17 years – and we can’t wait to build upon that and make IR an even bigger force not just here in Illinois, but across the country,” said Kaspar.
Vargas and Kaspar plan to roll out a new website design, a newspaper division that will bring IR to your doorstep, expand IR’s social media presence and subscriber list and compensate contributors for their work. Vargas will serve as Editor-in-Chief and Kaspar as Publisher.
---
| **To learn more about Illinois Review, visit www.illinoisreview.com**
---

clean_body: Conservative Radio Show Host Mark Vargas and Chicago Attorney Scott Kaspar Acquire the 17-year-old Publication in Latest Deal | | | | | | | Leading Conservative News Publication Illinois Review Welcomes New Ownership Team | Conservative Radio Show Host Mark Vargas and Chicago Attorney Scott Kaspar Acquire the 17-year-old Publication in Latest Deal | Chicago, IL – Illinois Review (IR) announced on Tuesday a new ownership team that includes conservative radio show host and Newsmax columnist Mark Vargas and Chicago attorney and former US congressional candidate Scott Kaspar. The widely recognized and conservative publication on Illinois news was founded in 2005 by conservative leaders Fran Eaton and Dennis LaComb. | | | “After 17 years and 17,000 stories later, it was time to hand over Illinois Review to a trusted and capable new ownership team that could take the organization to the next level,” said IR co-founder Fran Eaton. “Now more than ever, we’re going to need leading conservative voices and perspectives to rebuild the Republican Party in Illinois – and I know Mark and Scott are the team that can do it.” “I have known Fran and Dennis since 2005, and I am honored to leverage my resources and rolodex to help take IR to the next level,” said Mark Vargas. “The very first OpEd that I published many years ago was on IR – and so it brings me great joy to officially be a part of the team as co-owner.” “For decades, IR has been a leading voice on conservative news and perspectives here in Illinois,” said Scott Kaspar. “The brand, our contributors, supporters and subscribers have made IR a total success over the last 17 years – and we can’t wait to build upon that and make IR an even bigger force not just here in Illinois, but across the country,” said Kaspar. Vargas and Kaspar plan to roll out a new website design, a newspaper division that will bring IR to your doorstep, expand IR’s social media presence and subscriber list and compensate contributors for their work. Vargas will serve as Editor-in-Chief and Kaspar as Publisher. | To learn more about Illinois Review, visit www.illinoisreview.com | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2022 Illinois Review LLC. All rights reserved. ILLINOIS REVIEW Mark A. Vargas, Editor-in-Chief Scott R. Kaspar, Publisher Our mailing address is: P.O. subject: Lauren Boebert Recount
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
| | |

Fellow Conservative: Every vote should be counted, and every vote should count.
In Colorado's 3rd congressional district, conservative superstar **Lauren Boebert** is locked in a tight race against liberal Democrat Adam Frisch. With 99% of the votes in, Boebert led by just over 1,000 votes -- 0.4% of all votes cast.
Races this close in Colorado always go to a recount, and we all know what can happen when bureaucrats go behind closed doors with the ballots. In this race, it's all about election integrity now.
**[Please support the Lauren Boebert Recount Fund!](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a8119b0fdc684b9abada20233ef7db23&_e=gwIGMsuqGOYKy9okrSk9V9IlGv9BUnLN8SwmCFRe2LW1-u_7y8Nph14ITCwXjpFKn7U5z6YPPau_065UlL-pFrF2kvU7SU3957mgPqDaaxwKCjwekwPkR0BmqjXRUpPDsvvjPerUTyNZ_6Oqhni5oRgIAoMG35WB6McKmfcJFSUPM5nqJ5T0vYsuhulpFQbIbySuhkrEtgsnaC3s3EeopS3lo7D3XcywR-0FGDYW6uawbBaojORXfsDvP7BrrBmV)**
Rep. Boebert will need money to pay the costs of monitoring the process and enforcing the law, so every legally-cast vote is counted.
Boebert's opponent will have the bottomless resources of the woke elite to draw on. Conservatives must help her answer, dollar for dollar.
**[You can help by supporting her recount fund today.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a8119b0fdc684b9abada20233ef7db23&_e=gwIGMsuqGOYKy9okrSk9V9IlGv9BUnLN8SwmCFRe2LW1-u_7y8Nph14ITCwXjpFKn7U5z6YPPau_065UlL-pFrF2kvU7SU3957mgPqDaaxxJtBB16ySowUe8wZFHvsNqvt5D11NlFDZwmGArqvDlS6PdcpjT5__-ixGPAtpehtu6615xQyI8ZE5dlbjnPRf-MN500j9gJwdhQ1gne_QEy0bknyuQaN_YYnQOmx5yd-yCYLjCj3ttPEZdX3LZRBqE)**
_Individuals are allowed to contribute any amount up to $2,900 to this fund, and just like before, HFF will pay all processing fees and transfer 100% of your donation to her campaign._
If we want real election integrity, we must ensure every ballot gets the honest process it deserves.
Lauren Boebert won this race. A true recount will find that. But whether she gets a TRUE recount partly depends on us.
**[Please support Lauren Boebert and election integrity now.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a8119b0fdc684b9abada20233ef7db23&_e=gwIGMsuqGOYKy9okrSk9V9IlGv9BUnLN8SwmCFRe2LW1-u_7y8Nph14ITCwXjpFKn7U5z6YPPau_065UlL-pFrF2kvU7SU3957mgPqDaaxzpriwBW8gbV1BaUTKH1AFyY8NllLJp9DeapAMznJHFwWckGImIFsLP6pE8yF3NjX3bWvpRY24jPenGuuRFuPLDsH2SjcctxTUob8wVQggJtvBYbj2UE0pJPR5VtlB--ej1WS7hfkPyeeLJ1tT27tP1)**
Your support will pay for the lawyers, monitors, and other resources she will need to finish this fight.
If we work together, we can make the difference between a full, fair review of votes and a shadowy process behind closed doors.
Time is short. Lauren Boebert stands for freedom. Now we have to stand with her. The fight for election integrity is now the fight for a fair recount for Lauren Boebert in Colorado!
Thank you for helping us push so many of our Freedom Caucus candidates on to victory. We are grateful for your generous support. Sincerely,
---
---
Ray Yonkura Executive Director House Freedom Fund

Peter, Katie Hobbs was finally declared the winner in the Arizona gubernatorial race last night. We are thrilled. In electing Katie Hobbs, re-electing Mark Kelly, and choosing Adrian Fontes as the next Secretary of State, Arizonans made very clear: there’s no place for election deniers in political office, in Arizona and elsewhere. They also made clear that Arizona’s transformation from red to blue is continuing right on schedule. And that actual, progressive Democrats can win statewide. Of course, Kyrsten Sinema was MIA while Democrats in her state fought tooth and nail to keep dangerous, right-wing candidates like Blake Masters and Kari Lake out of office. Some journalists and pundits even speculated that Sinema refused to campaign for Katie Hobbs (who had previously been a close ally) because Hobbs criticized her position on the filibuster. Well now, Sinema’s brand of obstructionist politics has been made obsolete. Why should Arizona settle for fake Democrats like Kyrsten Sinema when real Democrats like Mark Kelly and Katie Hobbs can win? That’s why we’re going to make sure Sinema is replaced by a REAL Democrat. That work must start now. clean_body: | | | Peter, Katie Hobbs was finally declared the winner in the Arizona gubernatorial race last night. We are thrilled. In electing Katie Hobbs, re-electing Mark Kelly, and choosing Adrian Fontes as the next Secretary of State, Arizonans made very clear: there’s no place for election deniers in political office, in Arizona and elsewhere. They also made clear that Arizona’s transformation from red to blue is continuing right on schedule. And that actual, progressive Democrats can win statewide. Of course, Kyrsten Sinema was MIA while Democrats in her state fought tooth and nail to keep dangerous, right-wing candidates like Blake Masters and Kari Lake out of office. Some journalists and pundits even speculated that Sinema refused to campaign for Katie Hobbs (who had previously been a close ally) because Hobbs criticized her position on the filibuster. Well now, Sinema’s brand of obstructionist politics has been made obsolete. Why should Arizona settle for fake Democrats like Kyrsten Sinema when real Democrats like Mark Kelly and Katie Hobbs can win? That’s why we’re going to make sure Sinema is replaced by a REAL Democrat. That work must start now. Thanks for all you do, -Primary Sinema | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Peter, it’s official: Our critical Georgia Senate race is heading to a runoff.

With the entire GOP establishment behind my opponent, Herschel Walker, I can't keep up this momentum and defend my critical seat without your immediate support. That's why I'm humbly asking: **[Will you chip in $5 or more right now to keep Georgia blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54656127/379208950/-962284980?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk462-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTAwMjBmNy0zOTY1LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2SoKDgGsQreU_kw38fS1c5-y_qGBmqgpxUPUz6Y4njQ=)**
GOP donors are flooding our race with over $37 million – and Mitch McConnell's super PAC has launched attack ad after attack ad against me. Republicans are determined to flip Georgia red.

name: Rev. Warnock
subject: Herschel Walker wants a national abortion ban
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
| | |
---
Friend, I needed to reach out right away.

**After Georgia Republicans enacted their ultra-restrictive abortion ban, my GOP opponent, Herschel Walker, revealed that he wants to go even further, saying, "There's not a national ban on abortion right now, and I think that's a problem."**
A problem. You read that right. As a pro-choice pastor, I’ll _never_ stop fighting to restore the right to choose nationwide, but this much is clear: **If Walker wins this race, he could be a crucial vote for a national abortion ban in the Senate. We must do everything in our power to stop that from happening.**
With experts saying our race will be neck and neck, I mean it when I say that reproductive rights are on the ballot. **That's why I'm urgently asking:** [Will you give $5 or more now to help me defeat Walker, keep Georgia blue, and restore reproductive rights for all?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54633509/379172981/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5081-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjAwYmMwZS0xMDY1LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nebbM4k7QXKYQcpVnfyDgAT3LcMXxjTuCk_49UnuG6A=)
Thank you.

– Rev. Raphael Warnock

clean_body: | | | Friend, I needed to reach out right away. After Georgia Republicans enacted their ultra-restrictive abortion ban, my GOP opponent, Herschel Walker, revealed that he wants to go even further, saying, "There's not a national ban on abortion right now, and I think that's a problem." A problem. You read that right. As a pro-choice pastor, I’ll never stop fighting to restore the right to choose nationwide, but this much is clear: If Walker wins this race, he could be a crucial vote for a national abortion ban in the Senate. We must do everything in our power to stop that from happening. With experts saying our race will be neck and neck, I mean it when I say that reproductive rights are on the ballot. That's why I'm urgently asking: = Thank you. – Rev. Raphael Warnock | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. For your reference, any donor history or identification in this message reflects what we have on file for the email address [dpwillis67@gmail.com] to which this message was sent. The Democrats clearly targeted my race, pouring millions in to prop up my lying Democrat opponent and attack me with baseless lies.

We stepped up and spent what we had to fend off their attacks by running ads, holding rallies and getting out the vote. Please make a generous contribution as we prepare for the likely recount battle. **

| Time could not be more critical. We still don't know who will control Congress, but clearly keeping Colorado's 3rd District **RED** is essential. My seat is a MUST-WIN.

Let's face it, if it weren't for grassroots patriots, like you Friend, we'd be looking at sending a Nancy Pelosi rubber stamp to Congress. So, please step up to the plate and [chip in your most generous donation](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=69da925a686744aa9314366ec87840df&_e=vK2irt9RItX5jhhmpBlZ2PafWCd8fggqNWi3Vv9bTeOeeTMjE3_w49Y-foEJrIZa85H-ouIHiw6XgBlbrXLIi8WemxpcItDrJsyl_vzVpCcG7pnWxOgYUHE5HVEDS_AeYhcHQ3-cMwibNzlvnHw1bSFeqaC3hS0qcNBJzUFNky8bvfb9VgKMmUapDwKvregKdYNWCxyfXVXFkt8-7eBqKhiDx3n4NLMSnJedUS7QcBbmRVL_qo0J9da547tmICEMWVlSl-UItZWvap1GPtU0emrg6nViYYAFIJe3yPdkJ6w%3D).

**We have to remain vigilant during this time, and we need[ your support](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=69da925a686744aa9314366ec87840df&_e=vK2irt9RItX5jhhmpBlZ2PafWCd8fggqNWi3Vv9bTeOeeTMjE3_w49Y-foEJrIZa85H-ouIHiw6XgBlbrXLIi8WemxpcItDrJsyl_vzVpCcG7pnWxOgYUHE5HVEDS_AeYhcHQ3-cMwibNzlvnHw1bWR6gbgC0vd3PbRdNVijjXcxoU9LniwBeEUzUo01vfQL4ZZWtzXGUxaypsdsW3hrg_D4ZD4pHt6JisOlnEXi154vY8jxfIrmcOYDbJzxkRIwAntkdPqFRZ8RXR8J5nOjkhfsrmXWvDKdv3F7Czc93uM%3D) to do so.** We must make sure no leftwing shenanigans affect the outcome.

I am absolutely confident that we will win, and I am looking forward to firing Nancy Pelosi very much. [Help me do it >>](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=69da925a686744aa9314366ec87840df&_e=vK2irt9RItX5jhhmpBlZ2PafWCd8fggqNWi3Vv9bTeOeeTMjE3_w49Y-foEJrIZa85H-ouIHiw6XgBlbrXLIi8WemxpcItDrJsyl_vzVpCcG7pnWxOgYUHE5HVEDS_AeYhcHQ3-cMwibNzlvnHw1bW5hOEt3uGLKGnLwKDMfbsrVbbsLJRHBMfL6p46bWthuQFSiMpsMvH6m9ApSHTt_ev6_tVb43tud3KE7wsaUz2F_OJ_frpLdViixWGLJ49Jt81U5YDmv8TBTRM0rEyKQMYv1m9rTDSW4JgR09meu5DA%3D)

Lauren Boebert

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: Did you see what Trump said?
body:
| | | |
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vg7qxw20T3t1LnU4LM4B3bti3dp9H0u15SDxIFy8fOK9bQJkDbsyQWyEuBqyWhWZ5lQVbyQEo_3kwYX49xAi_v3t7g3sEJUlhOPZOFQum73e_3Nc-cvf3FCBp1qaWazLAt9CLtK3FI_i2Cqx7HydlKDlNtTMTthgSXBM57W8GoLZRPSicbaAq5wdRU04vp352aNEWvqHcO5CXkvcoHKjdA==&c=GqMrvk6V7rIjZlp9DYTI8u9gAFOuc-ySgvqnTG_mXdircI0QBST1lg==&ch=L7ARsCan24-KKOBpC-Jtg5yKgB_rab0ERgJkNIUW19vU8ac57KBUwQ==)

| Peter,
---
| 🇺🇸 I am honored to have received these kind words from America's future President in 2024! 🇺🇸
Trump knows more than anyone what it's like to have the Establishment come after you with vicious lies and smears, so it's an honor to have this fellow Florida Man in my corner.
This is Donald Trump's Party, and I'm a proud Donald Trump Republican!
But Peter, even though the midterms are in the rearview, we still need to fight now more than ever...
The Big Tech cartel, Fake News propagandists, Wall Street "Republicans" who want a return to the Bush/Cheney days, and the corrupt Deep State are mobilizing in full force to stop our MAGA Movement. They want to take us out and send a message discouraging anyone from ever challenging the Establishment.
They don't want YOU to have a voice in the political system - they want to see the America First Movement meet its permanent end!
So I have one question for you...
[Will you help me continue the fight for Trump's America-First vision for our country?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vg7qxw20T3t1LnU4LM4B3bti3dp9H0u15SDxIFy8fOK9bQJkDbsyQWyEuBqyWhWZ5lQVbyQEo_3kwYX49xAi_v3t7g3sEJUlhOPZOFQum73e_3Nc-cvf3FCBp1qaWazLAt9CLtK3FI_i2Cqx7HydlKDlNtTMTthgSXBM57W8GoLZRPSicbaAq5wdRU04vp352aNEWvqHcO5CXkvcoHKjdA==&c=GqMrvk6V7rIjZlp9DYTI8u9gAFOuc-ySgvqnTG_mXdircI0QBST1lg==&ch=L7ARsCan24-KKOBpC-Jtg5yKgB_rab0ERgJkNIUW19vU8ac57KBUwQ==)

name: Rep. Alex Mooney
subject: OFFICIALLY LAUNCHED:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mooney for Senate, Inc
body:
This is how we take back the Senate.
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61877712:J4ahtrGN_:m:1:3317145305:10F1455CE780FFE2CB06379CF7946A64:r)
---
Peter,
---
With the Democrats clinging to the narrowest of Senate majorities, our path to retaking the upper chamber in 2024 runs through West Virginia.
---
Assuming we win in Georgia, we'll only need to win this 1 seat to retake the Senate majority, and President Trump carried our great state by a whooping 39 percentage points in 2020!
---
_**We can 't let a red state like West Virginia continue to be represented by a liberal like Joe Manchin who's empowering the most radical, far-Left administration in American history. **_
---
That's why I'm officially launching my campaign for U.S. Senate. Now, I need your help to FIRE Manchin and take back the Senate for President Trump!
---
**[Please make a contribution to become a Founding Member of my U.S. Senate campaign to FIRE Joe Manchin and FLIP West Virginia's Senate seat to the Republicans.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61877712:J4ahtrGN_:m:1:3317145305:10F1455CE780FFE2CB06379CF7946A64:r)**
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61877712:J4ahtrGN_:m:1:3317145305:10F1455CE780FFE2CB06379CF7946A64:r)
---

[ACCEPT YOUR MEMBERSHIP >> ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61877712:J4ahtrGN_:m:1:3317145305:10F1455CE780FFE2CB06379CF7946A64:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $25](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61877713:J4ahtrGN_:m:1:3317145305:10F1455CE780FFE2CB06379CF7946A64:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $50](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61877714:J4ahtrGN_:m:1:3317145305:10F1455CE780FFE2CB06379CF7946A64:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $75](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61877715:J4ahtrGN_:m:1:3317145305:10F1455CE780FFE2CB06379CF7946A64:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $100](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61877716:J4ahtrGN_:m:1:3317145305:10F1455CE780FFE2CB06379CF7946A64:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $250](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61877717:J4ahtrGN_:m:1:3317145305:10F1455CE780FFE2CB06379CF7946A64:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61877712:J4ahtrGN_:m:1:3317145305:10F1455CE780FFE2CB06379CF7946A64:r)
---

Joe Manchin wants you to believe he's a moderate who's willing to stand up to Joe Biden.
---
_But when push comes to shove, he sells out._
---
**His words and empty promises are just a pathetic attempt to cover up his efforts to empower Biden 's liberal agenda. **
---
He doesn't have the guts to stand up to his own party and do what's right for the people of West Virginia.
---
_**[CONTRIBUTE TO FIRE MANCHIN>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61877712:J4ahtrGN_:m:1:3317145305:10F1455CE780FFE2CB06379CF7946A64:r)**_.
---
Unlike Manchin, I'll always put you first, Peter.
---
In my hotly contested congressional primary against a liberal Republican, I won President Trump's endorsement last year because I'm a proud America First conservative with a proven track record of fighting for election integrity, defeating socialism, supporting the Second Amendment, and defending our shared conservative values.
---
I'll bring that exact same agenda to the Senate, where I'll work with my colleagues to defend your freedom, lower inflation, secure our border, and get our country back on track.
---
**But make no mistake: firing a well-entrenched liberal career politician like Manchin isn 't going to be easy, even in deep-red West Virginia. **
---
Biden and his allies in the swamp are already gearing up to spend MILLIONS to try and get Manchin reelected.
---
_There 's no time to waste. To FLIP this critical Senate seat, I'm going to need an army of grassroots, America First conservatives fighting by my side. _
---
I hope I can count on you to step up and join my team.
---
**[So please, make a contribution to become a Founding Member of my U.S. Senate campaign to FIRE Joe Manchin and FLIP West Virginia's Senate to the Republicans.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61877712:J4ahtrGN_:m:1:3317145305:10F1455CE780FFE2CB06379CF7946A64:r)**
---
Thank you,
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61877712:J4ahtrGN_:m:1:3317145305:10F1455CE780FFE2CB06379CF7946A64:r)
---
Rep. Alex Mooney
Candidate for U.S. Senate (West Virginia)
---

[ACCEPT YOUR MEMBERSHIP >> ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61877712:J4ahtrGN_:m:1:3317145305:10F1455CE780FFE2CB06379CF7946A64:r)
---

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Because Raphael Warnock doesn't court corporate donors, he needs grassroots support from communities like Blue Amp Action, as Mitch McConnell has dumped $52 million into Georgia to attack Warnock with dishonest smears.
body:
keep this good man in the Senate
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3c936051-cd0a-49e6-a56a-035b1371b55b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, | **[With a few weeks til the runoff election in Georgia, we ask you to please make a contribution of any amount to the Warnock campaign to keep Georgia blue.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te668e35c-689e-479e-a222-0739f34e6d76/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**
---
Raphael Warnock is the kind of man we simply must keep in the Senate--he understands how most Americans live, as he's lived an American story. Warnock grew up in public housing in Savannah, GA, with 11 brothers and sisters. He was the first in his family to graduate from a four-year college, and went on to earn a Ph.D. _When an historic opportunity presented itself, and Warnock was given the honor of serving as senior pastor at Ebenezer Baptist Church in Atlanta--preaching from the very pulpit where Martin Luther King Jr. once stood--he proved the perfect choice._

|
---
| | | | | | [**Donate: Keep a good man in the Senate**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf0a4a24f-2c5e-484d-94a5-47dad5975bc0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | A lifelong advocate for affordable health care, fair wages, and voting rights, a fighter for a woman's right to control their body and keeping our schools, malls and other public spaces safe from gun violence, he next proved himself the ideal choice to take on these crucial fights in Washington.
---
**Because Warnock doesn't court corporate donors, he needs grassroots support from communities like Blue Amp Action, as Mitch McConnell has dumped $52 million into Georgia to attack Warnock with dishonest smears.** **[Can you join us in supporting him with a donation of $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can afford? They don't make many like Senator Warnock. We need his empathy, morality and work ethic in Washington.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T53d8d89a-6c51-4086-a9d5-5b1060441cdf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** Thank you all for making this community a powerful supporter of progressive values across the country.
Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. name: Freedom Caucus
subject: Lauren Boebert Election Integrity
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
| | |
---
|
---
Fellow Conservative: Every vote should be counted, and every vote should count.
In Colorado's 3rd congressional district, conservative superstar **Lauren Boebert** is locked in a tight race against liberal Democrat Adam Frisch. With 99% of the votes in, Boebert led by just over 1,000 votes -- 0.4% of all votes cast.
Races this close in Colorado always go to a recount, and we all know what can happen when bureaucrats go behind closed doors with the ballots. In this race, it's all about election integrity now.
**[Please support the Lauren Boebert Recount Fund!](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=706f0c43eb3b4d09b9085e426d22e2c6&_e=FuXZhzpAN0sxqUhhXZ1feE3cqa2jn68vdBgdNaxSZKIEYtnDmwV6RL-j3OO1Ag2KGR4NiXZE5kwy0M9FzHI-MF_6JzLdSIDM8QJgRnjNPcT4Acd9LDf7tueFfXGGClhaKIq-NfcKobuEGzQEDlU5KMd0gaLLazbXPVLASA6K5CIISGJd2Q2gbVdWXEhnZbujI90K5jMgYIAbwkUaE-y6oZL2sTcRkeiHatyAKJm5l1uqHBFwfZsGdOie6VHuJuN2)**
Rep. Boebert will need money to pay the costs of monitoring the process and enforcing the law, so every legally-cast vote is counted.
Boebert's opponent will have the bottomless resources of the woke elite to draw on. Conservatives must help her answer, dollar for dollar.
**[You can help by supporting her recount fund today.](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=706f0c43eb3b4d09b9085e426d22e2c6&_e=FuXZhzpAN0sxqUhhXZ1feE3cqa2jn68vdBgdNaxSZKIEYtnDmwV6RL-j3OO1Ag2KGR4NiXZE5kwy0M9FzHI-MF_6JzLdSIDM8QJgRnjNPcQh3D2TNZgcm-7asWRggR7ltNvhvMF4GIzVS4vLOdA2c0cObTi_a8d0UBR2gfAd-g9_yiZp8zYUoHI2E4N7OEDzRdyUAVVDGs_ad2lMY8-5jN_00W_CeFLBkTMGyeqYJmd1RoLVzm08hCxeYdOkgoG5)**
_Individuals are allowed to contribute any amount up to $2,900 to this fund, and just like before, HFF will pay all processing fees and transfer 100% of your donation to her campaign._
If we want real election integrity, we must ensure every ballot gets the honest process it deserves.
Lauren Boebert won this race. A true recount will find that. But whether she gets a TRUE recount partly depends on us.
**[Please support Lauren Boebert and election integrity now.](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=706f0c43eb3b4d09b9085e426d22e2c6&_e=FuXZhzpAN0sxqUhhXZ1feE3cqa2jn68vdBgdNaxSZKIEYtnDmwV6RL-j3OO1Ag2KGR4NiXZE5kwy0M9FzHI-MF_6JzLdSIDM8QJgRnjNPcS5U_IVH8DgDUtKqXsAwAOimSMcGdr5-vUzSHlFV8JkX_AgHqHUYs_gH4zE6S4CB-nRT0fO1IEHIPJuta0suWppPVwfqmlNh8ANZi5V5tv_bHLyBTsDiU9aDDU9MfLVUiThm8Yp6_3eAAwcupng6cEk)**
Your support will pay for the lawyers, monitors, and other resources she will need to finish this fight.
If we work together, we can make the difference between a full, fair review of votes and a shadowy process behind closed doors.
Time is short. Lauren Boebert stands for freedom. Now we have to stand with her. The fight for election integrity is now the fight for a fair recount for Lauren Boebert in Colorado!
Thank you for helping us push so many of our Freedom Caucus candidates on to victory. We are grateful for your generous support. Sincerely,
---
---
Ray Yonkura Executive Director House Freedom Fund
---
|
---
|
---
**LAUREN BOEBERT RECOUNT**
---
---
Please help Lauren Boebert fight for a fair recount. Don't let the Democrats hijack the process and disenfranchise voters who want to send this fighter back to Washington.

We've set a goal to raise another $200,000 today so we can fight back against GOP attacks – but we're falling short, and I need your help. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be automatically split between Raphael Warnock and Dick Durbin: = = = = = = = Thank you for all that you do. – Rev. Raphael Warnock ** ****=**** Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin

name: Melissa Hortman
subject: Thank you, friend.
disclaimer_text: paid for by the DFL House Caucus DFL House Caucus
body:
secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-nov22?refcode=111522 [secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-nov22?refcode=111522]
Friend,
Thank you. I cannot express the depth of gratitude I feel. Because of the support of DFLers like you, we were able to not only protect our House DFL majority but also hold the Governor’s Office and flip the Senate here in Minnesota. In an election where the circumstances were stacked against us, we were able to do something the pundits thought impossible. We couldn’t have done it without you.
Now, as the Minnesota House of Representatives has a DFL majority for the third cycle in a row, we can get important work done for Minnesotans: protecting reproductive freedom, investing in our public schools, making healthcare more affordable, and building an economy that works better for everyone. I’m excited to work with the DFL Senate majority and Governor Walz to build a better future for all Minnesotans.
Truly, we couldn’t have won this trifecta without a great team. With great candidates, a hard-working campaign staff, and awesome supporters like you, we were able to succeed. Thank you, friend.
Sincerely
Melissa Hortman
Speaker of the House
Minnesota House of Representatives
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-nov22?refcode=111522]

With the Democrats clinging to the narrowest of Senate majorities, our path to retaking the upper chamber in 2024 runs through West Virginia.

_But when push comes to shove, he sells out._

**His words and empty promises are just a pathetic attempt to cover up his efforts to empower Biden’s liberal agenda.**

name: Larry Hogan
subject: Three Strikes.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by An America United](https://links
body:
Time to move on.| | | Do you feel the same about this, friend? _Three elections..._ Former President Trump has managed to drag the Republican Party down for three consecutive elections with his divisive, extreme, and toxic rhetoric. What should have been a huge red wave and referendum on President Biden's terrible economy in last week's election, turned out to be a retaliation on the former President. Donald Trump's hand-picked, election-denying candidates managed to lose winnable races in every swing state. Common sense conservative candidates who focused on what really mattered to the people made their mark and won in New Hampshire, Iowa, Nevada, Nebraska, and many other states. The exhausted majority want **STRONG** and stable leadership – not extremists peddling conspiracy theories.
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=72858a55c5ed40da80d40b4a40855750&_e=gI15aBa8fhhT3R07ZT9lQaOl9ptbASePGRVlknVI7NVcndeRxoP3aaz1SUA_LcUTGpQYargixtco7hj6RujS_jUwbCfHNqRa8ewChsBORJrhYfGqsOnUszu81HTufK-3zzXAbEfKogadBANC4o1sg3FyVEgrYQgZwsmSLv-PphuDWuXPH9go59pZE5-tqIAWxDmzmMx6l-u6sNSfXPbA-20ZafS-Gt6gJsbjyZjLWDO-Lt0Bz4gPq0aj8ZUcF6MzKjgKYvD2_1_EyWuEBpq-0Q%3D%3D)

clean_body: Time to move on.| | | Do you feel the same about this, friend? Three elections... Former President Trump has managed to drag the Republican Party down for three consecutive elections with his divisive, extreme, and toxic rhetoric. What should have been a huge red wave and referendum on President Biden's terrible economy in last week's election, turned out to be a retaliation on the former President. Donald Trump's hand-picked, election-denying candidates managed to lose winnable races in every swing state. Common sense conservative candidates who focused on what really mattered to the people made their mark and won in New Hampshire, Iowa, Nevada, Nebraska, and many other states. The exhausted majority want STRONG and stable leadership – not extremists peddling conspiracy theories. Today, I am asking you to join me and tens of thousands of Americans who are looking for a better path forward. Last week's results give us a chance to reset and rebuild. Thank you for helping unite America with us,Larry Hogan Governor of Maryland | | | | Don't Miss This Event! | Join An America United on social media! | | ---|--- | | | | | |

name: =?utf-8?Q?Eric=20Deters?=
subject: The establishment WANTS to lose! 😡
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Deters for Governor
body:
| | | |
---
[](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=a08828f94f&e=fdefed58de)
Peter,The establishment is feeling really good about themselves right now.Mitch McConnell is refusing to move back leadership elections because he thinks he owns the Senate. The House is moving right along with their establishment picks as well. **Quite honestly, it’s disgusting.** When the politicians wake up every single day to go to work, they’re not working for you. They’re working for themselves. Look at the FTX crypto scam and all that money laundering going on to Ukraine with the Dems. It’s a bunch of crap and it needs to end right now.
| [HELP ERIC FIGHT THE ESTABLISHMENT!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=d60e70f822&e=fdefed58de)
---
After these midterms, these establishment hacks are feeling even more emboldened. **It’s time you and I get together and knock the wind out of their sails.** I’m running for Governor of Kentucky, a race that will be decided next year and I’ve got a serious chance at winning. I’m NOT the establishment. In fact, I’m the establishment’s worst nightmare. **I’m the only non-career politician running for this seat.** I’m the only candidate in the race talking about election integrity, and after Kari Lake’s race in Arizona, I think we need to talk A LOT more about it.
| [HELP ERIC CLEAN UP THE ELECTIONS!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=ff546e05b3&e=fdefed58de)
---
Disputed elections are not the path forward to preserving our democracy or instilling honesty, transparency and faith within our voting systems.With the recent audits coming from multiple states around the country, we now know that there were enough discrepancies to potentially change the outcome of the 2020 Presidential Election. These inconsistencies must be addressed immediately, or our efforts to protect the U.S. Constitution and protect freedom will fail.First, Voter I.D. is a non-negotiable requirement for every voter. Kentucky deserves fair elections and the most fair approach is for every eligible Kentucky voter to cast one vote. The mainstream legacy media continues to push a false narrative, stating that Voter I.D. is unpopular; however, the mainstream media lies. The truth is that Voter I.D. is wildly popular among American voters, nationwide. Leftist progressives push this agenda because it enables them to run and participate in fraudulent elections. As Governor of Kentucky, I refuse to disenfranchise you.Second, we must require pre—printed paper ballots. We will not print ballots on site at polling locations, which would increase the likelihood of individuals casting multiple ballots. We should remove all electronic equipment which utilize ballot counting software. If it has software, it is penetrable and exposed to a hacking risk. We should never allow our elections to have a vulnerability such as this, which is why Kentucky should invest in the personnel and resources we need for a proper, in person, ballot count. All ballots should be hand-counted by voters from that neighborhood precinct BEFORE the ballots leave the public sight.Third, I will push for regular, highly accurate audits of the results to ensure accuracy and to establish credibility and transparency within our voting process. Elections have consequences, as is evident by our current political climate, and as your Governor, I will lead a secure and honest voting process, which will preserve the power for and by the people for generations to come.
| [HELP CLEAN UP OUR ELECTIONS: $25.00](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=28adafaa21&e=fdefed58de)
---
| [HELP CLEAN UP OUR ELECTIONS: $50.00](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=c55e72f644&e=fdefed58de)
---
| [HELP CLEAN UP OUR ELECTIONS: $100.00](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=0c2f156dbd&e=fdefed58de)
---
I only tell the truth and the truth of the matter is that the establishment doesn’t care about winning. They’d rather be a permanent minority party as long as they get their payoffs from whoever is paying them off.**I don’t accept failure and I don’t accept bribes. They don’t call me a “BULLDOG” for nothing.** Stop feeling dejected and defeated after the midterms. Work. Work hard to elect me to the Governorship of Kentucky so we can put the establishment back in their place, clean up our state and in turn clean up our nation.The time is now and the person to help me is YOU. I’m going to leave my donation link right here if you feel so inclined to help my race out: **https://secure.winred.com/deters-for-governor/donate-today** Today is a new day and we can win together.Let’s do it,Eric DetersCandidate for Kentucky Governor
|
---
Paid for by Eric Deters for Governor
|

|

|

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: Did you hear my big announcement from Mar-a-Lago?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
Are you going to stand with me? I am proud to tell you that I just announced from Mar-a-Lago that I am officially running...
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61879183:6ON5XrGNH:m:1:3331703221:75737F5D70BA5474566702846C806595:r)

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61879183:6ON5XrGNH:m:1:3331703221:75737F5D70BA5474566702846C806595:r)

Peter,

I am proud to tell you that I just announced from Mar-a-Lago that I am officially running for **President of the United States.**

It is with your help that:

**WE WILL MAKE AMERICA POWERFUL AGAIN.
WE WILL MAKE AMERICA WEALTHY AGAIN.
WE WILL MAKE AMERICA STRONG AGAIN.
WE WILL MAKE AMERICA PROUD AGAIN.
WE WILL MAKE AMERICA SAFE AGAIN.
AND WE WILL MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!**

name: Friends of Doug Mastriano
subject: Thank You
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Doug Mastriano
body:
I want to sincerely thank each of you for your tireless commitment, dedication, and loyalty throughout our campaign.

| Not interested? [Unsubscribe here](https://www.doug4gov.com/unsubscribe?e=22fbcd4cc2070ad1eddfbcb62da93ed4&utm_source=dougmastriano&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=thank_you_volunteers&n=1).
---
[ ](?utm_content=logo&) Peter -- I want to sincerely thank each of you for your tireless commitment, dedication, and loyalty throughout our campaign. The effort that each of you put forward was beyond measure, and I don’t know of any words that can describe my gratitude to you and your families, for your outstanding work. You gave much and sacrificed a lot! The outcome that we all expected this last Tuesday, 11/08, is not what we wanted. We gave, prayed, worked, and believed! What we all committed to was seeing a leader whom we believed would bring positive changes and benefits to all Pennsylvanians, no matter their political background. The work that we did was not in vain, but it's a seed that we have sown and in due time, it will produce good fruit. I am certain that the fruit of your labor will be made visible. Light will always expose darkness, goodness will always overcome evil, and the purpose of God will always be fulfilled. Don’t let your heart grow weary, and don’t give up. Spend ample time with your families and remain connected with the new friends that you have made along this journey. There is still much to be done. Love, Vish Friends of Doug Mastriano
[http://www.doug4gov.com/](http://www.doug4gov.com/?e=22fbcd4cc2070ad1eddfbcb62da93ed4&utm_source=dougmastriano&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=thank_you_volunteers&n=2)

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To unsubscribe from future emails, [click here](https://www.doug4gov.com/unsubscribe?e=22fbcd4cc2070ad1eddfbcb62da93ed4&utm_source=dougmastriano&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=thank_you_volunteers&n=3).
Friends of Doug Mastriano, P.O. Box 138, Fayetteville, PA 17222, United States Contributions to Friends of Doug Mastriano are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Friends of Doug Mastriano

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: We’ve got an incredibly tough fight ahead of us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54637510/379187214/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZWY3NmZiNi0xZjY1LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TwmbzA4uGvuBX1AJzE1FqC13-GUS73M8tzGg_G_0SZA=&emci=6c027613-5664-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=2ef76fb6-1f65-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=43566853)

| | Peter, I just want to say _thank you._

Because of the strength of our grassroots movement, we've come one step closer to making history yet again here in Georgia. And we've shown the country that our fight for progress isn't over.

**We know we can win this – we have done it before! But I've always been honest with you, so I’ll do so again: we've got an incredibly tough fight ahead. We poured every cent we had into getting this far – which means we're now back to square one.** With all eyes on Georgia, the GOP is gearing up to flood us with millions in attack ads, and we need to refill our campaign.

That's why I'm asking directly: **_[Will you split $25 between me and the Democratic Party of Georgia right now to kickstart this critical next phase and power our reelection campaign to victory?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54637511/379187215/1583625711?refcode=20221115.4_RW_A28&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZWY3NmZiNi0xZjY1LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TwmbzA4uGvuBX1AJzE1FqC13-GUS73M8tzGg_G_0SZA=)_**

When we launched this campaign, we knew it wouldn't be easy. The GOP has been coming after me with everything its got since the beginning, and they haven't let up since.

Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire Republican establishment have spent millions to prop up my opponent, Herschel Walker, and defeat me. And they're about to spend a whole lot more to definitively turn Georgia red.

That's why taking our foot off the gas is simply not an option. **We're in a position to win this race – but not without grassroots support.**

With time running out before our crucial midnight deadline, we're falling short of the $50,000 we need to raise by midnight tonight, so I'm personally asking: **_[Will you split $25 or more right now between me and the Democratic Party of Georgia to help me defeat Herschel Walker and keep Georgia blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54637512/379187216/1583625711?refcode=20221115.4_RW_A28&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZWY3NmZiNi0xZjY1LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TwmbzA4uGvuBX1AJzE1FqC13-GUS73M8tzGg_G_0SZA=)_**

Thank you for your support.

– Rev. Raphael Warnock
