name: Donald J. Trump
subject: Did you hear my big announcement from Mar-a-Lago?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
Are you going to stand with me? I am proud to tell you that I just announced from Mar-a-Lago that I am officially running...
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61879197:JPpRxrGnN:m:1:3374012347:2E1B3D9D9C77E2FE14DBA361B3B85C17:r)

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61879197:JPpRxrGnN:m:1:3374012347:2E1B3D9D9C77E2FE14DBA361B3B85C17:r)

Peter,

I am proud to tell you that I just announced from Mar-a-Lago that I am officially running for **President of the United States.**

It is with your help that:

**WE WILL MAKE AMERICA POWERFUL AGAIN.
WE WILL MAKE AMERICA WEALTHY AGAIN.
WE WILL MAKE AMERICA STRONG AGAIN.
WE WILL MAKE AMERICA PROUD AGAIN.
WE WILL MAKE AMERICA SAFE AGAIN.
AND WE WILL MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!**

It was hardworking Patriots like YOU who built this Country, and it is hardworking Patriots like you who are going to SAVE our Country with ME in 2024. Together, we will take back our beautiful, magnificent White House from Joe Biden and the radical Left.

We have a lot of work to do, and we're only just getting started. Can I count on YOU to rush in an inaugural donation of $20.24 RIGHT NOW? When you do, you'll go down in history as one of the FIRST Patriots to donate to my 2024 Presidential Campaign.

_**For TODAY ONLY, all gifts will receive a 1300%-IMPACT!**_
** **

Team –
Donald Trump is expected to announce his 2024 presidential campaign TONIGHT.

He’d be likely to sign an abortion ban into law and, if history is any indicator, would refuse to accept election results that don’t go his way. **Every single Democrat needs to ensure that we have the resources to withstand what is sure to be a dangerous and deceitful campaign.**

body:
Are you going to stand with me? I am proud to tell you that I just announced from Mar-a-Lago that I am officially running...
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61879204:JcIsSrGxN:m:1:3373497171:3FC9D5C353D3E219F30E09C8AC05B41E:r)

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61879204:JcIsSrGxN:m:1:3373497171:3FC9D5C353D3E219F30E09C8AC05B41E:r)

Peter,

I am proud to tell you that I just announced from Mar-a-Lago that I am officially running for **President of the United States.**

It is with your help that:

**WE WILL MAKE AMERICA POWERFUL AGAIN.
WE WILL MAKE AMERICA WEALTHY AGAIN.
WE WILL MAKE AMERICA STRONG AGAIN.
WE WILL MAKE AMERICA PROUD AGAIN.
WE WILL MAKE AMERICA SAFE AGAIN.
AND WE WILL MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!**

It was hardworking Patriots like YOU who built this Country, and it is hardworking Patriots like you who are going to SAVE our Country with ME in 2024. Together, we will take back our beautiful, magnificent White House from Joe Biden and the radical Left.

We have a lot of work to do, and we're only just getting started. Can I count on YOU to rush in an inaugural donation of $20.24 RIGHT NOW? When you do, you'll go down in history as one of the FIRST Patriots to donate to my 2024 Presidential Campaign.

_**For TODAY ONLY, all gifts will receive a 1300%-IMPACT!**_
** **
_**[Please make a contribution of $20.24 or more RIGHT NOW to proudly stand with me as I run for President in 2024 and your gift will be INCREASED by 1300%.>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61879205:JcIsSrGxN:m:1:3373497171:3FC9D5C353D3E219F30E09C8AC05B41E:r)**_

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61879204:JcIsSrGxN:m:1:3373497171:3FC9D5C353D3E219F30E09C8AC05B41E:r)

**[CONTRIBUTE $250 = $3500>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61879206:JcIsSrGxN:m:1:3373497171:3FC9D5C353D3E219F30E09C8AC05B41E:r)**

**[CONTRIBUTE $100 = $1400>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61879207:JcIsSrGxN:m:1:3373497171:3FC9D5C353D3E219F30E09C8AC05B41E:r)**

**[CONTRIBUTE $50 = $700>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61879204:JcIsSrGxN:m:1:3373497171:3FC9D5C353D3E219F30E09C8AC05B41E:r)**

**[CONTRIBUTE $20.24 = $283>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61879205:JcIsSrGxN:m:1:3373497171:3FC9D5C353D3E219F30E09C8AC05B41E:r)**

**[CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61879208:JcIsSrGxN:m:1:3373497171:3FC9D5C353D3E219F30E09C8AC05B41E:r)**

I want to know who stood by me from the very beginning. My team is giving me the FIRST **Official 2024 Donor List** TOMORROW in my Mar-a-Lago office, and I want to see YOUR NAME, Peter.

_Remember, there is no mountain we cannot climb, there is no summit we cannot reach, there is no challenge we cannot meet, and there is no victory we cannot have. We will not bend. We will not break. We will not yield. We will never give in, we will never give up, and we will never, ever back down._

Can I count on you at this critical time?

_**[Please contribute $20.24 or more IMMEDIATELY to claim your 1300%-IMPACT and get your name on the Official 2024 Donor List that I'll review.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61879205:JcIsSrGxN:m:1:3373497171:3FC9D5C353D3E219F30E09C8AC05B41E:r)**_

Thank you,

subject: Thank you!

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54639498/379195934/-265926817?refcode=em_eng_2022.11.15_b1_AS_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjIzYTg4YS0yNzY1LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Lc6ab-k6VodKVeqi8ukdxVXnbN_hBHKjgZMSutQf-oU=)
---
Team, the results are in, and I am so proud to be your Congresswoman-elect! Thank you from the bottom of my heart to our volunteers, our donors, and the voters of Oregon’s 6th district for making this campaign possible. I am so grateful and humbled to have you on Team Salinas. We couldn’t have done this without your support. Together, we were able to fight for a stable democracy that protects our civil liberties, an economy that is just and equitable and a country where women have the freedom to to make their own abortion care decisions. We’ve come together to take bold action and give the greatest gift to our children and grandchildren, where we stop talking about a clean energy future and provide a clean energy present. It is this future that I have worked for my entire adult life. It is the vision for that future that we have all worked for on this campaign and that I will take to Congress. My dad came to the United States from Mexico in 1950 and worked in the fields picking cotton and tomatoes before he was in the first grade. It's my family's story that made me believe change is possible in a single generation – but only if we work for it. I can’t promise that change will come easily. But I can promise that, no matter what lies ahead, I will be your champion – always. **It’s the honor of my lifetime to be your Congresswoman-elect.** You, along with all of my other supporters, have built our people-powered campaign, and I am so incredibly proud to have you on my team. This is just the beginning of our work together. _Andrea_ | _[DONATE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54639499/379195935/-265926817?refcode=em_eng_2022.11.15_b1_AS_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjIzYTg4YS0yNzY1LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Lc6ab-k6VodKVeqi8ukdxVXnbN_hBHKjgZMSutQf-oU=)_

| | Peter,_**The radical Biden agenda could still be forced down our throats for another year.**_ **_Here’s how..._** Now that Congress has passed a short-term continuing resolution (CR) expiring in December to appropriate money for the federal government, another spending fight will come right before Christmas.**In December, Pelosi and Schumer could pass one last omnibus spending bill to fund their left wing priorities until October 2023.**
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=db98e8b14a334497ae8f97607fb1b7fc&_e=Pyda-faQf-dKRyrC6qSpkeyygUK-271OObqIhFfFxAdrdN-9kP6VJHDyjLU9nMUsP1LWI9z1zeqY82XSzZ1dfs-tf7Yo2-c9adi20XCXsepq3fBr-R2mYaolHhdQx5OZCMhGq_JyZtFkCn1DiYa8FG99LbC3p3vmvx4ilU-3YGiJuJz-Pv9RKYXYy7p32wD57rjgZzBUBhxStnk5aSa2MYF3r8awtkVXzWyrMDPWwv0LlxVWYFldTgWSIZsnz_nS6asmXEZEV-WMdgmLLBWz-5raBuJVH1uddv8g29fwWZZqmrQGR47uOcnT_HoJA6YqLcUkvk8w5qAN0ciGR8ztFThf9RLHpxUaBQ8RtnkWtIivhNmwJRN2u3J51WgvjpiviYiue56dFSBUwmjqWwHxDOCnMaWmXLGJ35l6hNeY1oUGc9SxpMREY8HSjeYPXPTC)
---
After the November elections, the new Congress won’t be sworn in until January. So a December spending bill would allow Schumer and Pelosi to fund Joe Biden’s failed agenda for a third year —**even after voters reject it!****That’s why Heritage Action is FIGHTING BACK against this bill, just like we’ve successfully fought back against Biden’s agenda across the country.** **Throughout 2021 and 2022, we’ve consistently STOPPED Biden’s most radical priorities with Key Votes in Congress.**
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=db98e8b14a334497ae8f97607fb1b7fc&_e=Pyda-faQf-dKRyrC6qSpkeyygUK-271OObqIhFfFxAdrdN-9kP6VJHDyjLU9nMUsP1LWI9z1zeqY82XSzZ1dfs-tf7Yo2-c9adi20XCXsepq3fBr-R2mYaolHhdQx5OZCMhGq_JyZtFkCn1DiYa8FG99LbC3p3vmvx4ilU-3YGiJuJz-Pv9RKYXYy7p32wD57rjgZzBUBhxStnk5aSa2MYF3r8awtkVXzWyrMDPWwv0LlxVWYFldTgWSIZsnz_nS6asmXEZEV-WMdgmLLBWz-85WKD-gy6Hq4GU3L7TPe7cvvL6iN9eVsERkAnUetWymNZKheQGA8-8vHr_0p9afzQi3HvpRweyFleSkjo_Feodp8Il00E_kUnJR-AXMHDZqM0Jw8csdxMF5iR95NeI-IVrzrpyZoEu4f7mNw8t0R5UreaVMdiNHbOeudknWBSeZ)
---
**Now, we have a chance to STOP this omnibus and DEFUND the rest of Biden’s radical agenda in 2023.****But we can’t do it without you.** [**DONATE TODAY to help us defeat the Pelosi-Schumer omnibus and DEFUND the Biden agenda >>**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=db98e8b14a334497ae8f97607fb1b7fc&_e=Pyda-faQf-dKRyrC6qSpkeyygUK-271OObqIhFfFxAdrdN-9kP6VJHDyjLU9nMUsP1LWI9z1zeqY82XSzZ1dfs-tf7Yo2-c9adi20XCXsepq3fBr-R2mYaolHhdQx5OZCMhGq_JyZtFkCn1DiYa8FG99LbC3p3vmvx4ilU-3YGiJuJz-Pv9RKYXYy7p32wD57rjgZzBUBhxStnk5aSa2MYF3r8awtkVXzWyrMDPWwv0LlxVWYFldTgWSIZsnz_nS6asmXEZEV-WMdgmLLBWz-3YizTuQgHsya5cSbsbSxTSeF-XtHx84h-224j5CStS00ke7R4NRx3mfWDxCq_hVr5bsZ3L_DQwqvK7ldWjM5qEkOBMrBvS8aKWsV-QiE9bZqz1TbcjTn2UmqrRRKE9kZqM1Qf6vneyQFdd0Oh1LS2B7h9ZNZcXyRxJwr8IFERGg)

If you would like to unsubscribe visit this | | | | Peter,The radical Biden agenda could still be forced down our throats for another year. Here’s how... Now that Congress has passed a short-term continuing resolution (CR) expiring in December to appropriate money for the federal government, another spending fight will come right before Christmas.In December, Pelosi and Schumer could pass one last omnibus spending bill to fund their left wing priorities until October 2023. After the November elections, the new Congress won’t be sworn in until January. So a December spending bill would allow Schumer and Pelosi to fund Joe Biden’s failed agenda for a third year —even after voters reject it!That’s why Heritage Action is FIGHTING BACK against this bill, just like we’ve successfully fought back against Biden’s agenda across the country. Throughout 2021 and 2022, we’ve consistently STOPPED Biden’s most radical priorities with Key Votes in Congress. subject: Did you hear my big announcement from Mar-a-Lago?

body:
Are you going to stand with me? I am proud to tell you that I just announced from Mar-a-Lago that I am officially running...

Peter,

I am proud to tell you that I just announced from Mar-a-Lago that I am officially running for **President of the United States.**

It is with your help that:

**WE WILL MAKE AMERICA POWERFUL AGAIN.
WE WILL MAKE AMERICA WEALTHY AGAIN.
WE WILL MAKE AMERICA STRONG AGAIN.
WE WILL MAKE AMERICA PROUD AGAIN.
WE WILL MAKE AMERICA SAFE AGAIN.
AND WE WILL MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!**

It was hardworking Patriots like YOU who built this Country, and it is hardworking Patriots like you who are going to SAVE our Country with ME in 2024. Together, we will take back our beautiful, magnificent White House from Joe Biden and the radical Left.

We have a lot of work to do, and we're only just getting started. Can I count on YOU to rush in an inaugural donation of $20.24 RIGHT NOW? When you do, you'll go down in history as one of the FIRST Patriots to donate to my 2024 Presidential Campaign.

_**For TODAY ONLY, all gifts will receive a 1300%-IMPACT!**_

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|

---
Peter,

**The Federal Election Commission has one final financial deadline before the runoff: 11:59 p.m. on Wednesday. We have LESS THAN 48 HOURS to raise every dollar we can.**

**[Please don't let me come up short, Peter.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61875326:JjjwqrGNF:m:1:3253819041:F47CF87D8C7283CBE10B502C50CE9FC5:r)**

This is the financial report that Democrats will be following closely to see if we've been able to build momentum since the runoff was declared.

I am counting on you to help show the Left that conservatives will not give up the fight against the Democrats' policies that are destroying our country. **[Please, chip in whatever you can today to help me CLOSE THE GAP before the filing deadline tomorrow at midnight.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61875326:JjjwqrGNF:m:1:3253819041:F47CF87D8C7283CBE10B502C50CE9FC5:r)**

[** RUSH $25 -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61875327:JjjwqrGNF:m:1:3253819041:F47CF87D8C7283CBE10B502C50CE9FC5:r)
[** RUSH $50 -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61875328:JjjwqrGNF:m:1:3253819041:F47CF87D8C7283CBE10B502C50CE9FC5:r)
[** RUSH $75 -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61875329:JjjwqrGNF:m:1:3253819041:F47CF87D8C7283CBE10B502C50CE9FC5:r)
[** RUSH $100 -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61875330:JjjwqrGNF:m:1:3253819041:F47CF87D8C7283CBE10B502C50CE9FC5:r)
I know how to win, and I'm ready to win this battle for conservatives all over the country. However, I can't hold Senator Raphael Warnock accountable for his disastrous voting record without the help of patriots far and wide.

Senator Warnock has outraised us every single filing deadline, but with your help, we can put up some of our biggest numbers since the race began.

The deadline is TOMORROW. **[So, if you can chip in $25, $50, or maybe even $75 or $100, you'd be doing a great service to our nation and putting us one step closer to introducing Joe Biden and the Radical Left to the concept of checks and balances.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61875326:JjjwqrGNF:m:1:3253819041:F47CF87D8C7283CBE10B502C50CE9FC5:r)**

Thank you for continuing this fight with me. Your support is greatly appreciated.

Thanks,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61875326:JjjwqrGNF:m:1:3253819041:F47CF87D8C7283CBE10B502C50CE9FC5:r)

Herschel Walker

P.S. Federal law prohibits us from extending this runoff fundraising deadline, **[so please help us hit our goal before midnight tomorrow!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61875326:JjjwqrGNF:m:1:3253819041:F47CF87D8C7283CBE10B502C50CE9FC5:r)**

body:
Now, on to 2024.

| [](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/j~ejhkKdbKhG/bVQrN2JlWUJ5SWsxTFhMeWMrM1Nja2FLb3RoeFE5OWpuWmwwUzd2Y1l0L1RRckRrSFpZYWdGMjdZaFhuYjZVVXVCZEt2eGNDT3lLNHdvOTVEMUZjdTQvVUNxWmFmUTBETEppeTFoc1dUMkU9S0/MmZiT1g5ZWN0UkRLSW1YWDZLZktQRWhaMy9Md3RMMUd5aUVwRW00OWwxMD0S1) Friend, I want to thank you, and Washingtonians across the state, for turning out this election in a HUGE way. Reproductive rights, climate change, and our Democratic values were on the ballot -- _and we won big._ I'm proud to share that our state re-elected our champion in the other Washington, Senator Patty Murray. And while some votes are still being counted, we've prevailed in some tough races -- including re-electing Representative Kim Schrier and Secretary of State Steve Hobbs and winning the critical WA-03 seat for Marie Gluesenkamp Perez. **To be clear: We couldn 't have done any of this without your support. [_Now, we 're looking forward to winning up and down the ballot in 2024. Will you chip in $10 to power future victories here in Washington state?_](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/NazRsKNX6NSV/bVQrN2JlWUJ5SWsxTFhMeWMrM1Nja2FLb3RoeFE5OWpuWmwwUzd2Y1l0L1RRckRrSFpZYWdGMjdZaFhuYjZVVXVCZEt2eGNDT3lLNHdvOTVEMUZjdTQvVUNxWmFmUTBETEppeTFoc1dUMkU9S0/MmZiT1g5ZWN0UkRLSW1YWDZLZktQRWhaMy9Md3RMMUd5aUVwRW00OWwxMD0S1)** _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$1 ->](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/rrL_Jm6j06hp/bVQrN2JlWUJ5SWsxTFhMeWMrM1Nja2FLb3RoeFE5OWpuWmwwUzd2Y1l0L1RRckRrSFpZYWdGMjdZaFhuYjZVVXVCZEt2eGNDT3lLNHdvOTVEMUZjdTQvVUNxWmFmUTBETEppeTFoc1dUMkU9S0/MmZiT1g5ZWN0UkRLSW1YWDZLZktQRWhaMy9Md3RMMUd5aUVwRW00OWwxMD0S1)

Even within the Washington state legislature, we did big things. Democrats will hold onto majorities in both the State House and Senate -- and just yesterday Senator-elect Sharon Shewmake flipped her senate seat blue!
These huge victories simply wouldn't have been possible without Democrats, from Forks to Walla Walla, making their voices heard.
Together, our votes sent a firm message: Here in Washington state, we will fight against the climate crisis. We will protect the right to a safe, accessible abortion. And we will fight to protect the sanctity of our democracy.
But even as we celebrate this victory, we can be sure that there will be more fights to come. So I want to ask you today:
[_**As we look ahead to 2024, will you chip in $10 right now to power future Democratic victories here in Washington state?**_](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/NazRsKNX6NSV/bVQrN2JlWUJ5SWsxTFhMeWMrM1Nja2FLb3RoeFE5OWpuWmwwUzd2Y1l0L1RRckRrSFpZYWdGMjdZaFhuYjZVVXVCZEt2eGNDT3lLNHdvOTVEMUZjdTQvVUNxWmFmUTBETEppeTFoc1dUMkU9S0/MmZiT1g5ZWN0UkRLSW1YWDZLZktQRWhaMy9Md3RMMUd5aUVwRW00OWwxMD0S1)
Thank you, again, for all that you have done to make these victories possible.
Very truly yours,
Jay

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

We’ve been working nonstop for the past 2 years to build up our movement
to get people-powered candidates into Congress — where they can fight for
us.

Now that the midterms are almost over, we’re taking a step back to assess
the situation. We had some MAJOR wins (and we’re celebrating!) — here’s
what we just did:

✅ Helped re-elect the entire Squad

✅ Elected new Justice Democrats Summer Lee and Greg Casar

But the work never stops. So here’s what we need to do now:

✅ Offer support for our new Justice Democrats as they transition into
Congress

✅ Replenish our funds to reset for the upcoming cycle

✅ Prepare to recruit progressives who will challenge the establishment in
2024

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/120928?refcode=em20221115-26089&t=1001&akid=26089%2E1203867%2E4SVml6 ]Our wins in 2022 were thanks to your help,
Peter — and now we’re asking for
your support once again. Can you contribute to fund our critical work to
transform the Democratic Party beyond this cycle?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/120928?refcode=em20221115-26089&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=26089%2E1203867%2E4SVml6 ]Contribute

Our average contribution this month is just $19.08! We’re proud of that
number because it shows we’re a grassroots organization through and
through.

Right now, it’s critical we see a groundswell of donations from our
grassroots base. Every month we have to make tough choices about our
budget, including how much we can invest in our candidates and expand the
progressive movement.

The decisions we’re facing now are different, because they’ll determine
our plans for the next two years. In other words, this is a turning point
for our organization, where the resources we raise will directly inform
what we can do.

That means we really need the resources to 1) provide hands-on help for
our existing Justice Democrats, 2) sustain us through the rest of the year
while we set our priorities, and 3) prepare us for the next round of
candidate recruitment.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/120928?refcode=em20221115-26089&t=1021&akid=26089%2E1203867%2E4SVml6 ]So whether it’s $5, $19.08, or more — please consider making your best
gift now to support us.

Thank you for all you do to support us,

Team JD

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1022&akid=26089%2E1203867%2E4SVml6 ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1023&akid=26089%2E1203867%2E4SVml6 ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
This is not a drill |
---
_Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. _
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54664631/379246221/-19374740?refcode=E17393-20221101-headerfooter-header-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTAxOTFhOC01NDY1LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9lalOL2blEyB_JCBYk7cmVqpWA9xquhOpXIdTqumOCc=)
**TRUMP IS RUNNING FOR PRESIDENT

name: Hendrell Remus
subject: 🚨 Trump’s announcement
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty]

Peter,

Well, it happened – Donald Trump announced he’s running for president in 2024.

Even after his extremist candidates failed almost everywhere nationwide this year, his MAGA money machine is gearing up for another election cycle of fear mongering and bigoted lies. That means starting now, they’re raking in big donations so they can ramp up their operations before we have a chance to catch our breath following the first major elections after the worst gerrymandering our state has ever seen.

We won’t pretend we have an easy road ahead of us, this is going to be a long, hard-fought election cycle. But if we want to keep Donald Trump and his MAGA lackeys out of the White House, we need to start laying the groundwork now.

The Tennessee Democratic Party is the only committee dedicated to electing Democrats in Tennessee year-round, every year. But we’re looking at our budget going into next year, and we don’t have the resources we need to build the strong voter protection, persuasion, and turnout programs it’s going to take to beat Trump and MAGA Republicans like Marsha Blackburn.

Peter, will you start a monthly donation of $10 to the Tennessee Democratic Party right now to help us plan and execute the long-term programs it’s going to take to win every election at every level – including the presidency – in 2024? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=express_lane_250]
OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other]

The Tennessee Democratic Party was there every step of the way, and we’re going to be here every day fighting hard to elect Democrats this year, next year, and in the years to come. But we can’t grow our state party infrastructure into the powerhouse that will defeat GOP extremists like Donald Trump without help, so that’s why we’re asking:

Will you commit to helping Democrats in Tennessee win elections at every level, fight back against Republican extremists, and build long-term infrastructure by starting a monthly donation to the Tennessee Democratic Party right now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty]

Let's win together,

Hendrell Remus
he/him
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty]

subject: Didn’t we vote this guy out already?
body:
| | | Trump just announced he’s running again in 2024. Pledge to vote against him now.
---
| [Pledge to vote](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54664860/379247215/2089182094?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0M2Y2OGRlYi01NTY1LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lHSfzptyX4Bnlj35kEkqmLOq0YePZjgtjWXUOf4hZuk=&emci=45bfc42d-fd64-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=43f68deb-5565-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=6787172) |
|
Friend,
We *really* wish we weren’t sending this email.
**But, unfortunately, twice-impeached former president Donald Trump has announced his candidacy for the 2024 presidential election.**
**You'd think he would be embarrassed — Trump and extremist MAGA Republicans have never been weaker. **Last Tuesday, young voters exceeded expectations and put a dead-stop to Trump’s predicted Republican ‘red wave.’ Our message to him is clear: Hate, fear, and bigotry have no place in our country.
Young people have rejected him. Our country has rejected him. But despite all of this, Trump has still decided to run, threatening the progress of our democracy, and all that we’ve accomplished.
[We’ve been here before. Protect your community and your rights by pledging to vote against Donald Trump.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54664861/379247216/166867793?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0M2Y2OGRlYi01NTY1LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lHSfzptyX4Bnlj35kEkqmLOq0YePZjgtjWXUOf4hZuk=&emci=45bfc42d-fd64-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=43f68deb-5565-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=6787172)
There’s going to be a lot of noise surrounding this announcement. But above all, we want you to remember this: Donald Trump is the driving force behind the Republican Party’s attempts to roll back our rights and undermine our democracy.
Trump’s Supreme Court appointments were the deciding factor in overturning our right to abortion — putting our country in a health care, constitutional, and economic crisis.
Decisions made by Trump and MAGA Republicans impact you, your friends, and your community. Not just for an election cycle, but for generations.
But we stopped him in 2020, and we’ll do it again. Are you ready to reject Donald Trump (again)?
[Pledge to vote against Trump](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54664862/379247218/1094396372?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0M2Y2OGRlYi01NTY1LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lHSfzptyX4Bnlj35kEkqmLOq0YePZjgtjWXUOf4hZuk=&emci=45bfc42d-fd64-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=43f68deb-5565-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=6787172 "CTA Button")

body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54665130/379247857/1030258515?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20221115_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzcyZmMzMi01NjY1LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PawG2HBkrob1u-6OgbnnnxF41Jl-1wFhqlYAWFwm0qk=) Hi — Donald Trump just made it official. **He is running for president again in 2024.** I was there last January 6th, when our fellow citizens invaded our nation’s Capitol waving Trump banners and flags. Our republic barely withstood one term of a Trump presidency, and another four years would shatter us completely. **I will do everything in my power to ensure that Donald Trump never comes near the White House again, and I am asking you to stand with me.**[**Please make a donation today to help Democrats defeat Donald Trump in 2024.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54665131/379247858/1030258515?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20221115_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzcyZmMzMi01NjY1LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PawG2HBkrob1u-6OgbnnnxF41Jl-1wFhqlYAWFwm0qk=) | | **[DONATE NOW →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54665132/379247859/1030258515?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20221115_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzcyZmMzMi01NjY1LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PawG2HBkrob1u-6OgbnnnxF41Jl-1wFhqlYAWFwm0qk=)**

Last week, we saw voters across Colorado and our nation rise up to reject the hateful ideologies and totalitarian vision of Donald Trump’s followers.
We rejected the idea that our democracy works better when politicians decide whose vote counts and who wins.
We rejected their attempts to roll back fifty years of progress on voting rights, reproductive rights, and worker’s rights.
And we rejected decades of failed economic policies that hand more and more wealth to the rich and the powerful, while leaving hard working folks farther behind.
**Because make no mistake: Our failure to ensure opportunity for every person led us down the path towards Donald Trump’s dark vision. As he claimed, “I alone can fix it," and millions of Americans believed him.**
We know that Donald Trump cannot fix what ails us — he’ll only tear us down further.
But we cannot take this moment for granted. Trumpworld has already amassed tens of millions of dollars to flood the airwaves with lies and propaganda, and his hold on the Republican Party is frayed but not broken.
**I’m telling you: Donald Trump can win in 2024 if we do not fight with everything we’ve got.** We must show America a better, brighter vision of what we can be if we stand together.
**We have no time to lose. Make a donation of $10, $25, or whatever you can spare to defeat Donald Trump and build an economy and nation that works for everyone, not just those at the top.**

As he claimed, “I alone can fix it," and millions of Americans believed him. We know that Donald Trump cannot fix what ails us — he’ll only tear us down further. But we cannot take this moment for granted. Trumpworld has already amassed tens of millions of dollars to flood the airwaves with lies and propaganda, and his hold on the Republican Party is frayed but not broken. I’m telling you: Donald Trump can win in 2024 if we do not fight with everything we’ve got. We must show America a better, brighter vision of what we can be if we stand together. We have no time to lose. Make a donation of $10, $25, or whatever you can spare to defeat Donald Trump and build an economy and nation that works for everyone, not just those at the top. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ** | | ****=**** | ******=**** | | ****=**** | ******=**** | | ****=**** | ******=**** Onward, Michael Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado ** By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

name: Sarah Longwell
subject: Looks like we have to beat him again.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Accountability PAC Inc
body:
|
---
> _We thought you might want to see this special message from our friends at Republican Accountability PAC._
Friend,

It's official: Donald Trump is running for president. Again. The election is nearly two years away, so I won't pretend that I know exactly how this plays out. What I can say is polling shows Trump far ahead of other potential GOP candidates, and that underestimating his appeal to the MAGA base would be a catastrophic mistake. That means the fight for democracy and the soul of this country isn’t over. And we’re going to need your help to beat Trump a second time. You’ve seen the difference that we made – with your help – in the 2022 midterms. The extremist candidates backed by Trump, those who made the “Big Lie” the center of their campaigns, were widely rejected by the American voters. Sadly, it looks like the Republican Party hasn’t gotten the message yet. If you can, [support Republican Accountability PAC now](https://cQ0qs04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/2L+113/cQ0qs04/VWJbdh76ZklcW5S8JSj5f76QPW93kvSZ4SqHCcN6mkvpB3q8_QV1-WJV7CgSwsW6pCh3Q3BMyx0W2ZwDlG1bCkgQW1QbG844C_86ZN3Rh137cz2DHN6W8g2PPCkLyN1tqjs8lqx_jW7fgHcX4yp-L2W8V3M_h1xNQymW97JTGH4S0FL6W4g0mLT8LwTlmW7jxMq654q0Y_N64qlTKGkf3CVt8k5k4SmlKlW1TdqtL1qpGxNW2QCzWF5L7lfqMRZ-hb7vS79W8D4bkx6-z3fWW8ZGCS76H3wfxW2-pjyn8C3LMCW7-5HcS3rdWVLW2gwxwv9hb2DPW5M-T3b13KgfH3ljx1) so we can start fighting back against Trump. It’s going to take all of us. I’m still Never Trump. If you feel the same way, we need you in this fight. Sarah Longwell Treasurer, Republican Accountability PAC

clean_body: We can’t afford another four years of Donald Trump. Folks — Donald Trump just announced he’s running for president, again — and it’s up to us to make sure he loses, again. Our country is a democracy of, by, and for the American people. But Donald Trump doesn’t want to lead our country. He wants to divide it. And he wants to dismantle our democracy. We don’t need four more years — or even fifteen more minutes — of Donald Trump. Last week, Democrats successfully protected our Senate majority and have the opportunity to keep building on all our accomplishments. But so many of our wins — and more! — could go out the window if MAGA Republicans take back the presidency and the Senate in 2024. Trump undermined our democracy, stripped protections from our public lands, and incited hatred and division across our nation. If you’re as determined to keep him out of the White House as I am, rush in a donation to support my campaign today. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Last week, voters in New Mexico and across the country showed up at the polls to stop MAGA Republicans in their tracks and prevent a “red wave” — bucking historical midterm trends. Americans made it loud and clear that they want leadership that stands up for reproductive rights, makes healthcare and prescription drugs more affordable, protects our democracy, and preserves our public lands and waters. Trump and his MAGA Republican allies are furious — and they will stop at nothing to take back power and enact their radical agenda. That’s why we need to prepare now to fight back against any attacks they throw our way. = Thank you for pitching in what you can, Martin | Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. name: Dr. Ruiz
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE
body:
| | |
---
Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, [please click here.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDC1zXjOgMKTq1qg9b7LMk8NY4biyiGBVJXIDelS7m60cKaXwQDfsi6wVlrlpGB5RcgfuIIHe6hd8iOGFvsd6XbH6bPGloasmPsNPOUCpYuDqjrfWXPulk7ACO8jglUSTg0gCzSddw3eZA6Fl4DS0boq3_o-XWWbrTIiqBen6tgonIz3mA-1Wa8Ifa3VzQoELtS6FfHfpsB39euR8Jq7MBmnvtAxn5mpZ4H6DEaBoT925PV557PcX9RyN_5mpgoxq6CRzGJ6c9o7ajXyRFO8HfIK-6Cw2bW72M6Py6JCvmcq_/3r6/T0nLa69AQPOn1gLmITVbrg/h0/Sbg-lihz_29CLD4ri26vFES4shPcKSNYN9HHX1foTUI) And if you have a moment, please read our message below.
To the people of the 25th District who have trusted me and honored me with their votes;

To every volunteer who made calls, knocked on doors, and showed up throughout this campaign;

And to each of you who believes in what we can accomplish together for our communities;

Thank you from the bottom of me and my family’s hearts. I’m humbled by your decision and your trust.

As I look forward to a new year in Congress, I am more committed than ever to keep fighting for the seniors, veterans, small business owners, students, and hard-working families in our communities. And continuing to care for you and your family’s well-being as I once did in the emergency room.

Together, we have built a movement I always dreamed of, and that stretches from Hemet to the Coachella Valley all the way through Imperial County.

Now, we must keep building together—with kindness, compassion, and honesty – the future we wish to see for our sons and daughters.

It is my greatest honor to have your support and to serve you as the representative of the 25th Congressional District. _¡Adelante!_ _—Dr. Raul Ruiz_
| PO Box 3433
Palm Desert, CA 92261
---
PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE
**_Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz:_**

I'm so thankful for your support.

With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward.

But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. |
---
Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right.

**As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities.**

**_But I need you in this fight with me:_**
[Donate to Dr. Ruiz >>](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/4PfL751D8g4IfLXFw3QfXV5Wo_6TP_ujTmJFoO05AE0ndvVztDvr-9pHXQrP3m2iIy2QvBJYSChDBEDOBndEPDUCqPtwMW_UbJVs02vsdBt02jU1mHjwLx9ZP6DTUzfXIJGSTG6Nqx9ggbmwUGYZntl7lqW_fEshIdigBpcxHqrAYc0NWf55TQch3DewZ4tRf7e0KdnFRuMvVuw9sOvvaRiU8iiXfb1L7xDNdDYJYOMXLeDwikovPfcTd59c2B_XAHqSeRVzs8b8SUPXbQ05dCeIJeC2Bcb6mbl_DkqTjadbfTYI8RjUIlrjDJGBpqCXAx0kwt5x_mp2aBRkdM8-UQN3nch6T8y0MXvOlU1bPzoT7YJq2jHHomq8cQz7kkPxH4b95sr276yvpoJaS6XbwUC_eCIf3s48o9oxfGrgq_q0k16Nm_LogD4XqvX5hgLrazRpbiKM-B4b8jE8soOfyA/3r6/T0nLa69AQPOn1gLmITVbrg/h1/WF1ADT8blAIZlQLUuTQHjH5zzel9PV79WaHmmsN_UfI)
---

clean_body: | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. To the people of the 25th District who have trusted me and honored me with their votes; To every volunteer who made calls, knocked on doors, and showed up throughout this campaign; And to each of you who believes in what we can accomplish together for our communities; Thank you from the bottom of me and my family’s hearts. I’m humbled by your decision and your trust. As I look forward to a new year in Congress, I am more committed than ever to keep fighting for the seniors, veterans, small business owners, students, and hard-working families in our communities. And continuing to care for you and your family’s well-being as I once did in the emergency room. Together, we have built a movement I always dreamed of, and that stretches from Hemet to the Coachella Valley all the way through Imperial County. Now, we must keep building together—with kindness, compassion, and honesty – the future we wish to see for our sons and daughters. It is my greatest honor to have your support and to serve you as the representative of the 25th Congressional District. ¡Adelante! —Dr. Raul Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference: | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. name: Team AOC
subject: Dream big
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
We need your input.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20221115-3616-header&t=1&akid=3616%2E2526796%2E3C6Tuh)
Now is the time to think about what policy demands are next. Democrats are listening now more than they have before.
Alexandria asked her followers on Instagram, and we want to get your thoughts too:
[Can you take two minutes to share what policy pushes you think we need to tackle next? Dream big!](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/survey/post-election-2022/?source=em20221115-3616-P&t=2&akid=3616%2E2526796%2E3C6Tuh)
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/survey/post-election-2022/?source=em20221115-3616-P&t=3&akid=3616%2E2526796%2E3C6Tuh)
**[Share your thoughts →](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/survey/post-election-2022/?source=em20221115-3616-P&t=4&akid=3616%2E2526796%2E3C6Tuh)**
Our movement is about setting a collective agenda – we need the genius of millions of people, like you, to inform our decisions and help lay a plan to improve the lives of millions of Americans.
Let us know what you think should be next.
In solidarity,
Team AOC
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=ocasio-campaign.krJqR8&refcode=em20221115-3616-P_ENG_SUR_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=3616%2E2526796%2E3C6Tuh)**

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: If we raise Raphael Warnock enough funds so he's not swamped by $52 million that Mitch McConnell has dumped into this race, we'll win hands down.
body:
You could be big trouble for Herschel Walker
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0e899fc1-e2cf-48d1-9a39-1588c138e26e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **[HERSCHEL WALKER HAS A SERIOUS PROBLEM](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta5c0771b-8558-4cff-90c8-ae43f6f68fdd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **_No, as sick as it is, we're not talking about the multiple womens' lives he's threatened--including holding a gun to his ex-wife's head and telling her he'd "blow her brains out." Nor are we referencing Walker's serial dishonesty, from denying he took two women to get abortions (he did, and still believes in a ban, no exceptions) to claiming he served in the miliary (nope), police (nope), FBI (nope) and graduated from the U. of Georgia in the top 1% (he didn't graduate). _** **_These are only some of Walker's many lies. The scary thing is there are so many, it makes me wonder if he actually believes them--if he even understands reality._** _**The problem we refer to is Georgia Gov. Brian Kemp won't be on the ballot this time helping****to turn**** out voters who only voted for Walker when they thought it meant a**** Senate majority. ****Kemp received an astonishing 210,000 more votes than Walker, betraying the weakness of Walker's candidacy.**_
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**Donate: Re-elect Sen. Raphael Warnock**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7592125c-d4cb-422a-bdea-a765a68293c7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | **[If we raise Raphael Warnock funds so he's not swamped by $52 million that Mitch McConnell has dumped into this race, we'll win hands down. So can you join Blue Amp Action in rushing $5, $10 or $25 to Raphael Warnock right now for the three weeks left in this runoff?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T564e4856-eb91-4d22-af94-94ac4779a5f5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **Thanks for standing up yet again, Blue Amp Action community.**
---
Cliff

|
---
| | |
---

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. name: Rev. Warnock
subject: I’m humbly asking
body:
| | |
---
| | It’s official: our critical Georgia Senate race is heading to a runoff. With the entire GOP establishment behind my opponent, Herschel Walker, I can't keep up this momentum and defend my critical seat without your immediate support. **That's why I'm humbly asking:** [ Will you split $10 or more right now between me and the Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee to keep Georgia blue and build Democratic power at the state level? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xtkPMy1D1zHzXpPa6X6gVJ5IkCFzHdXQ9TnuD658DMDTrpLKlojRjQzEiLrclUR3iGcEren4jm_n81hxDaKv3IloiN5H8Y5fRar36aFb3g5KyxOpn3zlZtEx6lelqgL_7hoqL_QvAS69uI7f-ZolhwjSBTUekRY0BUcnRLy9aEuK1QeD29G5MUbwV481PRqBEl-y9pUUNGRzrSE669q6ikMXT_wpU8lGX7uiqY3lfXLz3cEzL6zpQ-3OrJSIhqmVTWzy-kKCW3BjNw5z_qLufIk4scdHXdyT3KB6Vnh7Pqa_NqhJkHbJQB4_Lucr2J_4FMGp64VfUq9wnz7UrStxWGif-XDenoSPgQ7a7bIdMiU_idHFxQnqbBCWDRIBVXsWM/3r6/NH36Z695SYCAT2BD697pOw/h0/vr4BeOI5yM65LOSwleQDPYApv7wDyybRx7_PmN98A6o) GOP donors are flooding our race with over $37 million – and Mitch McConnell's super PAC has launched attack ad after attack ad against me. Republicans are determined to flip Georgia red. **I know this grassroots team has what it takes to win – but with national Republicans going _all-in_ to flip this seat, we can't let up for even a second.** **We've set a goal to raise another $200,000 today so we can fight back against GOP attacks – but we're falling short, and I need your help.** [ Please, will you split a donation of $10 or more now between me and the Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee so we can win in Georgia and build Democratic power in state legislatures nationwide? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xtkPMy1D1zHzXpPa6X6gVJ5IkCFzHdXQ9TnuD658DMDTrpLKlojRjQzEiLrclUR3iGcEren4jm_n81hxDaKv3IloiN5H8Y5fRar36aFb3g5KyxOpn3zlZtEx6lelqgL_7hoqL_QvAS69uI7f-ZolhwjSBTUekRY0BUcnRLy9aEuEkg70NifcjB614WU2nNUMXDDSM-CWqwKLKbxW6JkURRfkrgqRSwRS-klRdaxbotdIwYtv1PGMBfo18EX2z-kgBwK7U7DQC-ca0akIiztS8QNAkD5XoVg8qrTZ4qgyW5y6WBaBiiyQOl0zB94nHmU7z8a_n50-Mk269WHpCZMcZTL-bsH1tPrb-SqJzXCnIgplQWnEb8QN3kLjrnH96wjbM/3r6/NH36Z695SYCAT2BD697pOw/h1/ZuD3VhmA_Qcq8Ncgi7dp_aerKS8XKpfhn4-3Nh7xIg8) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately and be split between Raphael Warnock and the DLCC.

clean_body: | | | | | It’s official: our critical Georgia Senate race is heading to a runoff. With the entire GOP establishment behind my opponent, Herschel Walker, I can't keep up this momentum and defend my critical seat without your immediate support. That's why I'm humbly asking: GOP donors are flooding our race with over $37 million – and Mitch McConnell's super PAC has launched attack ad after attack ad against me. Republicans are determined to flip Georgia red. I know this grassroots team has what it takes to win – but with national Republicans going all-in to flip this seat, we can't let up for even a second. We've set a goal to raise another $200,000 today so we can fight back against GOP attacks – but we're falling short, and I need your help. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately and be split between Raphael Warnock and the DLCC. | | | | | Thank you for all that you do. – Rev. [ On Tuesday, one full week after the 2022 midterm elections, Republicans were projected to officially retake the U.S. House of Representatives after the win of Kevin Kiley in California. The move now puts the lower chamber of Congress in the GOP’s control and rips the gavel out of Democrat Speaker Nancy Pelosi of California’s hand. The races this election included many heated contests, with some significant GOP gains, including the defeat of U.S. Rep. Sean Patrick Maloney in New York, who served as the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee chairman. ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40857%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FVjJSHYhfqzQykomL2JL9g&sysid=1)

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4f7vfmj5ovrljvg5aqtk3b9nd6g7t3pf6mh1o10_rp22sh2s8i66or0slhm1pj6clh2bs)

Friend,

I am proud to tell you that I just announced from Mar-a-Lago that I am officially running for **President of the United States.**

It is with your help that:

**WE WILL MAKE AMERICA POWERFUL AGAIN.
WE WILL MAKE AMERICA WEALTHY AGAIN.
WE WILL MAKE AMERICA STRONG AGAIN.
WE WILL MAKE AMERICA PROUD AGAIN.
WE WILL MAKE AMERICA SAFE AGAIN.
AND WE WILL MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!**

It was hardworking Patriots like YOU who built this Country, and it is hardworking Patriots like you who are going to SAVE our Country with ME in 2024. Together, we will take back our beautiful, magnificent White House from Joe Biden and the radical Left.

We have a lot of work to do, and we're only just getting started. Can I count on YOU to rush in an inaugural donation of $20.24 RIGHT NOW? When you do, you'll go down in history as one of the FIRST Patriots to donate to my 2024 Presidential Campaign.

_**For TODAY ONLY, all gifts will receive a 1300%-IMPACT!**_
** **
_**[Please make a contribution of $20.24 or more RIGHT NOW to proudly stand with me as I run for President in 2024 and your gift will be INCREASED by 1300%.>>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0g9n76ga6dl0kk0c0u5d1ns319nvq540jlg9no8_rp22sh2s8i66or0slhm1pj6clh2bs)**_

I want to know who stood by me from the very beginning. My team is giving me the FIRST **Official 2024 Donor List** TOMORROW in my Mar-a-Lago office, and I want to see YOUR NAME, Friend.

_Remember, there is no mountain we cannot climb, there is no summit we cannot reach, there is no challenge we cannot meet, and there is no victory we cannot have. We will not bend. We will not break. The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. name: Donald J. Trump
subject: Did you hear my big announcement from Mar-a-Lago?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
Are you going to stand with me? I am proud to tell you that I just announced from Mar-a-Lago that I am officially running...
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61879232:Jy174rGGN:m:1:3371220873:98116AEB931ECCBE5A032049E85B37A1:r)

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61879232:Jy174rGGN:m:1:3371220873:98116AEB931ECCBE5A032049E85B37A1:r)

Peter,

I am proud to tell you that I just announced from Mar-a-Lago that I am officially running for **President of the United States.**

It is with your help that:

**WE WILL MAKE AMERICA POWERFUL AGAIN.
WE WILL MAKE AMERICA WEALTHY AGAIN.
WE WILL MAKE AMERICA STRONG AGAIN.
WE WILL MAKE AMERICA PROUD AGAIN.
WE WILL MAKE AMERICA SAFE AGAIN.
AND WE WILL MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!**

It was hardworking Patriots like YOU who built this Country, and it is hardworking Patriots like you who are going to SAVE our Country with ME in 2024. Together, we will take back our beautiful, magnificent White House from Joe Biden and the radical Left.

We have a lot of work to do, and we're only just getting started. Can I count on YOU to rush in an inaugural donation of $20.24 RIGHT NOW? When you do, you'll go down in history as one of the FIRST Patriots to donate to my 2024 Presidential Campaign.

_**For TODAY ONLY, all gifts will receive a 1300%-IMPACT!**_
** **
_**[Please make a contribution of $20.24 or more RIGHT NOW to proudly stand with me as I run for President in 2024 and your gift will be INCREASED by 1300%.>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61879233:Jy174rGGN:m:1:3371220873:98116AEB931ECCBE5A032049E85B37A1:r)**_

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61879232:Jy174rGGN:m:1:3371220873:98116AEB931ECCBE5A032049E85B37A1:r)

**[CONTRIBUTE $250 = $3500>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61879234:Jy174rGGN:m:1:3371220873:98116AEB931ECCBE5A032049E85B37A1:r)**

**[CONTRIBUTE $100 = $1400>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61879235:Jy174rGGN:m:1:3371220873:98116AEB931ECCBE5A032049E85B37A1:r)**

**[CONTRIBUTE $50 = $700>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61879232:Jy174rGGN:m:1:3371220873:98116AEB931ECCBE5A032049E85B37A1:r)**

**[CONTRIBUTE $20.24 = $283>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61879233:Jy174rGGN:m:1:3371220873:98116AEB931ECCBE5A032049E85B37A1:r)**

**[CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61879236:Jy174rGGN:m:1:3371220873:98116AEB931ECCBE5A032049E85B37A1:r)**

I want to know who stood by me from the very beginning. My team is giving me the FIRST **Official 2024 Donor List** TOMORROW in my Mar-a-Lago office, and I want to see YOUR NAME, Peter.

_Remember, there is no mountain we cannot climb, there is no summit we cannot reach, there is no challenge we cannot meet, and there is no victory we cannot have. We will not bend. We will not break. We will not yield. We will never give in, we will never give up, and we will never, ever back down._

Can I count on you at this critical time?

_**[Please contribute $20.24 or more IMMEDIATELY to claim your 1300%-IMPACT and get your name on the Official 2024 Donor List that I'll review.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61879233:Jy174rGGN:m:1:3371220873:98116AEB931ECCBE5A032049E85B37A1:r)**_

Thank you,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61879232:Jy174rGGN:m:1:3371220873:98116AEB931ECCBE5A032049E85B37A1:r)
Donald J. Trump

**[CLAIM 13X-IMPACT>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61879232:Jy174rGGN:m:1:3371220873:98116AEB931ECCBE5A032049E85B37A1:r)**

Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024 and Save America. [donaldjtrump.com](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61879237:Jy174rGGN:m:1:3371220873:98116AEB931ECCBE5A032049E85B37A1:r)
Trump Save America JFC, PO Box 13570, Arlington, VA 22219

name: Keep Georgia Blue
subject: We need YOUR help to maintain our momentum
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20221115-8132-header&t=1&akid=8132%2E434096%2ELUW-j1)
Derek,
After laying everything we had out for Georgia over these past couple months, we’re tired and running low on resources. But we can’t afford to slow down!
Rev. Warnock has advanced to a runoff, and Republicans are already working to mobilize voters across the state.
With less than ONE MONTH to reach Democrats all over Georgia to make sure they turn out to vote again, we can’t afford to fall behind.
**[We need the grassroots team that pushed us to victory in 2020, that flipped the Senate blue in 2021, and that has kept Georgia competitive in 2022 to step up one more time. Will you rush a donation split between the Democratic Party of Georgia and John Fetterman so we can reach every voter we need to help Rev. subject: Illinois Review Welcomes New Ownership Team
body:
Conservative Radio Show Host Mark Vargas and Chicago Attorney Scott Kaspar Acquire the 17-year-old Publication in Latest Deal | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/c73da5e5d60a/illinois-review-welcomes-new-ownership-team-9520987?e=1cb5fdae9e)
---
| | [ ](https://illinoisreview.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=811d47b3c0783e80274d515f7&id=933de405a5&e=1cb5fdae9e)
---
| | [**Leading Conservative News Publication Illinois Review Welcomes New Ownership Team**](https://illinoisreview.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=811d47b3c0783e80274d515f7&id=5825339f47&e=1cb5fdae9e)
---
| Conservative Radio Show Host Mark Vargas and Chicago Attorney Scott Kaspar Acquire the 17-year-old Publication in Latest Deal
---
| **Chicago, IL** – Illinois Review (IR) announced on Tuesday a new ownership team that includes conservative radio show host and Newsmax columnist Mark Vargas and Chicago attorney and former US congressional candidate Scott Kaspar. The widely recognized and conservative publication on Illinois news was founded in 2005 by conservative leaders Fran Eaton and Dennis LaComb.
---
| | [ ](https://illinoisreview.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=811d47b3c0783e80274d515f7&id=6a03b723c4&e=1cb5fdae9e)
---
| “After 17 years and 17,000 stories later, it was time to hand over Illinois Review to a trusted and capable new ownership team that could take the organization to the next level,” said IR co-founder Fran Eaton. “Now more than ever, we’re going to need leading conservative voices and perspectives to rebuild the Republican Party in Illinois – and I know Mark and Scott are the team that can do it.”
“I have known Fran and Dennis since 2005, and I am honored to leverage my resources and rolodex to help take IR to the next level,” said Mark Vargas. “The very first OpEd that I published many years ago was on IR – and so it brings me great joy to officially be a part of the team as co-owner.”
“For decades, IR has been a leading voice on conservative news and perspectives here in Illinois,” said Scott Kaspar. “The brand, our contributors, supporters and subscribers have made IR a total success over the last 17 years – and we can’t wait to build upon that and make IR an even bigger force not just here in Illinois, but across the country,” said Kaspar.
Vargas and Kaspar plan to roll out a new website design, a newspaper division that will bring IR to your doorstep, expand IR’s social media presence and subscriber list and compensate contributors for their work. Vargas will serve as Editor-in-Chief and Kaspar as Publisher.
---
| **To learn more about Illinois Review, visit www.illinoisreview.com**
---
| | | | | | [](https://illinoisreview.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=811d47b3c0783e80274d515f7&id=b17d5f871a&e=1cb5fdae9e)
---
| | [](https://illinoisreview.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=811d47b3c0783e80274d515f7&id=5e1bfd21f4&e=1cb5fdae9e)
---
| | [](https://illinoisreview.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=811d47b3c0783e80274d515f7&id=396e9b4fa7&e=1cb5fdae9e)
---

body:

| | | **BREAKING: Trump hints at a 2024 presidential campaign launch TONIGHT!**

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: Did you hear my big announcement from Mar-a-Lago?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
Are you going to stand with me? I am proud to tell you that I just announced from Mar-a-Lago that I am officially running...
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61879239:Jd7K5rGxN:m:1:3370555685:C9AE0DF081BC1CB48A42E0CA5DA0C6A5:r)

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61879239:Jd7K5rGxN:m:1:3370555685:C9AE0DF081BC1CB48A42E0CA5DA0C6A5:r)

Peter,

I am proud to tell you that I just announced from Mar-a-Lago that I am officially running for **President of the United States.**

It is with your help that:

**WE WILL MAKE AMERICA POWERFUL AGAIN.
WE WILL MAKE AMERICA WEALTHY AGAIN.
WE WILL MAKE AMERICA STRONG AGAIN.
WE WILL MAKE AMERICA PROUD AGAIN.
WE WILL MAKE AMERICA SAFE AGAIN.
AND WE WILL MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!**

It was hardworking Patriots like YOU who built this Country, and it is hardworking Patriots like you who are going to SAVE our Country with ME in 2024. Together, we will take back our beautiful, magnificent White House from Joe Biden and the radical Left.

We have a lot of work to do, and we're only just getting started. Can I count on YOU to rush in an inaugural donation of $20.24 RIGHT NOW? When you do, you'll go down in history as one of the FIRST Patriots to donate to my 2024 Presidential Campaign.

_**For TODAY ONLY, all gifts will receive a 1300%-IMPACT!**_
** **
_**[Please make a contribution of $20.24 or more RIGHT NOW to proudly stand with me as I run for President in 2024 and your gift will be INCREASED by 1300%.>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61879240:Jd7K5rGxN:m:1:3370555685:C9AE0DF081BC1CB48A42E0CA5DA0C6A5:r)**_

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61879239:Jd7K5rGxN:m:1:3370555685:C9AE0DF081BC1CB48A42E0CA5DA0C6A5:r)

**[CONTRIBUTE $250 = $3500>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61879241:Jd7K5rGxN:m:1:3370555685:C9AE0DF081BC1CB48A42E0CA5DA0C6A5:r)**

**[CONTRIBUTE $100 = $1400>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61879242:Jd7K5rGxN:m:1:3370555685:C9AE0DF081BC1CB48A42E0CA5DA0C6A5:r)**

**[CONTRIBUTE $50 = $700>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61879239:Jd7K5rGxN:m:1:3370555685:C9AE0DF081BC1CB48A42E0CA5DA0C6A5:r)**

**[CONTRIBUTE $20.24 = $283>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61879240:Jd7K5rGxN:m:1:3370555685:C9AE0DF081BC1CB48A42E0CA5DA0C6A5:r)**

**[CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61879243:Jd7K5rGxN:m:1:3370555685:C9AE0DF081BC1CB48A42E0CA5DA0C6A5:r)**

I want to know who stood by me from the very beginning. My team is giving me the FIRST **Official 2024 Donor List** TOMORROW in my Mar-a-Lago office, and I want to see YOUR NAME, Peter.

_Remember, there is no mountain we cannot climb, there is no summit we cannot reach, there is no challenge we cannot meet, and there is no victory we cannot have. We will not bend. We will not break. We will not yield. We will never give in, we will never give up, and we will never, ever back down._

Can I count on you at this critical time?

_**[Please contribute $20.24 or more IMMEDIATELY to claim your 1300%-IMPACT and get your name on the Official 2024 Donor List that I'll review.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61879240:Jd7K5rGxN:m:1:3370555685:C9AE0DF081BC1CB48A42E0CA5DA0C6A5:r)**_

Thank you,

Peter,

I am proud to tell you that I just announced from Mar-a-Lago that I am officially running for **President of the United States.**

It is with your help that:
**WE WILL MAKE AMERICA POWERFUL AGAIN.
WE WILL MAKE AMERICA WEALTHY AGAIN.
WE WILL MAKE AMERICA STRONG AGAIN.
WE WILL MAKE AMERICA PROUD AGAIN.
WE WILL MAKE AMERICA SAFE AGAIN.
AND WE WILL MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!**
It was hardworking Patriots like YOU who built this Country, and it is hardworking Patriots like you who are going to SAVE our Country with ME in 2024. Together, we will take back our beautiful, magnificent White House from Joe Biden and the radical Left.

We have a lot of work to do, and we're only just getting started. Can I count on YOU to rush in an inaugural donation of $20.24 RIGHT NOW? When you do, you'll go down in history as one of the FIRST Patriots to donate to my 2024 Presidential Campaign.
_**For TODAY ONLY, all gifts will receive a 1300%-IMPACT!**_** **_**[Please make a contribution of $20.24 or more RIGHT NOW to proudly stand with me as I run for President in 2024 and your gift will be INCREASED by 1300%. >>](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._-AQ)**_

name: Indiana Democrats
subject: Democrats have delivered where Republicans failed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
|
---
Dear Hoosier Democrats, Democrats have delivered where Republicans failed. One year ago today, Democrats like André Carson and Frank Mrvan delivered what Indiana Republicans never could: a once-in-a-generation investment in our nation's roads, bridges, railroads, ports, airports, water systems, and high-speed internet via the Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act. While Indiana Republicans talked a big game about infrastructure on the campaign trail, they ultimately failed. From Fort Wayne and Indianapolis to Tell City along the Ohio River and Northwest Indiana, Hoosiers are already starting to see progress on delivering safer roads, bridges, and drinking water, more affordable and accessible high-speed internet, good-paying jobs, and more. Despite the promise that the Jobs Act held -- and its subsequent success -- every single Republican in Indiana's Congressional Delegation voted against it. They put their extremist agenda and party lines ahead of creating a brighter future for the Crossroads of America. Here are just a few ways the Jobs Act has helped: **As we begin to close out the year and head into 2023, would you consider making a recurring contribution to the Indiana Democractic Party?[You may do so here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54657148/379209485/1643342139?recurring=true&refcode=221115-1year&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDFmZTdkOC0zYTY1LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gECc7zwZ8-bFY-Ng8p8GwwRdElZ0HtehnZ52wLlMPoo=)** Thank you for all your support. -Indiana Democrats

body:
Thank you, Pennsylvania.

| [](http://links.doctoroz.com/u/click?_t=2b05aaee21f04e6792020c0ad1924b95&_m=8ec221ffe3ca455b98c5986e8c4e7f38&_e=PninFTFYVOy5uius0w_wqX1yZWzwKkO1AU2ZZN0ujtwZn3RTTLG0F968td78PZJv2EpCgd_YGB6gjE4GyM_wRmhkLNOYQGP9XF3ivDWDvpa4jVlalodYYYmwiPCj-zxUB1mu8zujBfexqEXL27l5K8abvUteZu9xxTQHwpDWplK_mv-om5yzTC2LQ0tDar9aAHud9c9tTrExCoOk47pdyrB_Ulytm4kloS_tpO228plO3cMUhE3pTRQvcBomJKS47bkJ9vk9RJXiWYnKylk3Ns9-8G2r9PjJCuGjafHHt0ssVfMFOITH7Oj7u-hTciEKteUWXfNwk63lD849zEklA8Vvk7yWzbsVDqM7cdLiRUtYSlobvUxw3VfwO5yiP1DhG6GduV_Le_TNTRbwpqGiJXNG9zdx_ZJd4fzY09WAe8SrHm_eWjZfF8mDybWp8GJGH1nRGdR4ZpZqGhZ85NA3IQ%3D%3D)

Fellow Americans,

It has been a pleasure campaigning across our Great Commonwealth. It was the honor of a lifetime and something I will always cherish. The memories, the stories, and the wonderful people I met along the way made this journey so incredible. Pennsylvanians showed up with passion and a vision for a brighter future; that is what I found inspiring every single day.

Our nation is facing big problems, and we need everyone to put down their partisan swords and focus on getting the job done to create a better tomorrow. As a doctor, I always did my best to help and heal others; our nation needs healing, and that is why I ran for Senate.

We still have an opportunity to create a better and brighter future for our nation, and right now, it boils down to Georgia. Herschel Walker is officially in a runoff, **[and he needs our help.](http://links.doctoroz.com/u/click?_t=2b05aaee21f04e6792020c0ad1924b95&_m=8ec221ffe3ca455b98c5986e8c4e7f38&_e=PninFTFYVOy5uius0w_wqX1yZWzwKkO1AU2ZZN0ujtwZn3RTTLG0F968td78PZJv2EpCgd_YGB6gjE4GyM_wRmhkLNOYQGP9XF3ivDWDvpa4jVlalodYYYmwiPCj-zxUB1mu8zujBfexqEXL27l5K8abvUteZu9xxTQHwpDWplK_mv-om5yzTC2LQ0tDar9aAHud9c9tTrExCoOk47pdyrB_Ulytm4kloS_tpO228plO3cMUhE3pTRQvcBomJKS47bkJ9vk9RJXiWYnKylk3Ns9-8G2r9PjJCuGjafHHt0tbukO_N45En3Zy_B-gXZinPveWkTJjtJWeVdaKXtchkMXu3crIXFIUoyoPw4NV5lWyVjRDILvdW60cRzIGssZI1ynz2SxoFK0CiKqWg6TaRZTUX9ddGYZVTqZggpkF7dMdpP-Vszu5Bb03kzwtIKCgwnccFsaIYbCNFzBr707BOw%3D%3D)**

clean_body: Thank you, Pennsylvania. | Fellow Americans, It has been a pleasure campaigning across our Great Commonwealth. It was the honor of a lifetime and something I will always cherish. The memories, the stories, and the wonderful people I met along the way made this journey so incredible. Pennsylvanians showed up with passion and a vision for a brighter future; that is what I found inspiring every single day. Our nation is facing big problems, and we need everyone to put down their partisan swords and focus on getting the job done to create a better tomorrow. As a doctor, I always did my best to help and heal others; our nation needs healing, and that is why I ran for Senate. We still have an opportunity to create a better and brighter future for our nation, and right now, it boils down to Georgia. Herschel Walker is officially in a runoff, Our nation cannot afford for Raphael Warnock to win this seat. Your support today could be the determining factor for a brighter future. | friend, thank you for everything. It has been a true honor. God Bless, Dr. Mehmet Oz Paid for by Doctor Oz For Senate If you would like to donate by mail, Our mailing address is: Doctor Oz For Senate PO Box 576 Huntingdon Valley, PA 19006

For the first time in 8 years, there will be an open seat for the job of Houston mayor. We need a mayor that has the skills and experience to tackle the city’s challenges but also one that is ready to build a bold path forward for all Houstonians to thrive. That is why I am in this race, team.

In order to achieve this goal, we have to start with hitting each and every fundraising goal. Tonight at midnight marks our mid-month fundraising deadline, and my team tells me we need to raise $525 before the clock strikes 12.

Together, we are building a campaign that I know will benefit all Houstonians. But to keep our campaign heading in the right direction, we need to reach tonight’s goal. I am counting on your support to push us over our goal before it is too late.

Hi Peter,

Here we are, one week after Election Day, and which party controls the House remains to be seen.

California is _still_ counting ballots and this race, along with 10 other California races, are still too close to call. I wasn't kidding when I said that path to holding our House Majority goes straight through this district. No matter how we count it, there is no retaining our majority without winning CA-27.

Despite what some pundits are saying: **there is still a path to victory for this campaign and a Democratic-controlled House.**

Here’s a look at where the race stands:
* 65% of the total ballots have been counted.
* I'm trailing Mike Garcia, but there are still hundreds of thousands of votes to count in LA County.
* Included in this count are tens of thousands of mail-in and drop-off ballots.

This race is still very much in play, and we're not going anywhere until **every single vote is counted.** We'll keep you posted with updates as they come in.

In the meantime, keep your fingers crossed for good news.

— Christy

P.S. We are in desperate need of volunteers to cure ballots in district. name: Brent Bozell
subject: Don’t let the Media steal another election
body:
Media’s bias against GOP on full display during midterms.
[](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxdUE1PhTAQ_DXlBoHlqxw4qPg0Jh7UvHfwQkq7hcZSCJQY_PUWHs-DSbPpzmx3OoNllGU0TdMiSTxRJsAiyT1VQggQRVEKcewuAZURZ1kRcskpz6KGJCH2TOlAToi2U-YLJ-H6NeBD73Wl5EIK2jCJRYyMN5LSHIDThGZZEzbU02Vn7TiT-I7AyZ0Z-TJhwAyKwW5LHNZP3FVpBYlPi-3rHoVaehJXuzSBbAPnYZk4OtBwXbN-1EquB8Vdy1RrHHk147uNtRgMs2ow9TBa1asfrP972EasRms73CRZ3UyD41iL9S2Wm4IbRGOv6n5XvCUfTL5_bnRttHIfr_6BnRLz5uCleE50ZLypFOO30lrNWe5CbfdQtwwPKyXJ7wnA_gxgjwsWG1_Y-fw6rX61PvpP6QXajYQHV-064t_ksSQ4AgOSV78U9aDC)
Friend,

The media's bias against Republicans is on full display this election.

Why is biased media so dangerous? Here's an example.

Four years ago, TV's midterm coverage hammered **Republican candidates and then-President Trump with 88% negative spin** while sparing Democrats similarly bad press.

This year, Democrats are in charge of the White House and both chambers of Congress. However, a new Media Research Center study of ABC, CBS, and NBC evening newscasts finds that **Republicans still receive 87% negative news coverage. **

All the while, Democrats -- including the President -- are drawing far less scrutiny than the party out of power.

Let me introduce myself. My name is Brent Bozell, and I'm the Founder and President of the Media Research Center (MRC).

**MRC is the only conservative organization dedicated to exposing the radical left-wing agenda in the media and holding them accountable for their corruption and lies.**

Friend, I've set a goal to raise $25,000 to STOP media bias and corruption.

[_**Can I count on you to join the fight by sending an urgent gift today? Click here to send your support >>>**_](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxdUE1vhCAU_DV40wj4efDQ1m6bbXrc7ZGw8FRSQKvYxv31RdftoQl54c083jADFc6yIk3TMkkCWSWE40YEqiIxIRjjlFDqL1HRYMGzMhaNKESGLyiJwXClo2YEcJ2ynzBK3y-R6E3QVbwQtIwpT2UqMMgy40lTQkF4XogEmjzQVefcMCH6gMjBnwnEPELELcjerUs8Zkbha-MkoofZGWZAqtkgWm_SiGQrOPXzKMCDVmjGzaBVs-yU8C1XrfXkzUzoNzLZW-5Ub1k_OGXUFdh_D-uI0-BcB6skZ5ex9xxvgd1juSv4QbDuph5-8-P1K_k4vV09zaxW_uP1P7BTclodHMvXRGMbjJUcfpTWaspyH2q7hbpmuFupUP6ICNmeEbLFRWZHz_x0eh-XsF6ew5f0TNqVJE--umWAv8l9SbQHRlBe_wLNnaFQ)

This year, the Big Three evening newscasts aired 115 stories that mentioned or discussed the midterm elections, with a total airtime of 213 minutes, or about 60 percent more than the 130 minutes we tallied four years ago.

Here's what we found:

* **Burying Biden**

Four years ago, President Trump accounted for 48% of all midterm campaign airtime in 2018, more than all of the individual House, Senate, and gubernatorial candidates combined.

But the networks aren't interested in targeting President Biden this year. _Biden accounted for just 34 minutes of midterm coverage_ , just 16% of total campaign coverage.

* **Blasting Republicans**

This fall, Democrats, including President Biden, drew 13 positive comments vs. 26 negative ones for a **67% negative spin. **

That's not great, but not nearly as bad as Republicans. They received 94 negative comments vs. 14 positive statements, **a spin score of 87% negative** -- and virtually identical to the 88% negative spin for the whole GOP (including Trump) in 2018.

* **Showcasing Democrats ' Agenda**

While voters consistently ranked the economy and inflation as the most important issues this fall, the broadcast networks' campaign coverage instead emphasized the agenda favored by Democratic consultants.

Thus, the economy was only the fifth-most cited issue within these midterm stories, with 15 minutes of airtime. That's barely half of the time spent on anonymous and unverified allegations that GOP candidate Herschel Walker paid for two women's abortions years ago, _charges Walker has vehemently denied_.

[_**Join the fight against media bias! Just click here >>>**_](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxdUMtugzAQ_BpzC8Jr8zpwaEvTqFKlXhK1J-TYC1g1BoFRQ7--hiQ9VLJW3pn1jmewoEmSxXGccx6ogoOgtQx0AREApTQGxvwlzGoqRZJHspaZTOiZ8Ag7oU1Yj4iu1fYLR-X7JZR9F7SF4grr6MwywSBXMucpjzlFBTKJIMqSwBStc8NE2AOBvT8TynnEUFhUvVuXeKwbpa-1U4TtZ9dVHSo9d4SVmzSBZAWnfh4letBKU4luMLpebpT0rdCN9eTVzM5vrFRvhdO9rfrB6U7_YPXfwzriDDrX4iopqvPYe040WN1juSv4QbTuqr4rp_fhgx0ul09PV9Zo__HyH9hqNa0OXvMDN9QGY6GGb22MnpLUh9psoa4Z3qwUJH0kANszgC0umB07iePxbVx25fK8e4lP0KwkPPnqlgH_Jm9LwltgQNLyF7oVoHI)

As the Senate majority lingers on in the Georgia run-off election, we can't let the media steal the race from voters.

Here's the breakdown of the Left's coverage of issues during the midterm coverage:

[](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxdUMtugzAQ_BpzA-EHJBw4NKFpVanHpEfk2GuwYgwyphX9-hpCeohkrbwz6x3PQInzfJ9lWcFYJEtGOFYi0iVJCcEYZ4TScEn2CgueF6lQYi9yfEUshY5rkygH4Fttb-Bk6OdE9F3UlqK4UpZiJQWGIlWpymiuKM5UxlQK7BqZsvV-GBF9QeQUzghicpBwC7L3y5KAdU6EqrxE9DT5ru5A6qlDtFqlEckXcOwnJyCAVpiad4PRat4oEVquGxvIu5k4bKxlb7nXva37wetO_0L97GEZ8Qa8b2GR5PXV9YHjDdSPWB4KYRCsv6vHw9dxOCjxfbgFurZGh49XT2Cr5bg4-CjemcE2cqUcfrQxesx3IdRmDXXJcLNSot0BEbI-I2SNi0yeXvj5_OnmuJpf47fsQpqFJMdQ_TzA_-S2JNkCI2hX_QFW-KD3)

**When the MRC was founded in 1987, over 75% of Americans trusted the left-wing media. Since then, MRC has successfully SHATTERED America 's trust in the left-wing media -- over 90% of Americans state they DO NOT trust the media anymore. **

But we can't do this alone, Friend. Can I count on you to join the fight for the truth? Click below to donate.

[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxdUE1vgzAM_TXhVkTMR-HAYVvbTZV2mdRO2gWlwYFoSUAQNrFfP4PoDpMiK362n_0eljzL8jRNiyQJ6jIBwZUMdAkRAOc8hTimT5grLkVWRFLJXGb8xpIIrdAmVAOib7X7xKGmfA5lZ4O2LCIUt0xCkReqEBCjElFCw5CofJ_zNDBl630_sviBwYneiHIaMBQO684vJITZQVJUvmbxSdhucp7FB0gZZJO3lcVaT5aQ9ZANHLtpkEigk6YStjdazVtJUip04xaOVdqO-Ku6c8LrzlVd77XVP1j9V7S0eIPet7isFNVt6KgmGqzuJt03UCOuR9L2Xfr-9Xb8cOcrKcwqZzTJOPwDW12Pi4Jz8ZIY7oKhrPtvbYwesz1Z3KwWL45uUkq2f2QA6xjAah5MPr6Ky-V1mHeH-bh7Tq_QLEV4oujnHv86N5JwMwzY_vALOCGkZA)
